buildanrtsgamewithunrealengine.human_name: Build an RTS Game with Unreal Engine
buildanrtsgamewithunrealengine.description_text:
Master the fundamentals for RTS games in Unreal Engine!

Real-time strategy games combine the best of quick action and thought-provoking decisions - making them very popular. You'll explore core strategy mechanics including unit movement, basic combat, and more while building a small RTS project in Unreal. The techniques here will provide you with base mechanics that can be expanded or used in other strategy-style games!

You will learn how to:

  • Make playable units
  • Implement simple combat
  • Navigate with Nav Mesh
  • Provide UI-feedback for input
  • Create RTS-appropriate cameras
  • Improve level aesthetics

... and more!

unrealenginemini-projects2025edition.description_text:
Build four beginner-friendly Unreal Engine mini-games!

Unreal Engine empowers creators to bring imaginative ideas to life, making it a cornerstone tool across all genres. In this course, you’ll build a set of four mini-projects exploring concepts like UIs, physics, and core programming tenets with real-world techniques that strengthen your grasp of the editor. The practical skills you gain will give you the confidence to take the next step in your Unreal Engine journey - whether you want to build RPGs, walking simulators, FPS games, or something else.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Manipulate actor properties with scripting
  • Utilize loops for mass object spawning
  • Build a game based on physics
  • Develop an interactive UI
  • Connect player input to game mechanics
  • Apply Unreal best practices throughout

... and more!

discovergameaudioforunrealengine.human_name: Discover Game Audio for Unreal Engine
discovergameaudioforunrealengine.description_text:
Explore how to use audio for Unreal Engine projects!

Audio can play a vital role in games by creating atmosphere, providing players with feedback, and giving an immersive sense of presence. Through this course, you'll experiment with playing sounds in Unreal Engine and adjusting available settings to make your audio more dynamic. These skills will allow you to enhance the game feel of your Unreal Engine projects and work with background music, SFX, and more.

You will learn how to:

  • Alter sound attenuation
  • Play background music
  • Make dynamic SFX with randomness
  • Give characters footsteps
  • Add various types of ambient sounds
  • Trigger audio based on actions

... and more!

developa2dplatformerinunrealengine.human_name: Develop a 2D Platformer in Unreal Engine
developa2dplatformerinunrealengine.description_text:
Learn how to make 2D games using Unreal Engine!

2D remains an immensely popular art style for games and can be found across a multitude of genres - especially platformers. In this course, you'll build a 2D platformer while learning how to work with tilemaps, players, enemies, and more using Unreal Engine and a 2D art style. These skills will allow you to unlock Unreal Engine's capabilities for 2D games and give you the foundations to work with any kind of platformer project.

You will learn how to:

  • Create multiple platforming levels
  • Set up player & enemy movement
  • Implement collectible coins
  • Work with UI systems
  • Control game overs & progression
  • Enhance aesthetics with art & audio

... and more!

completeunrealenginecpluspluscourse_buil.human_name: The Complete Unreal Engine C++ Course - Build an FPS
completeunrealenginecpluspluscourse_buil.description_text:
Develop a complete first-person shooter in Unreal Engine using C++ programming!

First-person shooters are popular for their performance and interactivity, and C++ empowers developers to create them efficiently. In this course, you'll build a fully-fledged FPS survival game with Unreal Engine and C++ while learning to create enemy waves, pickups, and other interactive game elements. These advanced techniques will enable you to leverage more customized FPS features with C++ and approach Unreal Engine development in a whole new way.

You will learn how to:
  • Create and program enemy classes
  • Implement wave-based enemy systems
  • Add various types of pickups
  • Manage game environments effectively
  • Facilitate cross-class communication
  • Code dynamic weapon systems

... and more!

createaturn-basedminirpginunrealengine.human_name: Create a Turn-Based Mini RPG in Unreal Engine
createaturn-basedminirpginunrealengine.description_text:
Build a turn-based mini RPG from start to finish in Unreal Engine!

Turn-based battle systems offer strategic depth for creating immersive and engaging RPG experiences. In this course, you'll construct a 2.5D, turn-based RPG featuring magic spells, healing, and more - all with simple UI controls. These skills will empower you to expand into more sophisticated RPG development and master class construction using Unreal's Blueprints.

You’ll learn how to:
  • Create dynamic player/enemy classes
  • Develop turn-based game logic
  • Use UI for character control
  • Build a 2.5D game world
  • Work with projectiles and healing
  • Add game juice with SFX

... and more!

makeafully-fledged3dplatformerwithunreal.human_name: Make a Fully-Fledged 3D Platformer with Unreal Engine
makeafully-fledged3dplatformerwithunreal.description_text:
Bring your own 3D platformer to life with Unreal Engine from start to finish!

3D platformers stand as classics of the gaming world, celebrated for their dynamic movement and multi-layered levels. Through this course, you’ll craft a fully-fledged 3D platformer from the ground up, building core features like animated players, collectibles, enemies, and seamless level progression. These skills will not only deepen your understanding of Unreal Engine, but give you the confidence to design original platforming experiences or evolve existing ones.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up a 3D player controller
  • Implement movement, jumping, and animations
  • Create interconnected, multi-stage levels
  • Add collectibles that track player progress
  • Design enemy behavior and obstacles
  • Develop in-game menus and UI

... and more!

makeaplanearcadegameinunrealengine.human_name: Make a Plane Arcade Game in Unreal Engine
makeaplanearcadegameinunrealengine.description_text:
Make a plane flying game in Unreal Engine!

Planes are a popular subject matter for many genres thanks to their unique and inspiring ability to fly in real life. You'll learn to build an arcade-style game where players must fly through rings to increase their score. These techniques will provide you with new structures for tracking scores, implementing movement, and more for your Unreal projects.

You will learn how to: 

  • Process inputs
  • Script pitch, roll, and yaw
  • Control plane acceleration
  • Build a ring-based course
  • Track scoring with UI
  • Create 3D environments with Quixel

... and more!

introtogamedesign.description_text:
Discover how the core concepts of game design can help you to create fun and intuitive games!

Game design is a fundamental process needed when creating any game - from the smallest platformer to the largest MMORPG. In this course, you'll start mastering the foundations of game design by examining each core component and how they apply to real-world games. By the end, you'll understand both why game design is important and, more crucially, how to apply the concepts to your own games and create a stunning portfolio.

You will learn how to:
  • Plan a game around a core mechanic or experience
  • Engage players by providing tangible goals
  • Structure game actions
  • Guide players through the game
  • Understand game feel and its effects
  • Show players how to play in different ways

... and more!

introtounrealenginegamedevelopment.human_name: Intro to Unreal Engine Game Development
introtounrealenginegamedevelopment.description_text:
Take your first step into Unreal Engine game development!

Unreal Engine stands at the forefront of professional game development, powering everything from breakout indie hits to AAA blockbusters. Through this course, you’ll get hands-on with the Unreal Editor, master core mechanics, and build simple interactive examples using the Blueprints Visual Scripting system. With these skills, you'll unlock the foundation to craft immersive experiences and pursue more advanced Unreal Engine projects.

You'll learn how to:

  • Navigate the Unreal Editor interface
  • Work with actors and game objects
  • Set up and modify level settings
  • Implement realistic physics and lighting
  • Build gameplay with visual scripting
  • Handle user interaction

... and more!

developaclassicshootemupwithunrealengine.human_name: Develop a Classic Shoot 'em up with Unreal Engine
developaclassicshootemupwithunrealengine.description_text:
Build a 3D arcade shooter from start to finish in Unreal Engine!

Shoot ‘em ups are a timeless genre that has vastly influenced and shaped the landscape of action games. In this course, you’ll create your own shoot ‘em up in Unreal Engine while learning player controls, dynamic enemy spawning, collision systems, and interactive UI development. These practical, multifaceted skills can be used not just for building shoot 'em ups, but also for exploring new game genres with Unreal.

You'll learn how to:

  • Build player movement and shooting logic
  • Design modular enemy-spawning systems
  • Implement precise collision detection
  • Integrate dynamic audio and SFX
  • Create visual polish with particles
  • Develop a real-time game UI

... and more!

createafully-fledgedbullethellinunrealen.human_name: Create a Fully-Fledged Bullet Hell in Unreal Engine
createafully-fledgedbullethellinunrealen.description_text:
Build a bullet hell game from start to finish in Unreal Engine!

Bursting across screens with relentless action, bullet hell games are a thrilling staple of game development that push technical and creative boundaries. In this course, you’ll create a fully-fledged 3D bullet hell, mastering real-world techniques essential for managing enemies, optimizing gameplay, and delivering an engaging experience. By the end, you’ll have a robust project to showcase your Unreal Engine skills and the confidence to create action-oriented titles of your own.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up Unreal’s Enhanced Input System
  • Design player and enemy characters
  • Implement advanced enemy state machines
  • Control spawning algorithms
  • Apply dynamic VFX and lighting
  • Build responsive UI systems

... and more!

developacompleteinfiniterunnerinunrealen.human_name: Develop a Complete Infinite Runner in Unreal Engine
developacompleteinfiniterunnerinunrealen.description_text:
Build a fully-fledged, 2.5D infinite runner for Unreal Engine!

Infinite runners are a cornerstone genre, offering endless replay value and a deep dive into modular, dynamic gameplay systems. In this course, you'll develop a complete infinite runner game from start to finish, mastering core foundations in animation, level generation, and more. These skills will not only give you essential skills for infinite runners, but provide you with fundamentals that can easily be applied to roguelikes, platformers, and many other genres.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Create moveable actors
  • Animate player characters with multiple states
  • Place enemies and collectibles programmatically
  • Build modular, expandable level scenarios
  • Manage scoring systems and game overs
  • Combine 2D sprites with 3D environments

... and more!

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

introtomultiplayerinunrealengine.human_name: Intro to Multiplayer in Unreal Engine
introtomultiplayerinunrealengine.description_text:
Discover how to add multiplayer to your Unreal Engine games!

Multiplayer is a highly in-demand feature that can greatly enhance player experiences or completely define the gameplay. In this course, you'll create a multiplayer point-collecting game while exploring the fundamentals of how multiplayer works in Unreal Engine - which can be applied to any Unreal project.

You will learn how to:
  • Understand basic networking & RPCs
  • Explore Unreal settings for multiplayer
  • Control inputs and players per device
  • Render player states across computers
  • Manage one-time pickups
  • Update UIs across players

... and more!

builda25dfarmingrpgwithunrealengine.human_name: Build a 2.5D Farming RPG with Unreal Engine
builda25dfarmingrpgwithunrealengine.description_text:
Build a farming simulation game using Unreal Engine!

Farming simulation games offer players the chance to create, grow, and manage their own virtual farms, combining strategic planning with RPG-like gameplay to create an immersive experience. In this course, you’ll develop a 2.5D farming simulation from scratch – covering core features like player controls, farming mechanics, and a basic economic system. These skills will give you the tools you need to create more complex farming games and expand into other genres with Unreal Engine.

You’ll learn how to:
  • Set up player movement and inputs
  • Add interactive farming mechanics
  • Create a grid-based map with Blueprints
  • Implement simple game currency systems
  • Develop skip-time logic for crop growth
  • Add SFX and game feel polishing

... and more!

uiuxforgamedesign.description_text:
Discover UI and UX design principles for games!

The user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) play a critical role in communicating information to players and creating smooth, interactive gameplay. In this course, you'll build a UI/UX mockup for a mobile game while exploring design methodologies and wireframing techniques. These techniques will provide you new ways to approach UI/UX game design and to meaningfully apply iterative design to optimize your game's experience.

You will learn how to:
  • Understand users with user stories
  • Create definitive design criteria
  • Utilize wireframes for mockups
  • Apply common design conventions
  • Test and iterate design choices
  • Recognize design processes

... and more!

explorestorytellingforgames.description_text:
Discover tips and techniques for designing game narratives! You'll learn by studying real games, and master a variety of methods for telling stories through characters, plots, mechanics, and more.

No matter what type of games you want to build, the skills you'll learn will help to make your games more immersive and engaging for your players.

You will learn how to:
  • Understand technical story design
  • Create compelling protagonists & antagonists
  • Base your story on a three-act structure
  • Use game-based methods to convey your story
  • Incorporate interactive, choice-based storytelling
  • Advance the story with quests

createaracinggameinunrealengine.human_name: Create a Racing Game in Unreal Engine
createaracinggameinunrealengine.description_text:
Make an arcade-style racing game in Unreal Engine!

Whether stylized or hyper-realistic, racing games are a popular genre due to their all-ages nature and easy-to-understand mechanics. In this course, you'll build a racing game while learning how to set up a car and a track that can manage laps. These techniques will give you the foundations to expand any sort of racing game and gain a deeper understanding of Blueprints techniques for vehicles in general.

You will learn how to:
  • Implement a race track environment
  • Add inputs suited to vehicles
  • Set up a race car
  • Detect racing progress
  • Control UIs and win conditions
  • Rig additional cars in Blender

... and more!

learn3dmodelingwithblenderfromscratchnew.human_name: Learn 3D Modeling with Blender from Scratch
learn3dmodelingwithblenderfromscratchnew.description_text:
Master the foundations of Blender and 3D modeling!

3D modeling, the process of creating digital 3D objects, is a robust field of study with real-world applications for animation, game development, and more. In this course, you'll explore the free and open-source Blender software and learn the fundamental techniques for manipulating meshes and creating custom assets. These skills will form the basis for expanding your 3D modeling skills and open up opportunities to create unique assets for your projects.

You will learn how to:
  • Understand how 3D objects work
  • Move, rotate, and scale objects
  • Edit vertices, edges, and faces
  • Work with Blender's modifiers
  • Apply materials to meshes
  • Export models for other programs

... and more!

buildacompletestealthgamewithunrealengin.human_name: Build a Complete Stealth Game with Unreal Engine
buildacompletestealthgamewithunrealengin.description_text:
Create a fully-fledged 3D stealth game!

Stealth gameplay is a cornerstone of modern action and adventure games, known for its tense strategies and immersive experiences. In this course, you'll build a complete stealth combat game in Unreal Engine, focusing on advanced enemy AI and dynamic stealth mechanics. With these skills, you'll be ready to specialize further in AI-driven design and tackle complex, real-world Unreal Engine projects in multiple genres.

You'll learn how to:
  • Design advanced enemy patrol systems
  • Implement field of view mechanics
  • Integrate real-time sound detection
  • Build stealth and combat gameplay
  • Set up character and enemy animations
  • Construct game levels efficiently

... and more!

introtoriggingmodelsinblender.human_name: Intro to Rigging Models in Blender
introtoriggingmodelsinblender.description_text:
Prepare your 3D models for animation by learning the fundamentals of rigging!

Rigging is a key animation technique that involves creating a skeletal armature to manipulate a 3D mesh and streamline the animation process. In this course, you'll discover everything required for rigging - from setting up the "bones" to weight painting and controlling which parts of the mesh are affected by each bone. By the end, you'll have the foundations you'll need to master rigging any kind of 3D model and expand your skills in creating custom assets.

You will learn how to:
  • Create bones to build an armature
  • Connect your armature and 3D mesh
  • Control affected vertices with weight painting
  • Export rigged models
  • Apply Mixamo animations to your models

first-personexplorationgameinunrealengin.human_name: First-Person Exploration Game in Unreal Engine
first-personexplorationgameinunrealengin.description_text:
Build a fully-fledged first-person exploration game using Unreal Engine!

First-person exploration games captivate players by immersing them in interactive worlds, where storytelling and discovery are at the core of the experience. In this course, you’ll develop a modular first-person exploration game inside Unreal Engine, mastering key systems that empower you to craft compelling puzzles, environments, and interactive stories. By the end, you’ll possess reusable tools and in-depth techniques to bring a wide range of first-person games to life.

You'll learn how to:
  • Set up a first-person controller
  • Develop versatile interaction systems
  • Create dynamic door and object logic
  • Display info boxes for storytelling
  • Implement Blueprints for rapid iteration
  • Integrate assets for immersive worlds

... and more!

makeahorrorgameinunrealengine.human_name: Make a Horror Game in Unreal Engine
makeahorrorgameinunrealengine.description_text:
Learn how to make fully-fledged horror games in Unreal Engine!

Horror games are a flexible genre that offers developers unique opportunities to explore spooky aesthetics and atmospheres. Through this course, you'll build a horror game where the player must avoid a monster and collect items - all while managing their flashlight's battery power. The techniques featured here will allow you to unlock level design suitable for the horror game genre that can easily be applied to any project.

You will learn how to:

  • Design horror levels and lighting
  • Implement a flashlight object
  • Create a player-chasing monster
  • Set up collectables
  • Control gameplay flow & UIs
  • Enhance games with SFX

... and more!

buildatowerdefensegameinunrealengine.human_name: Build a Tower Defense Game in Unreal Engine
buildatowerdefensegameinunrealengine.description_text:
Create a complete tower defense game in Unreal Engine!

Tower defense games combine the best of strategy and creativity, making them a favorite among gamers. In this course, you’ll build a tower defense game while exploring character blueprints, animations, tile maps, and scalable game mechanics to develop a polished project that demonstrates the power of 2.5D gameplay. Mastering these skills will help you create modular tower defense games and expand into more advanced Unreal Engine projects.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Create modular character blueprints
  • Set up animations for all states
  • Design and decorate game levels
  • Implement tower defense behavior and logic
  • Develop a point system for strategic decisions
  • Combine 2D and 3D gameplay features

... and more!

makeamini-survivalgameinunrealengine.human_name: Make a Mini-Survival Game in Unreal Engine
makeamini-survivalgameinunrealengine.description_text:
Create a mini-survival game using Unreal Engine!

Survival games are a staple of the industry with a unique ability to work in just about any setting. Through this course, you'll explore the most fundamental of survival game player mechanics, as well as how to set up environments for those players. These techniques will allow you to adapt any project for the survival game genre with universal concepts that can easily be expanded to suit your needs.

You will learn how to:

  • Craft terrain with Quixel
  • Deal with user inputs
  • Implement player movement
  • Control player "needs"
  • Construct companion UIs
  • Make day-night cycles

... and more!

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Intro to Game Design, UI/UX for Game Design, Unreal Engine Mini-Projects, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Harness the power of Unreal Engine with our latest Software Learning Bundle by Zenva. This expert-led collection contains specialized courses designed to help you build any genre of game: integrate strategy and base building into your next project with Build a Tower Defense Game in Unreal Engine, scare the pants off players with Make a Horror Game in Unreal Engine, or add a splash of retro fun with Develop a Classic Shoot 'em Up with Unreal Engine. Get serious about game design for a price you choose and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 18th, 2027.
from_bundle.author: Zenva Pty Ltd

basic_data.human_name: Humble RPG Bundle: The Free League RPG Collection
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Ready to spice up your TTRPG collection with the hottest titles from Free League Publishing? Unlock the core set for Dragonbane, an exhilarating classic fantasy game full of magic, mystery, and adventure that offers “mirth and mayhem roleplaying,” aka hearty laughs and brutal challenges. Or brave Mutant: Year Zero, a post-apocalyptic tale of humanity’s crawl back from streets turned graveyards as godlike mutants roam the wasteland. Try these or Vaesen: A Wicked Secret, all for a price you choose, and help support Direct Relief with your purchase.

Codes are redeemable through the DriveThruRPG website.
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: Fresh TTRPGs by Free League Publishing
basic_data.description:
Fresh TTRPGs by Free League Publishing. Ready to spice up your TTRPG collection with the hottest titles from Free League Publishing? Unlock the core set for Dragonbane, an exhilarating classic fantasy game full of magic, mystery, and adventure that offers “mirth and mayhem roleplaying,” aka hearty laughs and brutal challenges. Or brave Mutant: Year Zero, a post-apocalyptic tale of humanity’s crawl back from streets turned graveyards as godlike mutants roam the wasteland. Try these or Vaesen: A Wicked Secret, all for a price you choose, and help support Direct Relief with your purchase.

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the ebooks in this bundle is as much as $626. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase. Pay $5 or more to access keys.

Read your content. Content is redeemed through DTRPG website.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publishers and to support Direct Relief. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

forbiddenlands_ravenspurge.description_text: Raven’s Purge is an epic campaign module for the Forbidden Lands RPG, written by acclaimed fantasy author Erik Granström. Raven’s Purge is not a linear story and it has no set goal that the adventurers are expected to follow. Instead, it is a rich tapestry of legends, locations, characters and events that the players can interact with in a multitude of ways.

symbaroum_corerulebook.description_text: Symbaroum invites you to join in the adventure! Explore the vast Forest of Davokar in the hunt for treasures, lost wisdoms and fame. Visit the eleven barbarian clans to trade or to plunder their treasuries. Establish a base of power among princes, guilds or rebellious refugees in the capital city of Yndaros. Or survive encounters with famished Arch Trolls, dark-minded Blight Beasts and undead warlords. But whatever you do, never ignore the warnings spoken by the wardens of the forest: tread carefully and do not disturb the ruins of old, for the dark deep of Davokar is about to awaken.

mutant_mechatroncorebook.description_text: In a huge facility hidden underneath the ocean, an army of robots continues to carry out the final orders of humanity. Waiting for the humans to return, they work tirelessly in decaying factories. But now, decades after the humans left, something has changed. Some robots have started to express their own free will. Will these self-aware robots save the Collective - or lead it to its final downfall? This is the second major expansion to Mutant: Year Zero, the award-winning post-apocalyptic pen&paper roleplaying game.

dragonbane_pathofglory.description_text: Coming to the legendary Dead Forest in search of treasure, glory and a solution to the ancient curse laying waste to the forest, the adventurers soon find themselves embroiled in an epic conflict reaching back to the very foundations of the world. The quest will take the adventurers through the depths of the forest, under the mountain, and into a strange new land where the fate of the world will be determined.

twilight_2000_theblackmadonna.description_text: The Black Madonna is a campaign expansion for the fourth edition of Twilight: 2000, based on the classic adventure with the same title for the first edition of the game. This new and updated supplement is written by the original author, Frank Frey, and Chris Keeling. This boxed set includes new rules, new weapons, an overview of the Silesia region of Poland, new encounters, new factions for the PCs to tangle with, new scenario sites to explore, and details on the Black Madonna itself and its secrets.

symbaroum_advancedplayersguide.description_text: The Advanced Player’s Guide expands on every aspect of the Player’s Guide section in the Symbaroum Core Rulebook and is equally useful for players and Game Masters. The book is brimming with new races, occupations, abilities, powers and rituals, also with lots of new equipment that will influence how the game is played. Moreover, if you take all optional rules in regard, along with its contribution to the expansion of the game world, it is hardly any doubt that the Advanced Player’s Guide is a must for everyone who cannot wait to walk further into the shadowy halls of Davokar.

forbiddenlands_thebloodmarch.description_text: The plains of the Bloodmarch once blossomed so abundantly that hot days would see rivers of nectar flow through the vales. The mountains yielded ore so pure that shards of unforged iron could be used for axes. Of course, this was before the Demon Flood. Ever since the sorcerer Zygofer had his demonic hordes lay waste to the country, the land has been dead and deserted, apart from the twisted nightmares that now roam its plains and forests. Yet there should be much treasure to find for those brave enough to face their fears. The Bloodmarch is an epic campaign module for the Forbidden Lands retro-fantasy survival roleplaying game, describing the demon-infested lands west of Ravenland.

twilight_2000_hostilewaters.description_text: Hostile Waters for the new edition of RPG classic Twilight: 2000 is a modular expansion that includes everything you need to play in a marine environment. Hostile Waters is loosely based on Pirates of the Vistula for the first edition of Twilight: 2000 but designed to be used for any waterways. This expansion includes new combat and travel rules for marine environments, military watercraft large and small, new factions for the PCs to tangle with, new plots to unravel, and new scenario sites to explore

forbiddenlandscoregame.callout: Best Cartography (Gold) and Best Production Values (Gold)
forbiddenlandscoregame.description_text: Forbidden Lands is a new take on classic fantasy roleplaying. In this open-world survival roleplaying game, you’re not heroes sent on missions dictated by others - instead, you are raiders and rogues bent on making your own mark on a cursed world. You will discover lost tombs, fight terrible monsters, wander the wild lands and, if you live long enough, build your own stronghold to defend.

mutant_genlabalphacorebook.description_text: During the great apocalypse, humanity fled to the depths of the underground enclaves. In genetic laboratories, researchers tried to breed a new being, splicing human and animal DNA, creating a beast intelligent yet strong enough to survive in the devastated world. The enclaves have fallen - but the animals’ fight for freedom has only just begun. Mutant: Genlab Alpha is a complete stand-alone expansion to the award-winning Mutant: Year Zero roleplaying game. Get ready for a furry mutant (r)evolution!

mutant_elysiumcorebook.description_text: Mutant: Elysium is the third major expansion to the award-winning Mutant: Year Zero roleplaying game. This game tells the origin story of the enclave humans, seeing themselves as the last torchbearers of human civilization. The four Houses of Warburg, Fortescue, Morningstar and Kilgore struggle for power in the Elysium I enclave, oblivious to a rising power that threatens to end their reign forever. Mutant: Elysium can also be played as a stand-alone game.

vaesen_awickedsecret.description_text: Journey to the Mythic North and investigate four bone-chilling cases that will test your abilities to the fullest. This book contains four standalone mysteries for Vaesen – Nordic Horror Roleplaying, playable on their own or as a part of a longer campaign.

vaesen_nordichorrorroleplayingcorerules.human_name: Vaesen: Nordic Horror Roleplaying Core Rules
vaesen_nordichorrorroleplayingcorerules.description_text: This starter set is for Vaesen – Nordic Horror Roleplaying designed as the perfect starting point for roleplaying in the Mythic North, containing everything you need for your game night – including condensed rules for action skill tests, combat, damage, and fear; the complete introductory mystery The Haunting of Castle Gyllencreutz; five pre-generated and illustrated player characters; and several maps and handouts.

symbaroum_gamemastersguide.description_text: With the Game Master’s Guide, Symbaroum’s collection of core books is complete! It features three solid sections, meant to inspire and support Game Masters when it comes to everything from the creation of homebrew adventures to managing sessions around the gaming table. No matter if you choose to embrace it all or only pick the goodies out of the cake, the tips and alternative rules presented in this book will certainly help make adventures in Symbaroum’s game world even more spicy, thrilling and memorable.

vaesen_mythiccarpathia.description_text: Venture into Mythic Carpathia to face Vampires, Rusalkas, Baba Yaga, and other even stranger horrors of Central and Eastern European folklore. Wander the busy streets of Prague, where history and myths collide. Visit old cities, deep forests and high mountains to face creatures beyond belief. This beautifully illustrated hardback expansion to the award-winning Vaesen – Nordic Horror Roleplaying includes information about the Carpathia branch of the Society, a gazetteer of the city of Prague, a chapter with local vaesen, and three complete mysteries to play.

mutantyearzero_corerulebook.description_text: Mutant: Year Zero takes you to the world after the great Apocalypse. Humanity’s proud civilization has fallen. The cities are dead wastelands, winds sweeping along empty streets turned into graveyards. But life remains. Among the ruins, the People live. You are the heirs of humanity – but not quite human anymore. Your bodies and minds are capable of superhuman feats. You are mutants.

dragonbane_coreset.description_text: Dragonbane is a classic fantasy tabletop roleplaying game full of magic, mystery, and adventure. It is designed from the ground up to facilitate fast and furious play, with very little prep time and adventures that are a breeze to run. Dragonbane is a game with room for laughs at the table, while still offering brutal challenges for the adventurers. Dragonbane is a game with room for laughs at the table, while still offering brutal challenges for the adventurers. This PDF set includes a Rulebook with fast and effective D20-based game rules for character creation, skills, combat, magic, and travel; and Adventures book with eleven complete adventures, to be played separately or tied together in the epic Secret of the Dragon Emperor campaign; the booklet Alone in Deepfall Breach letting you play Dragonbane solo, and more.

forbiddenlands_bitterreach.description_text: In the southern lands, elders speak of cold storms from the north. Cursed voices borne on the icy winds whisper of secrets from ages past that would plunge realms and kin into ruin if only someone could understand these ancient words. They are the desperate confessions of the lost. They are the legends of the Bitter Reach. This is an epic campaign module for the Forbidden Lands roleplaying game, describing the icy wastelands north of Ravenland.

forbiddenlands_bookofbeasts.human_name: Forbidden Lands: The Book of Beasts
forbiddenlands_bookofbeasts.description_text: A bestiary you can play. This monster manual for the multiple award-winning Forbidden Lands retro-fantasy survival RPG is beautifully illustrated and filled to the brim with murderous monsters and lethal encounters. The contents also include rules for traps, rare tomes, and alchemy, as well as a system for playing Forbidden Lands solo. It presents at least twenty-eight new monsters in great detail. Each beast comes ready to play with tailored random encounters, presenting the Gamemaster with a handy set of mini-adventures to go.

vaesen_thelostmountainsaga.description_text: The Lost Mountain Saga is an epic campaign of five Mysteries for Vaesen – Nordic Horror Roleplaying. Players can expect to encounter ancient mysteries, old Nordic folk tales, social intrigue, and unspeakable horrors lurking in every shadow as they travel across the North and slowly uncover the truth.

electricstateroleplayinggame.description_text: The Electric State Roleplaying Game is a tabletop RPG based on the art book The Electric State by acclaimed visual artist and author Simon Stålenhag. This is a game about a group of travelers heading out on a journey through a strange America in an alternate 1997. The game is not about the goal but the journey – what the characters experience and how it changes them. This is a game of exploration, but that which is explored is yourself and your friends, and what you are willing to do when the world collapses around you.

vaesen_mythicbritainandireland.description_text: In this expansion to the award-winning Vaesen – Nordic Horror Roleplaying you will find a complete guide to the supernatural British-Irish Isles including the great city of London and the countryside beyond. Mythic Britain & Ireland is written by industry legend Graeme Davis and illustrated by Johan Egerkrans and Anton Vitus.

directrelief.description_text:
Donations to support Direct Relief are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Founded in 1948, Direct Relief is a nonprofit, nonpartisan organization that has become one the world’s largest providers of medical relief in the world. Direct Relief works with healthcare professionals and organizations on the ground, establishing partnerships with local organizations that provide health services to people who would otherwise not receive them. Active in all 50 states and in 70 countries, Direct Relief is the only U.S. nonprofit organization licensed and accredited to distribute prescription medications in all 50 U.S. states.  Among its distinctions, Direct Relief has top charity ratings, including four-star and "top-notch" ratings from Charity Navigator, a 100% fundraising efficiency rating from Forbes magazine, and was recently recognized by Fast Company as one of the Top 10 Most Innovative Nonprofits in the World.

Direct Relief’s ongoing partnerships allow it to respond fast and expansively in times of emergency, including the devastating earthquakes in Nepal, where it has provided over $28 million (wholesale value) in medical aid to date.  This includes supplies for surgeries and treatment of trauma-related injuries, antibiotics, nutritional items, and other critical medical resources.

vaesen_cityofmynightmares.description_text: Did you think you were safe from the vaesen in the crowds and lights of the city? Think again. Unspeakable horrors lurk in the dark alleys, crawl underneath the cobblestone streets, or soar through the twilight skies above. City of My Nightmares is a full-length campaign in four parts in which the characters are invited to the capital to investigate a series of grisly murders, only to become embroiled in a much deeper mystery involving the very origins of the Society itself and threatening to throw the city into utter chaos. City of My Nightmares is set in 19th century Stockholm but can be adapted to London, Prague or any Gothic metropolis of the era.

symbaroum_monstercodex.description_text: The Symbaroum Monster Codex makes the settlements, woods and vales of the Davokar region more dangerous than ever before! More than a hundred creatures, monsters and abominations are crammed together in this eBook – some of them well known, others only mentioned in legends and fairy tales; some unstoppably hungry, others open to negotiations; some presented in detail, others with only short descriptions. Combined with the guidelines on how to create creatures of your own, the content of this bestiary should provide material for hundreds of hours at the gaming table.

dragonbane_bestiary.description_text: From cat people to chimeras, fairies to frog people, hippogriffs to hydras, and much more – this Bestiary for the Dragonbane roleplaying game includes no less than 63 wondrous creatures for the player characters to encounter. Each of them is brought to life in text and art, as well as a random encounter and a seed for a complete adventure. Among these fantastic beings, there are nine new playable kin, each with their own unique ability. Johan Egerkrans and David Brasgalla gloriously illustrate the full-color PDF.

vaesen_seasonsofmystery.description_text: In this module you will find four spine-tingling cases for Vaesen – Nordic Horror Roleplaying. This book contains four standalone mysteries, one for each season of the year.

vaesen_starterset.description_text: This starter set is for Vaesen – Nordic Horror Roleplaying designed as the perfect starting point for roleplaying in the Mythic North, containing everything you need for your game night – including condensed rules for action skill tests, combat, damage, and fear; the complete introductory mystery The Haunting of Castle Gyllencreutz; five pre-generated and illustrated player characters; and several maps and handouts.

twilight_20004theditioncoreset.description_text: A classic roleplaying game returns. This new retro-apocalyptic edition of Twilight: 2000 goes back to the roots of the franchise with open-world roleplaying in the devastation of World War III. Just like the original 1984 edition, this new game is set in a year 2000 devastated by war – now in an alternate timeline where the Soviet Union never collapsed. Twilight: 2000 is a roleplaying game about survival in mankind’s most desperate hour.

twilight2000_urbanoperations.description_text: Urban Operations is a modular expansion focused on cities. The expansion is loosely based on the classic module Free City of Krakow from the first edition of the Twilight: 2000 RPG, but designed to be used in any city environment. The expansion includes guidelines for playing in cities, new factions, new scenario sites, and introduces several plots to create longer story arcs. It includes a scenario book, city maps, scenario site maps, modular battle maps, and new encounter cards for urban environments.

directrelief.description_text:
Donations to support Direct Relief are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Founded in 1948, Direct Relief is a nonprofit, nonpartisan organization that has become one the world’s largest providers of medical relief in the world. Direct Relief works with healthcare professionals and organizations on the ground, establishing partnerships with local organizations that provide health services to people who would otherwise not receive them. Active in all 50 states and in 70 countries, Direct Relief is the only U.S. nonprofit organization licensed and accredited to distribute prescription medications in all 50 U.S. states.  Among its distinctions, Direct Relief has top charity ratings, including four-star and "top-notch" ratings from Charity Navigator, a 100% fundraising efficiency rating from Forbes magazine, and was recently recognized by Fast Company as one of the Top 10 Most Innovative Nonprofits in the World.

Direct Relief’s ongoing partnerships allow it to respond fast and expansively in times of emergency, including the devastating earthquakes in Nepal, where it has provided over $28 million (wholesale value) in medical aid to date.  This includes supplies for surgeries and treatment of trauma-related injuries, antibiotics, nutritional items, and other critical medical resources.

from_bundle.short_marketing_blurb: Fresh TTRPGs by Free League Publishing
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Dragonbane: Core Set, Symbaroum: Core Rulebook, Forbidden Lands: Core Game, Mutant: Year Zero Core Rulebook, Vaesen: Nordic Horror Roleplaying Core Rules, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Ready to spice up your TTRPG collection with the hottest titles from Free League Publishing? Unlock the core set for Dragonbane, an exhilarating classic fantasy game full of magic, mystery, and adventure that offers “mirth and mayhem roleplaying,” aka hearty laughs and brutal challenges. Or brave Mutant: Year Zero, a post-apocalyptic tale of humanity’s crawl back from streets turned graveyards as godlike mutants roam the wasteland. Try these or Vaesen: A Wicked Secret, all for a price you choose, and help support Direct Relief with your purchase.

Codes are redeemable through the DriveThruRPG website.
from_bundle.author: Free League

devilmaycry4specialedition.callout:
88% Positive on Steam

Take control of one of five playable characters in the Special Edition of Devil May Cry 4, the ultimate version of the smash-hit stylish action game! Devil May Cry 4 immerses gamers in a gothic supernatural world, where a new protagonist clashes with a familiar hero. As the new leading man, Nero, players will unleash incredible attacks and non-stop combos using a unique new gameplay mechanic, his powerful 'Devil Bringer' arm.
devilmaycry4specialedition.description_text:
Take control of one of five playable characters in the Special Edition of Devil May Cry 4, the ultimate version of the smash-hit stylish action game!

Devil May Cry 4 immerses gamers in a gothic supernatural world, where a new protagonist clashes with a familiar hero. As the new leading man, Nero, players will unleash incredible attacks and non-stop combos using a unique new gameplay mechanic, his powerful "Devil Bringer" arm.

On the coast of a distant land lies the castle town of Fortuna. It is here that the group known as the Order of the Sword practices a mysterious religion. They revere the demon warrior Sparda, who as their god fought to protect humans, and are committed to the extermination of all demons. Nero, a young knight from the Order, is tasked with finding Dante, the mysterious assassin who murdered the head of the Order of the Sword. At the same time, more demons begin to appear throughout the city. Nero will soon come to discover the motives behind Dante's appearance and the truth behind the intentions of the Order of the Sword.

Features
THREE New Playable Characters
  • Vergil is a strong, yet technical character, so newcomers can play with confidence while seasoned veterans can further sharpen their skills as they master his moves. Great for all skill levels!
  • Lady, in her first playable appearance, specializes in long-distance, powerful attacks. Using the Kalina Ann rocket launcher, a grappling wire, and a variety of awesome guns, she can fight with grace and ease.
  • Trish utilizes the demonic sword Sparda to perform a wide variety of combos. The Sparda can even home in on and attack enemies autonomously while Trish fights in tandem!
Legendary Dark Knight Mode
  • Fight a massive number of enemies simultaneously for extra difficulty and maximum satisfaction!
Refined Gameplay
  • Small adjustments have been made to improve the gameplay tempo, and provide an even better experience for players both new and returning.
Returning Features
  • Signature blend of guns and swordplay
  • Deep combo system rewards stylish dispatching of enemies
  • Distinct set of weaponry and moves for all characters

devilmaycryhdcollection.callout:
93% Positive on Steam

The popular stylish action games Devil May Cry, Devil May Cry 2, and Devil May Cry 3 Special Edition return in one collection! As Dante, the ultimate devil hunter, you'll join forces with appealing characters such as Trish, Lady, and Lucia and enjoy incredible action for the first time in blistering 60fps.
devilmaycryhdcollection.description_text:
The popular stylish action games Devil May Cry, Devil May Cry 2, and Devil May Cry 3 Special Edition return in one collection! As Dante, the ultimate devil hunter, you'll join forces with appealing characters such as Trish, Lady, and Lucia and enjoy incredible action for the first time in blistering 60fps.

Devil May Cry: The first appearance of Dante, the ultimate devil hunter! With the blood of a legendary demon warrior flowing through his veins, Dante takes on the king of the underworld, Mundus.

Devil May Cry 2: Dance with the devil. Set decades after the first game, this sequel adds moves like the wall run and Rain Storm, bringing Dante's action to the next level of stylishness. The bonus mode Bloody Palace also makes its debut.

Devil May Cry 3 Special Edition: This prequel to the first Devil May Cry introduces Vergil, Dante's twin brother. Customize your game style by selecting from various styles to level up and gain new moves and abilities.

devilmaycry5_deluxe.callout:
92% Positive on Steam

The ultimate Devil Hunter is back in style, in the game action fans have been waiting for. Now includes the Playable Character: Vergil downloadable content (also available separately). A brand new entry in the legendary action series, Devil May Cry 5 brings together its signature blend of high-octane action and otherworldly original characters with the latest Capcom gaming technology to deliver a graphically groundbreaking action-adventure masterpiece. (Steam Deck Verified)
devilmaycry5_deluxe.description_text:
The ultimate Devil Hunter is back in style, in the game action fans have been waiting for. Now includes the Playable Character: Vergil downloadable content (also available separately).

A brand new entry in the legendary action series, Devil May Cry 5 brings together its signature blend of high-octane action and otherworldly original characters with the latest Capcom gaming technology to deliver a graphically groundbreaking action-adventure masterpiece.

Please check your previous purchases to avoid duplication.

childrensmiraclenetworkhospitals.description_text:
Payments to Children's Miracle Network Hospitals are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Children's Miracle Network Hospitals raises funds and awareness for 170 member hospitals that provide 32 million treatments each year to kids across the U.S. and Canada. Donations stay local to fund critical treatments and healthcare services, pediatric medical equipment and charitable care. Since 1983, Children's Miracle Network Hospitals has raised more than five billion dollars, most of it one dollar at a time through the charity's Miracle Balloon icon.

dmc_devilmaycry.callout:
93% Positive on Steam

In this retelling of Dante's origin story which is set against a contemporary backdrop, DmC Devil May Cry™ retains the stylish action, fluid combat and self-assured protagonist that have defined the iconic series but inject a more brutal and visceral edge. (Steam Deck Verified)
dmc_devilmaycry.description_text:
In this retelling of Dante's origin story, which is set against a contemporary backdrop, DmC: Devil May Cry™ retains the stylish action, fluid combat, and self-assured protagonist that have defined the iconic series but inject a more brutal and visceral edge. The Dante of DmC is a young man who has no respect for authority or indeed society in general. Dante knows that he is not human, but also that he is not like the demons that have tormented him throughout his life. Caught between worlds, he feels like an outcast. Thanks to his twin brother Vergil, leader of the anti-establishment group called “The Order," Dante is now discovering and coming to terms with what it means to be the child of a demon and an angel. This split personality has a real impact on gameplay with Dante being able to call upon angel and demon abilities at will, transforming his Rebellion sword on the fly to dramatically affect both combat and movement.

For DmC, Capcom has teamed up with UK development studio, Ninja Theory, renown for delivering action titles with compelling characters and narrative coupled with high production values. The combination of Ninja Theory’s expertise and Capcom’s unrivalled heritage in producing combat focused action titles will ensure that this latest addition to the over 11-million selling series will remain true to the Devil May Cry DNA so cherished by the fans, while bringing a new level of cinematic quality to the title.

Features
  • Survive Limbo: The world of Limbo is a living and breathing entity, out to kill Dante. The world will transform in real time and try to block off and even kill our hero. Our protagonist will have to master demonic powers to shape Limbo the way he sees fit, while perfecting his angelic skills to traverse this hazardous, twisted world.
  • Who is Dante? Explore a retelling of Dante’s origin story in a gripping narrative featuring familiar faces from the series alongside all new characters, including Vergil, Dante’s twin brother.
  • Unbridled action: The intense and iconic sword and gun based combat returns with the addition of new Angel and Demon weapons and abilities, all designed to dispatch the demonic spawn back to hell with style and panache. Weapons include:
    • “Rebellion”: Dante’s trusted sword, given by his father Sparda, provides a great mix of combos and attacks, great for sending enemies skyward.
    • “Ebony & Ivory”: These guns are good for keeping enemies at bay, maintaining combos, and juggling enemies in the air.
    • “Arbiter”: a demonic axe that can deliver massive blows and break through enemy shields.
    • “Osiris”: an angelic scythe with fast attacks and great for crowd control.
    • “Eryx”: powerful demonic gauntlets that pack enough punch to parry even the strongest attacks and juggle the heaviest enemies.
  • Retaining the Devil May Cry DNA Capcom staff, including team members from previous Devil May Cry titles, have been assigned to the project from the outset to ensure DmC is a true addition to the Devil May Cry franchise.
  • Unrivalled production values: Ninja Theory will take advantage of the latest performance capture technology to deliver a level of character design, storytelling, and cinematics that perfectly complements DmC’s high-octane combat.

roguevoltage.callout:
92% Positive on Steam

Discover devastating synergies and create overpowered builds.
roguevoltage.description_text:
WIRE UP THE MODULES

Craft your own skills by wiring up modules. Some generate energy, others amplify or store it, and others convert it into effects. Pick from over 150 unique modules to construct crazy machines, discover devastating synergies, and create overpowered builds.

Connect the right modules and watch chaos unfold: Energy cascades through your circuits, triggering satisfying chain reactions. Feel like a mad scientist as you tinker, experiment, and discover new ways to amplify your power.

ZAP THE MONSTERS

Every turn you have to decide where you want to put your energy: Into your blaster module? Do you have to crack a healing potion? Or do you store energy in a battery to prepare an even bigger move next turn?

TURN-BASED WITH a (TIME-)TWIST

Turns can be tactically pushed and pulled forward or backward in time: Dodge volcano eruptions and lightning strikes, slip before your enemies on the timeline or throw them into a devastating Grav-Spike.

ROGUELIKE PROGRESSION

Your adventure leads you through strange biomes where tricky enemies try to ruin your day. Compose your racks wisely to deal with the procedurally generated and progressively dangerous threats.

Between runs, return to your camp to upgrade buildings and unlock permanent progression. Store your favorite modules, expand your collection, and even build your own custom character.

timetomorp.callout:
82% Positive on Steam

Explore, discover new species, grow crops, fish, build relationships with your crew, decorate your perfect home, and automate production along the way!
timetomorp.description_text:
Play with friends in a cozy base-building adventure! Take care of adorable creatures — Morps, explore, discover new species, grow crops, fish, build relationships with your crew, decorate your perfect home, and automate production along the way!


Ultimate Cozy Experience!
1-4 players – Time to Morp is a great solo experience, but it is even more fun with friends!

Take care of Morps – the world is full of cute and unique creatures. They'll help you gather resources or just roll around with you as you explore the vibrant planet.

Fishing, farming, cooking – relaxing and rewarding activities to unwind! Catch fish in serene waters, plant and tend to your crops, harvest rare ingredients, and cook up some mouthwatering dishes!

Automate everything – water and gather resources yourself, or let the machines handle it all, so you can focus on the exciting adventures ahead!

Personal home – build a small or big house, not just for yourself, but for each of your friends. Express yourself by decorating it however you like with over 300 decor items!

Build your own town – build and design the entire city! As you expand, you'll unlock awesome decor to make an island even more unique and truly yours!

Meet your crew – meet different characters in your crew, each with their unique style to help you solve the mystery of the planet.

Explore – explore an island full of activities, unique resources, secrets and biomes!

As an Intern on your first mission, you have an opportunity to prove yourself, befriend the Crew, or discover secrets of this unknown planet! Follow the story to find the source of a SOS signal that brought you here, help creatures in distress, and help a lost soul to rejoin her family.

idlecolony.callout:
82% Positive on Steam

Combine game-changing technologies and special upgrades to find the best synergies and take your cash flow to another dimension.
idlecolony.description_text:
Idle Colony is a game about little creatures and big numbers that will make your dopamine go up and your worries go down.


Merge

Combine two fruits of the same tier into the next one. 1$, 2$, 4$, 8$... This process generates an exponential amount of money as you make your way up to bigger fruits.


Upgrade

Unlock buildings to uncover always more options to leverage your income. As cash comes in, it goes out, to come back even faster! Improve every aspect of your economy to make the best out of it.


Automate

You will start with a sapling that you'll have to manually water and harvest, but soon enough you'll be able to recruit thousands of naïve creatures to assist you in your endeavor. They collect, fertilize, chop down, plant trees, create machines... and they love it!


Prestige

Now that you've got a wok full of delicious fruits and an army of colonists dedicated to you, it is time to perform the ritual... Sacrifice your colony to access powerful technologies and go even further next time!


Synergize

Through your progress, you'll earn two unique currencies to spend with care. Find the best strategies by carefully picking your technologies and special upgrades. Your choices will make the difference between millions and quintillions.

rustysretirement.callout:
97% Positive on Steam

A relaxing idle-farming simulator that sits at the bottom of your screen while you do other things
rustysretirement.description_text:
Rusty's Retirement is an idle-farming simulator designed to sit at the bottom of your screen allowing you to work on other tasks while caring for your farm!

Grow crops:

Plant crops and watch Rusty get to work as he waters, nurtures, and harvests. Unlock new crops as you progress, from crispy carrots to ripe tomatoes.

Produce biofuel:
Use crops to produce clean and energy-efficient biofuel, a vital robot power source. Sell biofuel to other machine inhabitants and reinvest the money into expanding your farm.

Automate with robots:
Deploy a team of cute little robots to assist with planting, watering, and harvesting. Customize and upgrade your helper bots to increase efficiency.

Multitasking:

Rusty's Retirement is built to sit comfortably at the bottom of your screen allowing you to do other tasks while caring for your farm. Zoom in or out for a less distracting view, or alternatively turn on 'Focus Mode' which slows down crop production.

Vertical mode:
You can also create a new vertical farm that sits comfortably at the side of your screen.

Twitch Integration available:
Streamers and viewers can build a farm together. Viewers can control what task their robot should focus on through chat commands like !plant !water !harvest.

farmlink.description_text:
Donations to support Oceana are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The Farmlink Project connects farmers to communities facing food insecurity, delivering millions of pounds of farm fresh produce that would otherwise be wasted to feed families in need.

factorytown.callout:
91% Positive on Steam

Build, automate, and optimize a giant factory on 3D terrain using conveyor belts, trains, chutes, pipes, and airships
factorytown.description_text:
Factory Town is a game about building an automated & efficient town, with interlocking transportation systems, on a large 3D landscape.

Start out with a few workers harvesting trees, crops, and ore. Deliver raw materials to production buildings that will process them into valuable goods for sale at the markets. Then use your earnings to research automated machinery and transport logistics - including conveyor belts, trains, fluid pipes, steam-powered machinery, sorters, splitters, and even various magical gadgets.

- Tons of transportation options at your disposal, to give you creative freedom and flexibility as you try to optimize your supply chains
- Build complex logical systems with gates, triggers, and filters to make sure resources get to the right destination
- Steam Workshop features let you customize rules & even create new items
- Many different categories of products to create & supply
- Use simple click-and-drag actions to directly issue behavior commands to workers, telling them what items to pick up and where to deliver them.
- Unlock magical technology to boost your production buildings to absurd output rates
- Terrain sculpting tools to shape the world to suit your needs.
- Sandbox / Creative Mode / Powerful procedural world generation & map editor tools

mrfarmboy.callout:
83% Positive on Steam

Build your dream farm, grow crops, raise animals, attract villagers, and hire workers to automate everything.
mrfarmboy.description_text:
MR FARMBOY is a colony farming game with automation.

Build your dream farm , grow crops, raise animals, attract villagers, and hire workers to automate everything .

🌱 Grow and Harvest Crops

Plant, water, and harvest a variety of crops on your dream farm.

🐓 Raise Animals

Build Coops to raise chickens, ducks and geese, Barns to raise pigs, sheep, and cows.

🏗️ Build Your Farm

Construct Markets, Houses, Warehouses , Coops, Barns, and more to grow your farming empire.

🛠️ Automate Your Farm

Hire Farmers, Gatherers, and Carriers to fully automate production and logistics.

💰 Sell to Villagers

Attract villagers to your farm and sell your goods to them.

🧘 Relax and Strategize

Enjoy the atmosphere while optimizing your farm’s automation.

farmlink.description_text:

The Farmlink Project connects farmers to communities facing food insecurity, delivering millions of pounds of farm fresh produce that would otherwise be wasted to feed families in need.

emediapianofordummieslevel1windownload.description_text: eMedia Piano For Dummies lets you learn piano at your own pace the fun way! Learn piano at home with piano lessons software that combines the For Dummies attitude with eMedia Interactive Feedback technology to help you learn faster. Play easy piano songs in a multitude of styles ranging from Billy Joel’s “Piano Man” to Bach’s “Minuet in G,” to keep you interested. eMedia’s learn to play piano software helps you learn piano basics with over 150 easy piano lessons by Irma Irene Justicia, M.A., who taught at the renowned Juilliard School of Music. Learn piano today with this critically-acclaimed, beginner piano lesson tutorial.

emediaguitarfordummieslevel2windownload.description_text: eMedia Guitar For Dummies covered how to play the guitar with basic guitar chords and strumming patterns. Now eMedia Guitar For Dummies Level 2 elevates your playing with over 90 complete guitar lessons by Kevin Garry, Ph.D., University of Colorado-Boulder, award-winning guitarist and music professor. You’ll get guitar lessons that cover how to read guitar tabs and guitar notes, plus lessons on fingerpicking and other guitar techniques. Interactive Feedback technology in the guitar software makes learning faster. Plus you’re free to jump between any of the included guitar lessons that interest you the most. Hit songs by artists like Heart and The Animals keep practicing fun. This method is great for both acoustic and electric guitar. Want to play guitar better? Then “level up” to eMedia Guitar For Dummies Level 2 and get started today.

emediarockguitarfordummieswindownload.description_text: Now get the great combination of For Dummies fun plus eMedia’s Interactive Feedback technology to make rock guitar lessons easy and enjoyable. Charles McCrone, a graduate of Guitar Institute of Technology at Musician’s Institute, provides over 70 guitar lessons on how to play electric guitar covering power chords, bar chords (barre chords), rock guitar riffs, and more. eMedia Rock Guitar For Dummies teaches basic lead guitar lessons with the blues scale, how to read guitar tabs, plus the use of effects pedals. Included are classic rock guitar songs by The Kinks, Green Day, Blue Öyster Cult, Nirvana and others to make guitar practice fun while you dig into learning rock, punk, and metal guitar styles.

emediasingingfordummieslevel2windownload.description_text: eMedia Singing For Dummies showed you all the basics of singing in tune and proper technique. eMedia Singing For Dummies Level 2 builds on that foundation with over 90 additional singing lessons created by professional voice instructor, Ory Brown, M.M.. Learn how to sing better with lessons that teach you how to enunciate lyrics, improve your singing tone and ability to sustain long tones, and how to sing more expressively.

emediaguitarfordummieslevel1windownload.description_text: eMedia Guitar For Dummies provides beginner guitar lessons with a fun attitude and at a great price. Lessons include how to tune a guitar, play basic guitar chords, power chords, strumming patterns, and more to provide a solid understanding of guitar basics. Over 80 guitar lessons show you how to play guitar quickly and easily with courses created by award-winning guitarist and music professor Kevin Garry, Ph.D., University of Colorado-Boulder. Learn how to play guitar at your own pace using guitar songs including popular hits like Bob Dylan’s “Knockin’ on Heaven’s Door” and “Rockin’ Me” by Steve Miller. Start with easy guitar chords and easy guitar songs or click directly to any of the other guitar lessons.

emediapianofordummieslevel2windownload.description_text: eMedia Piano For Dummies Level 2 expands on the piano lessons learned in the original eMedia Piano For Dummies piano tutorial and helps you play the piano with confidence. Irma Irene Justicia, M.A., a piano instructor who has taught at the renowned Juilliard School of Music; takes you through 150 lessons that extend keyboard hand positions beyond middle C, introduce new piano chords and piano scales, and teach new piano techniques. eMedia Interactive Feedback, not found in video-only courses, makes learning easier so you learn piano faster. Great piano songs and classical pieces are included to expand your repertoire and keep learning fun. Want to play piano better? Then “level up” to eMedia Piano For Dummies Level 2 and get started today.

emediamyelectricguitarwindownload.description_text: Now kids can learn how to play electric guitar the fun and easy way. eMedia My Electric Guitar features Rocky the Guitar, an animated character who leads children through a selection of beginner guitar lessons for kids. It was designed by Charles McCrone, a graduate of the renowned Guitar Institute of Technology at Musician’s Institute. Over 60 guitar lessons cover power chords, riffs, how to read guitar tabs, and more. Kids even get a taste of simple lead guitar as they learn how to play the blues scale. eMedia’s Animated Fretboard shows children where to place their fingers, so they learn faster. Interactive Feedback listens to them with the computer’s microphone to let them easily see if they are playing the correct notes in melodies and riffs. These beginner lessons include fun, interactive music games for kids to keep them engaged and learning.

worldwildlifefund.description_text:
Payments to the World Wildlife Fund are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

WWF is one of the world’s largest and most experienced independent conservation organizations, with over 5 million supporters and a global network active in more than 100 countries.

WWF’s mission is to stop the degradation of the planet’s natural environment and to build a future in which humans live in harmony with nature, by conserving the world’s biological diversity, ensuring that the use of renewable natural resources is sustainable, and promoting the reduction of pollution and wasteful consumption.

The WWF name and logo are used with its permission, which in no way constitutes an endorsement, express or implied, of any product, service, company, opinion or political position. The WWF name and logo is a registered trademark owned by WWF. For more information about WWF, please visit www.wwf.org

emediamypianowindownload.description_text: The award-winning eMedia My Piano software was designed as a complete, engaging course of over 100 piano lessons for kids. Irma Irene Justicia, M.A., who has taught at the renowned Juilliard School of Music, and animated character Pam the Piano teach music basics including rhythm, how to read piano sheet music, and how to play popular, easy piano songs. Learning how to play piano helps encourage a child’s self-discipline, confidence, and creativity. In fact, research proves that children who play music make friends more easily and excel at their schoolwork.

emediaukulelemethodwindownload.description_text: eMedia Ukulele Method software delivers over 160 interactive ukulele lessons that teach you how to play ukulele in G-C-E-A tuning and let you learn at your own pace. Over 70 high-definition, instructional videos demonstrate important ukulele techniques, and over 45 popular songs let you apply what you learn. Songs feature band accompaniment tracks that make practice fun, while MIDI tracks and looped playback let you slow down tracks and work on difficult sections.

emediabassmethodwindownload.description_text: The best-selling eMedia Bass Method features bass guitar lessons for beginners from noted bassist and teacher John Arbo. This course is complete bass guitar instruction that runs on your computer with interactive technology to make understanding the lessons easier. You can even get eMedia Instant Feedback as you play your first, easy bass guitar songs and exercises.

emediaintermediatepianoandkeyboardmethod.description_text: Vadim Ghin, M.M., who has taught at the renowned Juilliard School of Music, delivers over 150 intermediate-to-advanced piano lessons designed to help you improve piano technique, understand music theory, learn how to play blues piano, and get started with piano improvisation. Interactive Feedback technology makes this piano tutorial easy to understand, and you can click immediately to any of the piano lessons so you learn at your own pace.

emediamyguitarwindownload.description_text: The award-winning eMedia My Guitar is a complete course of over 60 guitar lessons for kids designed by professional guitarist and teacher Kevin Garry, Ph.D. It features Gary the Guitar, an animated character that teaches children how to tune the guitar, play easy guitar chords, read guitar TABs (guitar tablature, a popular guitar notation) and play easy kids’ guitar songs such as “Jingle Bells,” “Yankee Doodle,” and many more. Research has shown that children who play music do better in school and make friends more easily. Learning how to play guitar helps develop a child’s creativity, self-discipline, and confidence.

emediasingingfordummieslevel1windownload.description_text: eMedia Singing For Dummies is the fun and easy way to learn how to sing, or how to sing better. Professional singer and voice teacher Ory Brown, M.M., guides you through over 80 easy-to-understand voice lessons. Her over 25 years of teaching and performance experience includes appearances at Carnegie Hall, Lincoln Center, and on the Late Show with David Letterman. The voice lessons included in eMedia Singing For Dummies teach you how to sing in tune, use proper singing techniques, and how to develop and project your voice.

emediamyviolinwindownload.description_text: The award-winning eMedia My Violin provides over 160 violin lessons for kids or anyone young at heart! It features animated character Val the Violin and instruction from professional violinist Sabina Skalar, M.M., who has played with the New York City Ballet. My Violin teaches children how to play violin with proper fingering and bowing technique; plus, they'll learn the basics of music, including how to read music notation and play easy violin songs. Violin lessons can help encourage a child’s confidence, self-discipline, and creativity.

preventcancerfoundation.description_text:
Donations to support the Prevent Cancer Foundation are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Founded in 1985, the Prevent Cancer Foundation has been a leader in cancer prevention and early detection.  As the only nonprofit in the United States solely focused on cancer prevention and early detection, the Foundation has been referred to as "the candle that ignited a bonfire" in the field of prevention.  Investing more than $138 million over the past 29 years, the Prevent Cancer Foundation has always focused its resources on cancers that can be prevented through healthy lifestyle choices or early detection.

Each year, more than 1.6 million Americans are diagnosed with cancer and more than 500,000 will die from the disease.  However, research shows that up to 60 percent of cancer cases and more than 50 percent of cancer deaths are preventable - with the knowledge we have today.
The Foundation has spent the last three decades working for:
  • Reducing the cancer mortality rate by focusing on individual behaviors, engaging in public policy discussions and funding on prevention and early detection research.
  • Raising awareness of all preventable cancers across all populations.
  • Making prevention knowledge and early detection services more accessible for people in medically underserved communities.
  • Collaborating with partners to maximize the effectiveness and reach of the prevention and early detection programs and message.
