basic_data.human_name: Humble RPG Bundle: Lost Lands Adventure for 5th Edition by Frog God Games
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: Can you survive the Lost Lands? Gather your friends and roll the dice, because it’s time to journey into the Lost Lands! We’ve teamed up with Frog God Games for this massive TTRPG bundle chock-full of resources to plan your next campaign. Explore the winding streets of Bard’s Gate, a citadel of artisans and politicians whose people are menaced by dark forces within and without. Use the Tome of Artifacts to scatter magical weapons and relics throughout the land for your players to find. Find a starting point for your adventure with expanded description manuals like Rappan Athuk: Adventures in Zelkor’s Ferry. You can even score a physical copy of The World of the Lost Lands, the definitive guide to the entire setting, full of information on its locations, peoples, and historical data! Endless adventure awaits you in this bundle of nearly 80 TTRPG ebooks, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: Can you survive the Lost Lands?
basic_data.description:
Can you survive the Lost Lands? Gather your friends and roll the dice, because it’s time to journey into the Lost Lands! We’ve teamed up with Frog God Games for this massive TTRPG bundle chock-full of resources to plan your next campaign. Explore the winding streets of Bard’s Gate, a citadel of artisans and politicians whose people are menaced by dark forces within and without. Use the Tome of Artifacts to scatter magical weapons and relics throughout the land for your players to find. Find a starting point for your adventure with expanded description manuals like Rappan Athuk: Adventures in Zelkor’s Ferry. You can even score a physical copy of The World of the Lost Lands, the definitive guide to the entire setting! Endless adventure awaits you in this bundle of nearly 80 TTRPG ebooks, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the ebooks in this bundle is as much as $1,160. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase.

Read them anywhere. The ebooks in this bundle are available in PDF and Zip formats, so they work on your computer, e-readers, iPads, cell phones, and a wide array of mobile devices! Instructions and a list of recommended reading programs can be found here.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publisher and to support Doctors Without Borders. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

deathshipoftheroachprincess5e.human_name: Death Ship of the Roach Princess (5e)
deathshipoftheroachprincess5e.description_text: A strange ship has docked in the city, bristling the river quarterís folk with fear. The demonic source within it seeks more ìhelpî. The Shifting Fortune beckons to adventure-seekers and the unwary. Can heroes be found to investigate ó and can they escape? Death-Ship of the Roach Princess features: A creepy ship with 15 encounter areas An appendix of handouts for the referee to assist players in becoming immersed in the adventure. Two new monsters and a new hazard! A quasi-deity An unexpected artifact of evil

bardsgatetheriotact5e.description_text: The Riot Act is an urban adventure for four characters, averaging 2nd level, set in the city of Bardís Gate. It highlights several of the cityís locations, especially those in the Bridge district. A mixture of encounters includes roleplaying, investigation, dungeon crawling, stealth, and combat. The adventure does not require any specific classes or races, though bards and rogues may be useful given the nature of their special abilities. It is assumed that the PCs are sympathetic to the Lyreguard or other agencies that serve the interests of Bardís Gate ó or at the very least that their loyalty can be purchased for a few gold coins.

onelastthing5e.description_text: A friend has passed to the great beyond, and a funeral has lain him to his final rest. Something, however, seems hollow and different about the affair. There is unfinished business, and everyone knows it ó yet nobody knows just what it is that everyone seems to have forgotten. It feels almost that the dearly departed has some other task ó some incomplete goal ó that must be achieved before it can move on. Something damning has trapped them in the Underworld, and only through the deeds of their closest friends may a final and lasting rest be achieved. One Last Thing is an adventure designed for characters of 7thñ10th level that takes place in a familiar town setting but eventually leads to the edges of Styx and the entrance to the Underworld itself. The characters explore the plains of the dead on their way to the forbidden Necropolis of Ankev, and in the city of corpses, they face demons, devils, and dreaded liches while they track down the spirit of the dearly departed ... to discover the crucial one last thing.

questsofdoom4awakenings5e.description_text: Awakenings by Steve Winter (for 3 to 5 characters from 1st to 3rd level) Strange things occur after a meteor streaks overhead in the night sky. Combining elements of a fairy tale with elements of cosmic horror, the characters will confront a community of these evolved animals with evil plans that involve finding the fallen star and confronting an unknown entity.

islandofsorrow5e.description_text: Island of Sorrow is an adventure for characters levels 3-5 that takes them on a journey across the sea to rescue the lost scion of a wealthy merchant family. Tavin Lar hoped to reclaim his familyís faltering fortunes by discovering the mythical Island of Sorrows. Well, he found it, but is shipwrecked and canít get back home. Sending a magical message with his last scroll, the rescue mission is under way but can our heroes survive long enough to find the mythical island, much less locate Tavin Lar and bring him home? In Island of Sorrow you fill find: ~A complete hex crawl adventure across the mythical island and other landmasses in its chain of savage islands. ~Rules for ship travel, operation, and adventure. ~New monsters ready to tackle any maritime adventure.

blightofthemoonglowglade5e.description_text: Frog God Games' official Arbor Day adventure! Blight of the Moonglow Glade is an adventure designed for four to six Tier One characters (5e) or four to six Level 2-3 characters (Pathfinder or Swords & Wizardry), ideally with at least one druid in the party. It began after a star fell from the heavens. A blight now ravages Namjan Forest, killing everything it touches. If it cannot be stopped, the forest will soon fall to the molding blight, and then the world. In Blight of the Moonglow Glade, the adventurers discover a gray blight infecting the nearby woods. It is unlike anything they have ever confronted before. It leaves its blighted mark on the lands and the souls of those who commune with nature. It is up to the adventurers to discover the source of the blight and destroy it. Only then can the forest be saved.

thelostcityofbarakusplayersguidesn.human_name: The Lost City of Barakus-Player's Guide (SN)
thelostcityofbarakusplayersguidesn.description_text: This guide serves as an introduction to The Lost City of Barakus adventure. It covers Endhome, the nearby city to the lost city, with helpful resources such as a map for visitors, a gazetteer of the various regions in town, a directory of shops, a list of important individuals, and a collection of popular knowledge and rumors. 18 pages.

orcusinawinterwonderland5e.description_text: Something strange is happening at the warm and cozy Sunnyslope Inn: Winter has arrived early ... several months early! The ground is thick with snow, clouds hide the sun, and Winterís deadly grip is closing by the minute. Whatís an adventurer to do? It's another Yule-themed scheme by Orcusí Claws, of course, and itís up to our intrepid heroes to solve the riddle of the untimely winter before they ó and everyone at the inn ó are frozen solid. As the cold and danger grow, the party must face Orcusí Claws' icy minions, including the diabolical Crueltide elves who sing jolly carols of mayhem and whose tasty candy canes are stained blood red! Even after the chilly adventurers literally face the murderous claws of Winter, they still find themselves on Orcusí Claws' naughty list, and heís ready to leave coal in all their stockings. So pass out the cookies, serve up some piping hot cocoa, and get ready to once more face the wrath of Orcusí Claws in this lighthearted, holiday-themed adventure for a party of Tier 2 characters!

questsofdoom4inthetimeofshardfall5e.human_name: Quests of Doom 4 In the Time of Shardfall (5e)
questsofdoom4inthetimeofshardfall5e.description_text: In the Time of Shardfall by Michael Curtis (for 4 to 6 characters of 5th to 6th level) In this open ìseek and destroyî adventure, a relic from the prehistoric past ó a mystical prison containing a powerful proto-dragon and other creatures from long ago ó has been flung forward in time to arrive at the charactersí current era. The prison, an enchanted pane of obsidian called the Akaata, fractures upon arrival, breaking into several shards that fall to the land below. Soon, the prehistoric menaces trapped within wander out of their broken prison to threaten the realm. The characters must search for the five shards and destroy them and their former prisoners, then confront the now-free proto-dragon before it recovers its full strength.

lostlands_theblight5e.description_text: Two books in one, The Blight: Richard Pettís Crooked City is everything you need for a campaign set in Castorhage, the city known to most simply as "The Blight." Set in the Lost Lands campaign setting, this book consists of The Blight Campaign Guide ó which includes the CyclopÊdia Infestarum, a huge collection of new monsters, NPCs, and other resources for the setting ó as well as a ten-chapter gazetteer to the cityís districts. It also includes the Levee Adventure, a nine-part series of adventures that introduces your players to their first taste of the Blight and its rotten and degenerate urban confines. Warning! This product contains materials that may not be suitable for all audiences. It is recommended for use by individuals aged 13 and older.

questsofdoom4warofshadows5e.human_name: Quests of Doom 4 War of Shadows (5e)
questsofdoom4warofshadows5e.description_text: War of Shadows by Tom Knauss (for 4 to 6 characters of 8th level) This adventure can pick up where Between a Rock and a Charred Place left off or stand on its own. Erod Flan weathered the dark folkís storm, yet the conspirators are not done. Their focus now turns to the critical outpost of Tyr Whin. The characters and the outnumbered defenders must somehow stop the hobgoblin warlord, Grugdour, and his army from overrunning the citadel and opening a beachhead for invasion into the Stoneheart Mountains.

theworldofthelostlands.human_name: The World of The Lost Lands (SN) - Physical Book
theworldofthelostlands.description_text:
ESTIMATED SHIPPING COSTS

Limited to 400 copies.
Shipping within the USA approximately $15.
Shipping overseas approximately $50-$90 depending on country.

The Lost Lands

… the campaign world of Necromancer Games and Frog God Games for almost 50 years …

… home to locations now legendary in the annals of roleplaying, from the depths of the massive dungeons of Rappan Athuk, to the city of Bard’s Gate, the Desolation of Tsar, the Blight, the demon-tainted Sundered Lands, the chaotic tumult of the Borderland Provinces, and the fabled Northlands.

Between these covers is the definitive guide to the world of the Lost Lands. Herein you will find a description of the lands and seas and the skies above, the people who populate the world, an overview of its history, a summary of its religions, and an enormous gazetteer with thousands of entries. Here can be found the locations of your favorite adventures, all set into the historical and physical context of the entire world, alongside new lands that have never before been revealed.

Welcome to the Lost Lands. A lifetime of adventures awaits!

shepherdsbane5e.description_text: A werewolf roams the foggy reaches of Sterling Moor and the village of Harroch is at its mercy. Tonight is the night of the full moon. Can you protect the people of Harroch from the monsterís wrath? Or will you too succumb to the teeth and claws of the Shepherdís Bane? Shepherdís Bane is a freeform adventure that is centered around the village of Harroch, which lies in the bleak hills and bogs of Sterling Moor. Dark forces beset the town. The trouble started with the arrival of a group of wandering entertainers known as the CalatorÈ, one of whom was a werewolf. A fight occurred and the werewolf was driven off, but not before it infected the village priest and many of the villagers with its disease. The villageís women and children know that something is wrong with their sons and husbands, but they believe they are just overwhelmed by the search for the werewolf that still prowls the moors. Shepherdís Bane, an adventure for characters of levels 1st to 3rd, takes our heroes from the fog-shrouded Sterling Moor into the village of Harroch as they face off against a danger that stalks the night and takes the unwary or unlucky. That there is a werewolf on the hunt is obvious, but who is the fiend? Is it the desolate warden Bostwick? Traveling teller of fortunes Katya? Perhaps the wolf hunter Smythe? It could be you. It could be me. Whoever it is they must be stopped, and Father Wilhelm has a plan, a plan that involves a tall wooden stake and a lit torch.

questsofdoom4nightstonekeep5e.description_text: Nightstone Keep by Ed Greenwood (for 4 to 6 characters from 4th and 6th level) This location-based adventure is centered on a ruined, long-disused stone keep in a temperate wild forest area (possibly not far off a caravan road or forest trail). The characters will be able to explore the ruins of the keep, which have become a plant colony, and attempt to wrest a powerful treasure from the clutches of the araunglyd, a gigantic sentient fungus. The araunglyd will attempt to thwart the players at every turn, using its drone-like minions to harass and hinder them as they go.

bardsgate_personalitiesandprofiles5e.description_text: Bring Any Fantasy City to Life! This supplement for your dark urban fantasy campaign includes more than 300 fully-statted NPCS, including politicians, thieves, knights, shop owners, clerics, thugs, and sewer-dwelling creatures ... everything and more to populate your world! This invaluable volume can help fill cities and urban environments in any fantasy setting in no time. Need a bunch of NPCs quick? Just drop these characters into your game and go. You can use this book on its own or to expand on information found in Bardís Gate 5e (but that city accessory from Frog God Games is not required to use this book).

questsofdoom4thehuntersgame5e.human_name: Quests of Doom 4 The Hunter's Game (5e)
questsofdoom4thehuntersgame5e.description_text: The Hunterís Game by Tom Knauss (for 4 to 6 characters of 4th level) This adventure will find the characters traveling into the foreboding Dyrgalas Fens, a temperate swamp in the Harwood Forest nestled between the Wolf Hills and Low Hills. Dyrgalas Fens is overrun by an eclectic collection of malevolent monsters, xenophobic humanoids, and foul beasts. When some of the regionís finest gentlemen and ladies never return from their excursions to the Answin Hunting Lodge, the characters must investigate their mysterious disappearances. The journey leads them into the figurative heart of darkness, taking them not only deeper into the dreadful Dyrgalas, but also plunging them into the harrowing abyss of hatred and greed.

lostlands_tehuatl.description_text: Born of blood and treachery, the island of Tehuatl is all that remains of a once-mighty empire that dominated an entire continent. Inspired by the history and legends of Mesoamerica, this new addition to the World of the Lost Lands introduces you and your players to a land and a people reborn from a devastating cataclysm who persevered and created their own legacy built upon stone, wood, and flesh. This system-neutral campaign hardcover sourcebook is a guide and gazetteer to Tehuatl's history, people, religions, geography, and communities.

lostcrypt5e.description_text: Written by veteran RPG scholar and scribe Bill Silvey, The Lost Crypt is an old-school style romp through an ancient tomb and hidden lairs filled with clever monsters. This is the Bill-created portion of a joint project with Gary Gygax, designed to be a challenge for veteran characters of 7-8th level. A realm not terribly unlike our own exists in a strange and mostly-hospitable nearby plane of existence. While planar travel might overlook this small pocket of reality, an entrance into it exists at the deepest depths of the most storied dungeon complex in the known world. To enter this planar region is to step into a world at once familiar and yet more bizarre than our own. Herein there are rumored to lie artifacts of great power, and treasure beyond imagination. Having explored the uttermost depths of the dungeon and found the entrance, a group of adventurers can make their way beyond the boundaries of reality itself in search of fame and fortune!

adventuresintheborderlandprovinces5e.description_text: Adventures in the Borderland Provinces contains seven brand new, stand-alone adventures for use in any world setting, or in the Lost Lands campaign setting of Frog God Games. From the ghostly terrors of Ectarlinís Last Ride to the fey-filled journey of Illusion and Illumination, these adventures provide you with a wide variety of challenges to puzzle and threaten your characters. Nothing is as it seems, and dangers lie around every corner. Authors include Ari Marmell, Eytan Bernstein, Scott Fitzgerald Gray, Gwendolyn Kestrel, Rhiannon Louve, Anthony Pryor, and C.A. Suleiman.

deadmanschest20195e.description_text: No place offers more adventure than the ocean. No dungeon is as deep, no jungle as full of exotic and dangerous life. Most folks spend their entire lives on dry ground, unaware that entire civilizations thrive beneath the waves, sometimes far more ancient and steeped in mystery than any on the world's uppers surface. Though player characters have long grown familiar with the air-breathing world above, seldom do they venture into the depths, and when they do, they discover wonders they never dreamed existed. The ocean offers a venue for adventure that is at once alien and appealing. Strange things exist down there, as perilous as they are compelling.

heartofstbathusvttassetpack.human_name: Heart of St. Bathus VTT Asset Pack
heartofstbathusvttassetpack.description_text: With these Virtual Tabletop maps and tokens from the adventure, Heart of St. Bathus, every Game Master can bring their campaign to life! (Alternately, VTT maps and tokens may be used for any adventure or campaign.)

bydawnsearlylight5e.description_text: It is midsummer, and the remote mountain village of Ilgaardd is preparing to throw an epic celebration to honor the anniversary of its independence from the tyrannical rule of Killoran the Red. While most of the villagers are happy with the new leadership and are excited about the prospect of hosting a major event, droves of raucous outsiders, bitter loyalists, and an unprecedented heat wave are causing tensions to mount.  You have been hired by the local sheriff to keep the peace. To do your job, you will have to contend with rowdy villagers at each otherís throats and a towering force on the cusp of raising its haunted form high above the Village Green! Inspired by (dangerous!) early American traditions of lighting bonfires to celebrate Independence Day, the characters are the only hope that Illgaardd will remain standing by dawnís early light. The characters are hired by Jax Blueskin, chief constable of the remote village of Ilgaardd, to keep the peace during the villageís Independence Day celebration. The characters must contend with increasingly rowdy villagers only to discover a nefarious plot devised by Killoran the Red, the villageís presumed-to-be-dead former ruler. If not stopped, this plot will unleash a force so terrible that the village ó and possibly the region ó may be utterly destroyed. By Dawnís Early Light is a short adventure for 4ñ6 low-level characters.

virtualtabletoppack14aparadeofhorriblesv.human_name: Virtual Tabletop Pack #14 A Parade of Horribles (VTT)
virtualtabletoppack14aparadeofhorriblesv.description_text: This set contains the horrid nígathau and various other disgusting creatures of nightmare, including: Cat, Undead Feral Nígathau, Aagash The Broken Nígathau, Asagin The Assassin Nígathau, Grexias The Destroyer Nígathau, Modar The Huntress Nígathau, Rauuka The Ravager Nígathau, Soul Hammer Nígathau, Veenes The Blademistress Nígathau, Veruard The Creator Nígathau, Warrior Olithagorian Skeleton Warrior Swarm Of Undead Bats Swarm Of Undead Hummingbirds Swarm Of Undead Rats Zombie, Aqueous Zombie, Bramble Zombie, Carcharodon Zombie, Goblin Zombie, Gug Zombie, Juju Zombie, Mummy Zombie, Ogyugh Zombie, Poisonous Snake Zombie, Sphinx

bardsgate5e.description_text: Bardís Gate serves as a cornerstone for The Lost Lands, a fully developed fantasy city that can be used in any campaign. Within is a wide range of businesses and shops, churches and temples, homes, taverns, inns, and other locations are described in detail, ready-made for your ease of use. Bardís Gate is filled with unique NPCs, from the most influential leaders and wealthiest merchants on high to the lowest beggar living in the gutter.

twelvedaysoforcus5e.description_text: Tis the Season for Orcus! On the Twelfth Day of Orcus, the heroes must clear the decidedly foul corruption plaguing the withering Yule Tree! Party Size: 4-6 Player Characters Party Level: Tier 2 Play Emphasis: 30% Combat/35% Social/30% Exploration/5% Traps GM Preparation: Low Difficulty to Run: Easy Play Time: 4-8 hours

mithralrattlesnakesandcaskofdwarvenwhisk.human_name: Mithral, Rattlesnakes & Cask of Dwarven Whiskey (5e)
mithralrattlesnakesandcaskofdwarvenwhisk.description_text: The mad wizard Travalaz of Carterscroft has assembled a list of ingredients he needs to fashion powerful magic. Towards that end, he is sending out word throughout Eastreach Province that good gold is available for those who are willing to undertake gathering these needed materials for his arcane research. Journey across the Lost Lands' Borderlands Provinces on a scavenger hunt for dangerous unrefined mithral, live giant rattlesnakes, and a truly amazing quantity of dwarven whiskey. Finding this shopping list is only the first part of the adventure, you will have to acquire it and then transport it back! Dare you take on the task in this adventure for 2-6 characters of Tier 2? Can you save the village of Estan from mithral mutants? Will the salvagers of Wrecker's Cove give up the whiskey so easily? Capturing a live giant rattlesnake will be hard, but three of them ó and they need to be alive when they are delivered? This is the work of heroes! Honestly, is the money worth all of this trouble? Only one way to find out, so load up that wagon with Mithral, Rattlesnakes, and a Cask of Dwarven Whiskey!

horrorsunboundstankhog5e.description_text: Frog God Gamesí Horrors Unbound series are in-depth looks at the fantastic creatures. More than just stat blocks and bonuses, the Horrors Unbound provide details like special skills, behavioral oddities, collectible parts and observations not found in bestiaries. Also includes adventure hooks, folklore and other details to make the encounter with each creature exciting and memorable. Excerpt from Swyfteís Physiologus, a collection of ecologies of wondrous beasts, monstrosities, and horrors.

devilofmurdercliffs5e.description_text: An adventure written by Casey Christofferson for 4ñ6 characters of levels 3ñ5, though it can easily be scaled for lower- or higher-level adventurers. The adventure assumes at least one wizard, one cleric, and one rogue are in the party, though there is a fair amount of opportunity for other character classes, especially meat shields and sword swingers, to shine.

tomeofspellmastery5e.description_text: The 5e Tome of Spell Mastery: Over 400+ spells, 25+ spellcaster subclasses, and a multitude of tools to customize your world of magic! "Magic is an essential part of most fantasy roleplaying games, for it comprises much of the 'fantasy' of the title. In these games, magic is as vital and fundamental as swords, elves, treasure, and dragons. Yet magic is an ever-changing force, and every campaign has the potential to create its own magical forces, powers, and plots." The Tome of Spell Mastery provides tools to tailor the forces of magic to your campaign to keep characters on their toes: the cartomancer (new spellcasting class), new schools of wizardry (demonologist, shadow caster, and more, plus a new take on the traditional necromancer), cleric domains, new materials for bards, druids, and warlocks; and more than 400 new spells (for all classes, levels, and monsters).

questsofdoom4thecoveredbridge5e.human_name: Quests of Doom 4 The Covered Bridge (5e)
questsofdoom4thecoveredbridge5e.description_text: The Covered Bridge by Kevin Wright (for 4 to 6 characters of 4th to 6th level) Are the characters up to the challenge of solving the centuries-old murder of a historic hero? Within the adventure, the characters are caught up in the haunted memories of the ghostly knight and help him to accomplish his heroic deeds. While doing so, the party becomes familiar with his world and the murder suspects, picking up clues to their motivations and actions along the way. At the end of the adventure, an enraged spirit confronts the characters and demands that they name his killer. If they can do it, they are richly rewarded; both in treasure and the knowledge that they let a good man finally find rest. If they fail, they must face the chilling wrath of the deathless phantom.

thewizardsamulet5e.description_text: The Wizardís Amulet is a short, introductory adventure for six newly created good-aligned 1st-level characters. The adventure revolves around Corian, a fledgling Sorcerer. While an apprentice, Corian discovered a letter written by a wizard named Eralion, who it is said some years ago attempted to become a lichóand failed. Accompanying the letter was a mysterious amulet with strange markings. Joined by newfound companions, Corian set off in search of Eralionís keep and his supposedly unguarded treasure. But Corian is not alone in desiring to unlock the mystery of Eralionís fate. Darker, more evil forces have designs on the secrets reputedly hidden with Eralion ó forces willing to stop at nothing to obtainÖ The Wizardís Amulet.

bloodlagoon5e.description_text: Beset at sea! Curse-infected pirates strike at the heroes from their caravel, lusting for the blood and valuables of their victims on the waves ó desiring to spread their calamity abroad. Will the beleaguered adventurers repel the attack and root out the source of demonic piracy in these waters? Curse of Blood Lagoon features: Sailing, broadsides, and boarding parties Cursed pirates! Several hooks to help referees bring their player characters to the adventure ìThe Isle of the Sea Godís Lamentî, to which any island in The Lost Lands (or in your campaign) can play host Zombie pirates! A variety of monsters and a curse to avoid Rum! Refugees to rescue Crazy fruit!

grandduchyofremefiftheditionsourcebook5e.human_name: Grand Duchy of Reme Fifth Edition Sourcebook (5e)
grandduchyofremefiftheditionsourcebook5e.description_text: These reference books provide easy access to the Reme Region's reference stats and general descriptions in 5th Edition. Additionally, they supply detailed encounter tables to enhance the main system-neutral region book. With these convenient tools, you can have both your reference stats and general description open simultaneously. The stats included in these resources are not found in the main book.

templeofdagon5e.description_text: A notorious treasure hunter seeks like-minded adventurers to assist him in acquiring valuables from a recently discovered ruined temple in the middle of the sea. The ancients of Atrotiri were said to have incredible knowledge, power, artifacts, magic, and more Ö before the sea swallowed their civilization. It was said they made pacts with evil beings and reaped tremendous rewards, now lost to history. Can your heroes retrieve the lost treasures ó or will they and their belongings add to a future archaeologistís find? Temple of Dagon features: An adventure on the salty sea with Atlantean-styled mysteries and history 25 encounter areas in sunken ruins, an observatory, and the Temple of Dagon. 4 new mundane and magic items Two useful handouts

mysteryatravenrock5e.description_text: An investigation leads to dangerous places beneath the once-friendly castle Ravenrock. Unknown to all, a horror has festered. Defeating the menace that is responsible will neither be easy nor straightforward. Mystery at Ravenrock is an adventure for Fifth Edition, Swords & Wizardry, and Pathfinder designed for 4th to 7th level (Tier 2 in 5e) characters. It is the self-contained second act of the story begun in Frog God Games' Menace in Ravenreach.

tomeofartifacts5e.description_text: Artifacts are some of the most powerful items in the game, able to change the course of the world ... and the lives of the heroes who would dare use them. Will your heroes do the right thing? Or will they fall to the siren song of temptation? Necromancer Games is proud to present this collection of 34 unique artifacts to add to your campaign, complete with tales of their creation, their powers, adventure seeds, how to find them, and of course, how to destroy them. Inside, youíll find: The Altar of the Bone Citadel The Bow of Night Ghost Reaver Orb of the Wight Shaígahrís Bones The World Tree The Tome of Artifacts (5E) is a love letter to everything artifacts should be: storied, strange, game-defining magical relics that transcend utility and become central pillars of worldbuilding and player character arcs. These are not just weapons and wonders ó they are the stuff of myth.

seagodscurse5e.description_text: Tavin Yar, the scholarly merchant prince our heroes rescued in Island of Sorrow, has become wealthy off trade with the eponymous island. He has a new obsession: collecting the panoply of the blue, a set of relics sacred to Quell, god of sea and storms. But this is more than an obsession; the deity sent Tavin visions of the panoply and its locations. The young merchant princeís sleep is interrupted by these terrible dreams. His health declining, he has invested much of his new fortune into hiring a ship and making our heroes an offer. Dare they seek out the lost panoply of a god, not just for treasure, not just to help an old friend, but to save the sea and all who travel upon her! Sea Godís Curse is an adventure for 2-6 mid-level (levels 8-12) characters. It centers around sea voyages and exploration, but all character types will be useful. There are monsters to slay, allies and foes to negotiate with, and mysteries to solve. It is assumed that our heroes played through Island of Sorrow, but that adventure is not needed to enjoy Sea Godís Curse. Likewise, Sea Godís Curse is set in Frog God Gamesí Lost Lands but can be transported to any fantasy campaign. All you need is a port to sail from, a ship to sail on, and a star to steer by. You can substitute any sea god for Quell and the various locations can be placed in any sea.

tokensofhorror.description_text: The Virtual Tokens of Horror bring the Tome of Horrors (Fifth Edition) monsters to your virtual table! These 275+ virtual creature tokens are a great addition to your collection. The Tokens of Horror are all 275+ creatures from the Tokens of Horror in high-resolution PNG files. These are designed to be ready for use on Roll20, Fantasy Grounds, or any other Virtual Table-Top system that allows for the import of tokens.

renewalatcraterlake5e.description_text: In the time before mankind, when the world was young, a blazing ball of fire split the sky and fell to earth with a thunderous roar... Crater Lake Village, in the Blue Forest, is home to the reclusive Aergeth elves. Word has reached the surrounding communities that the elves are suffering from a strange illness and are in desperate need of help. The elves are master craftsmen who create crystalline arrowheads that are as dangerous as they are expensive. Some say the elves will reward those who are able to help them with a quiver of arrows each. Renewal at Crater Lake is designed for 4ñ6 adventurers of 3rd to 5th level.

blackspot5e.description_text: The first mate drew his blade and formed up what was left of the crew. They steeled their courage and waited for whatever nightmare gave birth to the horrid noises below deck to emerge topside. When the creatures finally ventured into the moonlight, the men's courage broke. They had never seen such otherworldly monstrosities. The creatures ripped into their faltering ranks and slaughter reigned. A young but literate sailor named Titus was clever enough to flee... The Black Spot is an adventure for four to six characters of 5th level. It is a tale told in four parts and should provide sufficient adventure for multiple sessions. This adventure can be used as an excursion anywhere upon the high seas, so it could take place almost anywhere in the fantasy world of your choosing.

doctors_without_borders.description_text:
Payments to Doctors Without Borders/Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF) are made via PayPal Giving Fund.

Doctors Without Borders/Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF) is an international, independent medical humanitarian organization that delivers emergency aid to people affected by armed conflict, epidemics, natural and man-made disasters, and exclusion from health care in nearly 70 countries.

forestofspores5e.description_text: What terror waits in the fungus forest? The villagers are on edge after a forest of spores appeared on their doorstep. Brave heroes are needed to venture inside... but will they return? This adventure is the perfect start to an Under Realms campaign.

entirelytoomanygnomes5e.description_text: The adventure, Entirely Too Many Gnomes, centers around the town of Danby-upon-Dhee, which is hosting an annual conference for the Merry Association of Gnomish Pranksters, Illusionists, and Entertainers (MAGPIE). The typically reserved townsfolk are overwhelmed by the chaos of pranks and comic mishaps brought on by the gnomes. As security for the event, the characters are tasked with maintaining order amid the pandemonium. The backstory reveals that Emiliano Falintino, a disgraced illusionist, seeks revenge on his rival, Kannah Kloot, by orchestrating a chaotic conference in Danby. The local baron, Strom Talbott, is also involved, having taken Kloot into his home as his artist in residence. As tensions rise, a gang of locals plots against the gnomes, leading the characters to uncover Falintino's sinister motives and prevent a massacre. The adventure is designed for 4ñ6 Tier I (levels 3ñ5) Fifth Edition characters, and emphasizes diplomacy, problem-solving, and the consequences of their actions on various factions within the town.

lostmenagerie5e.description_text: They say favors make the world go around, and itís true of the planes of existence beyond material reality as well. In the distant past, the great wizard Arfaleo the Seeker claimed favors from four mighty elemental lords to create a self-contained world. The wizard populated his microcosm with strange creatures, to monitor what changes might occur to them over time, even bringing a small settlement of humans into the interplanar cavern. Eventually, though, the wizardís interest in his experiment waned and he moved on, leaving behind the bizarre anomaly he had created. Since this time, the microcosm has changed in many ways, for it did not remain isolated from other planes of existence. New creatures have made their way into the wizardís carefully maintained experiment, and ó there is no other way to say it ó things have gone very wrong. Characters exploring the Lost Menagerie of Arfaelo will find bizarre and unusual challenges in this adventure written by Mike Mearls, the lead designer of Fifth Edition Dungeons & Dragons. Lost Menagerie is a challenging adventure for characters of 7th to 9th level.

sunstoneado5e.description_text: The sun didnít rise ... and dark shadows are closing in! The joyous revelry of the Solstice Masquerade has ended, and itís time to put away the fantastical masks and greet the dawn. But this year, the sun didnít rise ... and the night goes on and on. Clues abound, but will the heroes solve the mystery of the sun stone? Can they restore the sun to the sky? Will the fae provide some answers to the mystery? The Sun Stone Ado is a festive adventure of clue-following and creative problem-solving set against a backdrop of mischief and mayhem. The party must ensure dawn comes again after the yearís longest night. The adventure is designed for Tier 2 parties but can be adjusted for other degrees of difficulty.

tomeofwondrousitems5e.description_text: Tome of Wondrous Items ó the companion volume to our acclaimed Tome of Alchemy ó offers a vast array of resources for creative game mastery. Learn about the fascinating-but-disgusting brain jar, the ring of the smoke wyrm, the terrifying rod of necromancy, the staff of the arch-spider, the wand of runes, and the scepter of the heavens! What else is lurking inside the Tome of Wondrous Items? Chapters filled with magical armor, rings, rods, scrolls, staves, wands, wondrous items, weapons, magical tattoos, otherworldly Items, new spells, and new monsters.

dwarvenfiasco5e.description_text: High in their cliff-face temples, the dwarven sages watched the plague roll in from the west. They pooled their resources to defend the dwarven lands. Just as their great ritual was coming to an end, stray light from a distant star streamed in through the mighty pillars and pierced their magic circle. The dwarves, secluded behind their walls in Cleft, survived the plague, even as it devastated the dwarven population of the northern reaches of the vale. The few sages not in the temple lost their connection to the powers that helped them create and heal. Guilt drove the dwarven elders to set down their tools, while lassitude set in among the young. The production of weapons and arms in Cleft ceased, though a noisy, steam-belching device made it seem as if the dwarves were still working. Cowed by loss and failure, the sages made no attempt to reclaim their temple complex ó but it seems an evil is gaining strength within its depths. Perhaps some brave adventurers can return the backbone to this part of the world. A location-based adventure for a party of Tier 2 5e characters.

grandduchyofremesn.description_text: The Grand Duchy of Reme is a vast realm: a network of well-settled river valleys running through enormous areas of almost-uncharted wilderness. To the west, Remeís territory extends to the Deepfells Mountains and the forbidden Green Realm of the wild elves. To the east, it reaches to the town of Fareme near the western edge of the Stoneheart Valley. Its northern border is the Wizardís Wall across the Crynnomar Gap, and to the south, the realm extends to the Whiterush River. The land borders of Reme do not tell the whole story, however, for Reme is also a seafaring nation, one of the most significant in the world. The grand duke has no colonial aspirations, but the nation has been focused on dominating trade on the Crescent Sea for centuries, and Rhemish ships venture throughout the known world from the cityís great port.

questsofdoom4themissingpin5e.human_name: Quests of Doom 4 The Missing Pin (5e)
questsofdoom4themissingpin5e.description_text: The Missing Pin by Alex Kammer is a 2nd-level adventure designed for 4 to 6 characters. In the Lost Lands setting it takes place in the Unclaimed Lands north of the Borderland Provinces at the point where the Great Amrin River meets the Glimmrill Run. At the confluence of the Great Amrin and Glimmrill Run rivers sits the small town of Gumspur, a small backwater town known only for its convenient location and its only real export, pottery. So, when an audacious theft victimizes one of the leading families of Gumspur, a group more capable than the local constabulary is needed. On its surface, what looks to be a simple theft conceals a much deeper and much more dangerous conspiracy.

tegelmanordeedsn.description_text: This a deed to Tegel Manor. It can be used as a prop at your table or digital hand out.

ecologyofthesahuagin5eandsw.description_text: The ocean is perilous. Powerful winds die can die, leaving sails limp and ships drifting listlessly on the vast blue brine. yet in less than hour a sailor can be torn from the doldrums by a violent tempest ripping the ship apart. Should a lifeboat survive the storm, the great waves in its wake will spray mists of chill and fear on huddled survivors. Current and wind will be the only hope left for a safe destination. As the small craft is jostled north, south, east and west; the little boat will end up in the one direction that is certain - down. Down where terrible creatures underneath the waves await. There the mythological monsters and inhuman horrors thrive admits liquid poison and steel-crushing pressure but delight in assaulting the ships, boats and rafts which skirt surface of their domains. The most feared of these are the sea-devils. The sahuagin. Sahuagin are a predatory, piscine race that emerge from the ocean's deepest trenches to prey on ships and seaside communities. The sahuagins believe the entire aquatic realm is theirs to rule. They are taught that it is only a matter of time until their shark god delivers every living creature, both on land and at sea. to their toothy maws.

meadowqueen5e.description_text: True love awaits during Edelfest ... if past mistakes donít come calling Edelfest is the annual celebration of love and life. But this year, the discovery of the first flower brought only misery and hardship ... and no mead to get the party started. Innocent beginnings might have deadly consequences for heroes unprepared to frolic merrily through the deadly alpine woods to uncover a mystery hidden at the heart of the festivalís violent past. The Meadow Queen, written by Jason Whitesitt, is an adventure for 4-6 fourth-level (Tier 1) characters. This adventure introduces the isolated Schˆnesfeld Valley, its snowcapped environs, and the alpine village of Talzing. In pursuit of lost mead and missing persons (both dead and alive), the characters undergo a series of three trials as they attempt to let romance shine again.

raslamasylum5e.description_text: This adventure takes place in Raslam Asylum, a mental institution for the criminally insane. It includes equal amounts combat, problem solving, and role-playing. The institution is named after Dr. Dimitri Raslam, who has meticulously studied the criminal mind and believes dangerous impulses can be cured through meditation and therapeutic practices. The asylum proved successful at first, and goodly rulers of neighboring lands used its services as an alternative to brutal execution practices and expensive incarceration that resulted only in recidivism. Unfortunately, something dreadful transpired, and the asylum is currently in a state of utter chaos. It is the adventurersí job to find out exactly what is happening. Can you solve the mystery of Raslam Asylum? Party Size: 4ñ6 Tier II (Level 6ñ10) 30% combat, 30% social, 30% exploration, 10% traps GM Prep: Medium Difficulty to Run: Easy Play Time: 12ñ18 hours A Note on Content: This adventure is intended to be a horror adventure and is meant to be a work of supernatural fantasy fiction in the vein of Hammer Films, or various works in the vein of horror authors such as Edgar Allen Poe, Bram Stoker, or Mary Wollstonecraft. It is in no way meant to be a reflection on actual issues of mental health, involuntary institutionalization of the mentally ill, or an indictment of people who have suffered from mental illness. Persons emotionally moved by such themes may wish to avoid participating in this adventure.

hellcomestobogtown5e.description_text: Cyrus Hindle has inherited a fief from his distant great uncle and is in over his head. He needs an entourage, people who can help him take possession of his late uncleís domain in the Wicked Fens and run the place. Just a minor clerk, the new Lord Hindle has no idea how to be a great lord. Nor does he know what lies in store for him, for his late uncle trafficked in arcane mysteries, wicked deeds, and terrible secrets. These horrid things will come to haunt the new Lord Handle, the Wicked Fens, and our heroes as hell comes to Bogtown! Designed for characters of levels 1-3, our heroes join the entourage of the new Lord Hindle to help him manage his new fief, but along the way, they must deal with the terrors of the Wicked Fens, the confusion and eventual madness of His Lordship, and confront the horror of the past!

scentsandsensibilities5e.description_text: Scents and Sensibilities is a three-part resource for those who choose to challenge their players with the foul-smelling monsters known as stank hogs. The first section is a short adventure called The Manufactory of Fumario, and the second section is an erudite discussion of the stank hog (Sus noxium). The third section contains statistics for adult and young stank hogs. The Manufactory of Fumario is suitable for 4ñ6 characters of level 1-3. The adventure begins with the characters encountering Fumario, a perfume-dealer who travels among strange worlds and even other planes of existence. His manufactory travels with him, and the characters (as heroes do) stumble into a bizarre encounter with him. Fumarioís methods and motivations are inexplicable, but this is usually the case with supernatural patronsÖ

isleoftheangryapes5e.description_text: Wow, those apes are angry! An adventure for characters of levels 5-8. Smoking Island, in the Cymru Islands off the northeast coast of the North-lands, was, is, and will be destroyed. That which cannot be slain was slain and the island exists in several times at once. Recently, or perhaps a few decades from now, a cadre of legionaries serving the Three Kings of Smoking Island captured a Northlander longship and put to sea only to discover there was no way back to their home time. Led by the Centurion Talkithis, the grey apes established a base on Young Island, scraping what living they can amidst the jagged rocks beneath a sulfurous sky. While exploring the volcanic wastes of Young Island, Talkithis contacted a tendril of the Sleeping Fire, that ancient entity that inhabits Smoking Island and whose death shattered time. The Sleeping Fire needs souls to power its escape, and Talkithis provides them in exchange for the might to save his crew. Yet, as the months have passed the Sleeping Fire has corrupted the grey apes. No longer content to simply tend weedy gardens, they have taken to raiding shipping far and wide, taking loot for their own use, prisoners to work as slaves, and sacrifices for the Sleeping Fire. No longer castaway soldiers, they are becoming fiendish warriors and loyal servants of an evil flame that longs to awaken. Its heat burns in their veins and clouds their minds, and these piratical apes are so very angry.

sinfulwhispers5e.description_text: They tell of a lonely island that bears Great Pele's footprints. An isle seared by a mother's vengeance for the evil wrought on Her eloved children -  and where gods smite the earth, only fools dare tread. On the Razor, 'tis folly, indeed, to walk any ground She condemned. Yet still, mortals come. Legends of a secret magic hoard, the fate of a missing whaler, and the strange tale of a lone survivor beckon to shores grown as lush and inviting as a siren't irresistible song. "This way", encourages a sly whisper adrift on the wind. "Come, and I shall make you mine." From ruins where once She trod in wrath, the temptations of an ageless evil speak after centuries of silence. Sinful Whisper is a 5th-level adventure of supernatural and psychological horror set on a mysterious island on the Razor Coast grown verdant with time. Here the characters must overcome both their deepest fears and most banal desires to combat a depravity so deep it survived the retribution of a goddess.

197520205e.description_text: 1975 is meant to take you back to that time the ìold-timersî talk about with a look of wistfulness in their eyes. Join us as we all travel back to 1975. An old map leads the characters on the trail to a horseshoe-shaped valley in search of treasure. This introductory-level adventure is based on the old-school approach of ìhex-crawling,î exploring through unknown areas toward a mysterious objective. Dangers abound along the way, but fortune favors the bold!

rappanathuk_adventuresinzelkorsferry2018.human_name: Rappan Athuk: Adventures in Zelkor's Ferry (2018) (5e)
rappanathuk_adventuresinzelkorsferry2018.description_text: Adventures in Zelkor's Ferry by Alex Kammer is an expanded description of one of the principal starting points near Rappan Athuk. Find friends, enemies, and fate as you pass through Zelkor's Ferry...on the way to Rappan Athuk.

blightplayersguidesn.description_text: The Blight Playerís Guide provides system-neutral information for players about the city known as the Blight, its environs, various districts, people, and personages. This book is entirely player-friendly and provides an easy way for players to play characters from the city or visitors who have taken the time to get to know the place without the GM having to read page after page of exposition text. The perfect accessory for GMs to give to their players to launch them into a Blight campaign. The book includes the city poster map stripped of GM tags so that it is safe for players to peruse at their leisure as they make their way through the crooked city of the Blight. Crack open the pages of this playerís guide and dive right in, because youíve entered the wrong side of town . . . Warning! This product contains materials that may not be suitable for all audiences. It is recommended for use by individuals aged 13 and older.

grimmsgate5e2020.description_text: Deep in the wooded wilderness, the village of Grimmsgate is an outpost town on a seldom-traveled trail, right at the edge of nowhere. The villageís half-ruined temple of Law, dilapidated inn, drunken blacksmith, exiled trader and a few fur-trappers are enough to keep the bloody-minded denizens of the dark forest at bay, but nobody really expects the village to still be there in another ten years. The woods have become too dangerous for the trappers who once caught animals for fur, and merchants no longer travel the poorly-maintained road because of bandits. None of the nearby barons are willing to accept responsibility for the village, because the one and only attempt that was ever made to subdue this part of the wilderness, a patrolling troop of knights and soldiers, completely disappeared in the forest without leaving a trace. When the search parties also failed to return, civilization gave up on Grimmsgate and departed, making no further efforts to stave off the slow advance of Chaos.

bardsgateplayers_guidesn.description_text: Welcome to the jewel of the Stoneheart Valley and the lynchpin of the Lost Lands! We here at the Lyre Valley Press are certainly glad that you have picked up a copy of our periodical. With so much to do and see in the city, the Press hopes this weekly gives you a little insight into the city, itís people, and some of the goings-on in and around the city.

towerofdeadthieves5e.description_text: Dare You Enter the Tower of Dead Thieves? Many have tried, All have failed. Once every seven years, the towerís doors swing wide for the latest bold adventurers. Can you overcome the devious traps to claim the legendary treasure? Or will your bones be the latest to decorate the towerís halls? Tower of Dead Thieves is a 5e adventure designed for three to six Tier 1 characters (three to six characters of 1st to 3rd level for OSR games) to provide low-level characters with an epic experience that rewards problem-solving and skill use over combat. More than just a dungeon crawl, the tower is one large puzzle, a puzzle whose solution yields great reward for those willing to risk a terrible death. The Tower of Dead Thieves rises in the city of Eastgate, piercing the sky like the point of a spear held by an angry god. Its halls are said to be filled with untold wealth and magic, all guarded by the deadliest of traps. Once every seven years, the towerís doors open as a challenge to the boldest adventurers. Master thieves and treasure hunters from across the Lost Lands have tried to plunder its secrets ó but none has ever returned. Will your characters suffer the same fate? Or will they solve the mystery of the Tower of Dead Thieves?

seancheslament5e.description_text: Seancheís Lament (shana-khi) is Frog God Gamesí offering for St. Patrickís Day, an adventure based on Irish and Celtic folklore by Ian McGarty. For 5e, The Seancheís Lament is a Tier 2 adventure. The Seanche, a legendary bard, has traveled the lands for hundreds of years. It isnít known if the name is a title that gets passed on or whether the Seanche is a supernatural being, but the Seancheís arrival is always greeted with joy. Recently, though, his tales have taken a dark turn as a result of a deadly wager lost, and his presence is spreading havoc. Can the characters discover the facts behind the chaos and prevent the rise of the Serpent Priest?

questsofdoom4amidnightcouncilofquail5e.human_name: Quests of Doom 4 A Midnight Council of Quail (5e)
questsofdoom4amidnightcouncilofquail5e.description_text: A Midnight Council of Quail by Lance Hawvermale (for 4 to 6 characters from 3rd and 5th level) The characters explore a village to locate the lair of a monstrous murderer ó but the villagers donít want the murderer to be discovered. The Archdruid Cadrryn is so old and mystical that his very presence often affects the natural world around him. Over the years, his close association with the regionís quail population has bestowed upon the birds a sentience uncommon to normal avians. With slightly advanced intelligence, the quail now act as local sentinels, reporting back to Cadrryn on all matters that transpire in his domain. But the druid has been away for more than a fortnight on business of the Druidic Order of Oescreheit, leaving the quail to decide on important events without his wise hand to guide them. When the birds learn that a sinister force has infiltrated the nearby village of Eorls Gedreas, where many of them roost upon the thatched rooftops, the quail convene to determine a way to fight back.

invinogigantus5e.description_text: This introductory adventure can be instantly inserted into any campaign without preamble, as it opens with the player characters being the unwitting targets of a Summon Monster spell! Once summoned into the very hands of a mad and drunken giant, the player characters will find themselves exploring a realm designed for creatures ten times their size as they fight all manner of strange creature, traverse larger than life obstacles and objects, encounter other adventurers who have fallen into the clutches of the mad prince Tempestas, and even risk plummeting to their death as the very foundation of the cloud castle of Stormridge Sanctum is crumbling beneath their boots! Youíve been granted the hospitality of the storm giant prince Clovis Tempestas II, and heís always up for a little? more...

encountersintheunderrealms5e.description_text: This volume contains 18 exciting short adventures that can be added to your Heart of St. Bathus campaign, or to any game set in the subterranean labyrinths of the Under Realms. From author Ken Spencer, these adventures present a wide range of challenges, from intriguing puzzles to ferocious combat, and are suitable to adventurers of any level or composition. Encounters in the Under Realms includes adventures such as: ï Bee Careful: A hive of giant cave bees stands in the partyís way as they travel through the Under Realms. ï Cute Crystal: Packed with crystal growths, a cave also harbors a strange crystalline lifeform. ï Games of Chance: The adventurers face a cunning challenge: a spinning chamber and a wild, bouncing sphere ñ with random and potentially catastrophic results. ï Kobold Renegades: A band of kobolds is on the run from their kingdom and fortified themselves in an old temple, squarely in the partyís path. ï Maw: Unexpectedly tumbling into a dead-end cavern, the party faces a massive organic garbage disposal and the trash heapís ravenous occupant. ï Mushroom Madness: A cave full of mushrooms, each with a different magical effect. What could go wrong? ï Throne for a Pay: A forgotten throne room, a rival band of adventurers, and magically animated statues combine to challenge the party. Encounters in the Under Realms can liven up and enhance your campaigns, whether your heroes are pursuing the Heart of St. Bathus or simply wandering elsewhere in the worlds below.

heartofstbathus5e.description_text: Borne by a Paladin, Stolen by a Demon ñ Lost in Darkness Long ago, a bold paladin sought the same glory as his celebrated ancestors, but in a moment of weakness, he gave up his own soul in exchange for success in battle. He now lies suspended between life and death, and his soul is lost. Itís up to the adventurers to find it and redeem a fallen paladin while facing the wrath of a powerful demon lord in the process.      Heart of St. Bathus is a sandbox-style campaign for 5e roleplaying designed to take a party of characters from Level 3 (Tier 1) to Level 12 (Tier 3). Answering an appeal for aid from the monks of Goodheart Abbey, the adventurers set off in search of a famed paladinís lost soul, venturing first to a cursed fortress and then into the labyrinthine depths beneath. But itís far from a simple mission: The soul ó and the heart-shaped jewel to which it is bound ó have been stolen by a cunning devil who has taken it to her citadel far below within the twisting passages of the Cyclopean Deeps. And the Heartís true master, an imprisoned demon lord, lurks in the darkest corners of the realm, hoping to use the unwitting adventurers to aid in his escape. The soul of a brave paladin hangs in the balance as the adventurers delve into dark and unknown regions!

halloftherainbowmage5e.description_text: While investigating the disappearance of Londar Brightrain, also known as the Rainbow Mage, the party comes across dark, twisted plans and deadly secrets before locating his famous treasures. Treasures found include several new spells along with a few magic items. Unfortunately, the traps and creatures left behind by Londar hamper the partyís investigation, and other adventurers compete for his famous secrets and treasures.

lighthouseofananmarath5e.description_text: From the shoreline of the village of Saemish, waves can be seen tossing their salt and spray upon four small islands, the largest of which is Anan Marath. A great bridge, aged and deteriorated, spans from the mainland connecting these islands and ending at the colossal lighthouse of Anan Marath. Each mighty structure is created from the deep-green bedrock found only in the bedrocks of the watery abyss. For decades, the Lighthouse of Anan Marath has remained dark. Slowly devolving into a state of shabby disrepair. But no longer! The village council has decided ó narrowly and after angry debate ó to restore the lighthouse and clear it of its dark and bloody past.

horrorsunboundblackorc5e.description_text: Followers of Orcus, Demon Prince of the Undead, black orcs (Orco pulleiaceus) are larger and more barbarous than their cousins, the common orc. Believing themselves to be the favored of Orcus, they wage self-righteous wars of conquest on all their neighbors, be they goodly races, other evil humanoids, or even other clans of black orcs. Constant intra-clan warring usually keeps their numbers in check, much to the relief of neighboring civilizations. However, when a clan is led by a black orc high priest or priestess, who is almost always accompanied by one or more black orc champions, the clan becomes focused and organized, often forcefully welcoming other clans into its fold to create a powerful army capable of threatening the most welldefended kingdoms.

thiefkingsvault5e.description_text: It has long been said there are no thieves in the city of Caltoshar. At night, one can safely walk the streets and a few worry about locking their doors. Yet one would be foolish to believe Caltoshar is without a criminal element, for there are thieves aplenty if one knows where to look. The best advice would be for you to assuage your curiosity with such matters, and enjoy Caltoshar for what it appears to be. You're probably not one to take wise counsel, though. The Thief King's Vault is a short adventure for six 5th-level characters.

questsofdoom4godofore5e.human_name: Quests of Doom 4 God of Ore (5e)
questsofdoom4godofore5e.description_text: God of Ore by Tom Knauss is a 3rd-level adventure that takes the PCs from the quiet, mountainside town of Minersí Refuge into the heart of the Stoneheart Mountains in pursuit of a failed pilgrimage to discover a phony religious relic deep inside legendary Mithral Mountain. The dark, twisting tunnels that bore into the fabled mountain soon reveal that some mysteries are not what they first appear to be.

feastofthefork5e.description_text: ARRIVE EARLY TO THE FEAST, FOR LATECOMERS EAT ONLY BONES ... The Feast of the Fork, a celebration of kith and kin filled with bouts of ale drinking, pie eating, and singing Ö until the first body appears. Will old hostilities erupt or will the sinister power responsible for these gruesome murders be revealed? Party Size: 4-6 Player Characters Party Level: Tier 1 Play Emphasis: 30% Combat/40% Social/30% Exploration GM Preparation: Low Difficulty to Run: Easy Play Time: 6-8 hours

tegelmanor5e.description_text: First published by The Judges Guild in 1977, Tegel Manor is the oldest of the "Haunted House" adventures in fantasy roleplaying and probably the very first mega-dungeon ever published. The Manor is a sprawling edifice of 250+ rooms filled with tricks, traps, puzzles, monsters, and situations both humorous and horrific. The huge manor house has been the curse of its owners, the Rump family, for generations. No matter how many times they have tried to get rid of it, the ownership manages to come back to them. This intertwined and sinister relationship between the house and its chosen family is a history of horror, evil, and greed. There is a lot for characters to learn about the curse, and their knowledge might just keep them alive long enough to tell the tale. If you've already seen the 1977 version of the Manor, there's a lot more for you to experience in this updated and expanded 5e version of the classic. This printing contains more detailed descriptions of the rooms, new areas, new monsters, new magic items, and much more, all with spectacular color illustrations.

questsofdoom4betweenarockandacharredplac.human_name: Quests of Doom 4 Between a Rock and a Charred Place (5e)
questsofdoom4betweenarockandacharredplac.description_text: Between a Rock and a Charred Place by Tom Knauss (for 4 to 6 characters of 7th level) The characters will be thrust into the middle of an epic confrontation between the dwarves of the Stoneheart Mountains and the hobgoblins just beyond their borders. Under their new leadership, the hobgoblin warmongers deploy an innovative grand strategy: to forge an alliance with one of the dwarvesí old enemies and a traitor in their foesí midst. The dwarvesí dominance over the region and very survival hangs in the balance if the characters cannot thwart the monstersí ambitious plans.

feastofthegobbler5e.description_text: After finding themselves in the area of the Greenhill Woods, part of the larger Elderwood Forest in the Duchy of the Waymarch. Here the characters quickly become embroiled in a local conflict. Locals believe that a semi-nomadic Loreclan kidnapped and murdered several hunters within the Greenhill Woods. A village elder asks them to find the truth before the locals fire up the mostly Foerdewaith soldiers at Fort Buturbal and demand the destruction of the peaceful Grass Sailor village of Elk Run. Fate finds the characters inexorably drawn into this volatile situation where the answers they seek may only be found somewhere within the tangles of the Greenhill Woods. Sure to face dangers fearsome and fowl, the intrepid band must use all the skills at their disposal to survive against the devious machinations of the Gobbler and his nest of ultimate evil.

menaceinravenreach5e.description_text: Menace in Ravenreach by James Thomas is an adventure for mid-level characters. When the group of adventurers arrived in the outpost town of Ravenreach, they headed directly to the local tavern. As was usual, it took under an hour until fists started flying, glassware shattering and furniture flying. The fighting ended, just as the last of the locals melted away. Their incarceration made the wanderers the ideal candidates for an unusual errand. The Master Minder, the court wizard, requires the capture of a local troll ñ alive ñ for his studies. Without hesitation, they accepted the task and into the wilds they went. Not exactly a start to a Saga of old, but the days are young as they slip into the dark woods.

horrorsunboundbloodkaktos5e.description_text: Blood Kaktos (Carnegiea succo) The blood kaktos, Carnegiea succo, is a motile, sentient arborescent plant that inhabits any warm, sandy environment. It is a relative of the common saguaro cactus and has leathery green flesh covered with needle-like spines, with two jointed, branch-like arms sprouting from a large trunk that grows to between 5ñ7 feet tall upon maturity. The top of the trunk is usually rounded and called a crown, but in rare cases, the top fans out in a cristate formation containing multiple small crowns. A slot in the lower third of the trunk allows for a proboscis to be extended and retracted. The proboscis, a large specialized spine attached to the trunk by a pulsating veiny vine, is used for anesthetizing and sucking the blood of usually unaware victims.

moondaughtersfate5e.description_text: Beginning with an encounter with a disguised god, Moon Daughterís Fate brings the characters into the province of Sheng Xi Gui, ìWhisper Valley,î where divine matters have taken a dangerous turn. Alice Peng has crafted an intricate situation based on Chinese folklore that begins with a mystery and can end in various resolutions of a quarrel among gods, with a healthy dose of fighting and mayhem along the way. The playersí skills at negotiation and mysteries are crucial in addition to combat tactics, and at times the charactersí lives may depend upon problem-solving rather than their fighting skills. This adventure is suitable for 4ñ6 characters of levels 5-8 (Tier 2 in 5e) and is located in a fictional, folkloric region of China. If the gaming group uses existing characters, the means by which they reach the Whisper Valley is best determined by the context of their prior adventures.

doctors_without_borders.description_text:
Payments to Doctors Without Borders/Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF) are made via PayPal Giving Fund.

Doctors Without Borders/Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF) is an international, independent medical humanitarian organization that delivers emergency aid to people affected by armed conflict, epidemics, natural and man-made disasters, and exclusion from health care in nearly 70 countries.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: Lost Lands Adventure for 5th Edition by Frog God Games
from_bundle.short_marketing_blurb: Can you survive the Lost Lands?
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Bard's Gate (5e), Tegel Manor Deed (SN), Tome of Artifacts (5e), Rappan Athuk: Adventures in Zelkor's Ferry (2018) (5e), and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Can you survive the Lost Lands? Gather your friends and roll the dice, because it’s time to journey into the Lost Lands! We’ve teamed up with Frog God Games for this massive TTRPG bundle chock-full of resources to plan your next campaign. Explore the winding streets of Bard’s Gate, a citadel of artisans and politicians whose people are menaced by dark forces within and without. Use the Tome of Artifacts to scatter magical weapons and relics throughout the land for your players to find. Find a starting point for your adventure with expanded description manuals like Rappan Athuk: Adventures in Zelkor’s Ferry. You can even score a physical copy of The World of the Lost Lands, the definitive guide to the entire setting, full of information on its locations, peoples, and historical data! Endless adventure awaits you in this bundle of nearly 80 TTRPG ebooks, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!
from_bundle.author: Frog God Games

deepseekaicourse_contentcreationproducti.description_text: Uncover the power of DeepSeek AI to supercharge your content creation, productivity, and coding. This course shows you how to harness DeepSeek’s advanced models for writing, research, translation, and programming tasks. You’ll explore practical use cases like generating reports, brainstorming ideas, debugging code, and automating workflows. By the end, you’ll know how to integrate DeepSeek into your daily routines and professional projects, making it an essential tool for staying ahead in the AI era.

adobefireflycourse_ai-powereddesignillus.human_name: Adobe Firefly Course: AI-Powered Design, Illustration & Photography Tools
adobefireflycourse_ai-powereddesignillus.description_text: Explore Adobe’s AI-powered Firefly to create stunning visuals with ease. This course covers Firefly’s text-to-image, text effects, vector recoloring, and generative fill tools. You’ll learn how to integrate Firefly into your Adobe Creative Cloud workflow for faster, more creative design work. Whether you’re producing marketing content, experimenting with typography, or generating original images, Firefly gives you the power to push your creativity further. This course shows you exactly how.

elevenlabsaivoicemasterclass_createreali.human_name: ElevenLabs AI Voice Masterclass: Create Realistic AI Audio
elevenlabsaivoicemasterclass_createreali.description_text: Bring words to life with ElevenLabs, the leading AI voice platform. In this course, you’ll learn how to create natural-sounding voiceovers for videos, podcasts, and content projects. Explore the Voice Library, text-to-speech features, and customization tools to generate unique voices. The course also touches on ethical considerations and professional best practices. By the end, you’ll be able to produce high-quality AI audio for storytelling, business, or creative projects with ease.

midjourneycourse_createstunningimagesand.human_name: Midjourney Course: Create Stunning Images and Monetize your AI Art
midjourneycourse_createstunningimagesand.description_text: Learn how to create breathtaking AI-generated art with MidJourney. Starting with account setup and prompt basics, you’ll quickly move on to advanced techniques like style tuning, prompt weighting, and creative workflows. The course also covers ethics, copyright considerations, and professional use cases in design, marketing, and storytelling. With guided projects, you’ll gain confidence turning words into high-quality, original visuals. Perfect for artists, designers, and anyone curious about the future of creative AI.

chatgptcourse_learntouseaiforproductivit.human_name: ChatGPT Course: Learn to Use AI for Productivity and Creativity
chatgptcourse_learntouseaiforproductivit.description_text: Master ChatGPT and discover how to use AI for writing, research, coding, and productivity. This course takes you from the basics of prompting to advanced workflows for automating tasks, generating creative content, and enhancing your professional projects. With real-world examples, you’ll learn to integrate ChatGPT into daily work, build smarter prompts, and unlock new levels of efficiency. By the end, you’ll be ready to use ChatGPT not just as a tool, but as a powerful creative and productivity partner.

powerpointwithaicourse_designsmarterpres.human_name: PowerPoint with AI Course: Design Smarter Presentations
powerpointwithaicourse_designsmarterpres.description_text: Transform the way you create presentations with PowerPoint enhanced by AI tools. This course shows you how to design slides faster, generate compelling content, and integrate AI image and text features directly into your workflow. You’ll also learn how to combine PowerPoint with external AI platforms for maximum impact. Ideal for professionals, students, and entrepreneurs, this course ensures your presentations stand out while saving you time and effort.

leonardoaicourse_createstunningartwithar.human_name: Leonardo AI Course: Create Stunning Art with Artificial Intelligence
leonardoaicourse_createstunningartwithar.description_text: Design high-quality assets, concept art, and illustrations with Leonardo AI. This course guides you through the platform’s features, from creating characters and props to building textures and game-ready materials. You’ll learn how to refine outputs, customize styles, and use advanced settings for consistent results. With hands-on projects, you’ll gain the skills to use Leonardo AI as a creative partner in game design, concept art, and digital illustration.

runwayaivideocreation_generativeaimaster.human_name: Runway AI Video Creation: Generative AI Masterclass
runwayaivideocreation_generativeaimaster.description_text: Learn how to produce stunning AI-generated videos using Runway AI. This course covers text-to-video, video editing, and generative workflows, allowing you to transform simple ideas into professional-quality clips. You’ll discover how to use Runway’s features for storytelling, marketing, and creative experiments. With hands-on lessons, you’ll leave with the skills to craft original, eye-catching videos using one of the most innovative AI platforms available today.

savethechildren.description_text:
Donations to support Save the Children are made to PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Save the Children believes every child deserves a future. In 120 countries around the world, they work every day to give children a healthy start in life, the opportunity to learn in school and protection from harm. When crisis strikes, and children are most vulnerable, they are among the first to respond and the last to leave. They ensure children’s unique needs are met and their voices are heard. They do whatever it takes to reach every last child.
