demondog_fantasyrpg.description_text:
Compatible with Malbers Animation Realistic Wolf (share animations!), the Demon Dog comes with multiple texture sets, a bunch of animations, and mesh morphing!

Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

golemscavemonster.description_text: Golems with multiple textures, and source files to create your own, along with mesh morphing. Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

rivervalley_level.description_text: If you are looking for a realistic environment with high-quality details, which is ready to use, we prepared for you a special map that contains a 200x200m playable game-ready level area located in a mountain valley. The entire landscape was created with scrupulous planning to deliver an immersive product. In this area, you will find a road running through a river and lake environment, surrounded by mountains. This pack is a scene that works in HDRP, URP, and a built-in render pipeline (standard render).

birdy_fantasyrpg.description_text:
Fully animated bird-like creature with tons of texture options.

Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

mushroommonsterpackpbrfantasyrpg.description_text: The classic Infinity PBR Mushroom Monster features mesh morphing, sound effects, concept art, and even music! Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

advancedfoliagepack20.description_text: Our foliage models and ground textures provide quality content thanks to which you can easily start building landscapes from the basic parts that your terrain needs. Asset data were scanned and carefully optimized. Ground texture has perfect tiling and heightmaps for the tesselation. Pack contains also dynamic snow cover. The asset works perfectly with other vegetation systems as well as unity terrain. The pack contains grass textures for unity billboard grass and mesh prepared for unity mesh grass.

lve2023_lavaandvolcanoenvironment2023.description_text: A huge pack of lava environments, systems, tools, textures, particles, and models that give you the ability to simulate and create volcanoes, caves, dungeon interiors, lava rivers, lakes, sea. Asset contains our spline system, which gives you the ability to place lava rivers and lakes via splines. The fence system can spawn and bend objects via a spline. All objects that touch the lava surface could be heated or even flow on its surface.

landscapegroundpack3desertdrylandbeachse.human_name: Landscape Ground Pack 3 (Desert Dry Land Beach Sea Islands Coast)
landscapegroundpack3desertdrylandbeachse.description_text: Huge library of 100% scanned 116 texture assets in 26 sets, for coast, dunes, desert, dry land, beach, island, shorelines, and even mountains environment 14 decals and 6 landscape demo scenes

parkphotoscannedassets_naturemanufacture.description_text: Create a park that will become an oasis of greenery and nature in a city landscape or other urbanized environment. Wooden benches, decorative lamps, fences, or an artistic fountain - these and many more necessary park elements can be found in our pack. Materials in various variants of use will create a charming composition of the recreational area. This pack contains carefully optimized, modular, atlased photo-scanned and sculpted assets. LOD's are highly optimized - triangles range from 7/4k to even 8 triangles which makes them very cheap to render. Pack contains 68 modular prefabs, 47 models with 4-5 LOD's ( almost 200 meshes), 18 texture atlases (68 textures - Albedo, Smoothness, AO, Metalic, Normal), and 12 ground texture sets (60 maps).

fireandsmoke_dynamicnature.description_text: Our collection of smoke, fire, and explosion prefabs, and shaders gives you the necessary finishing touch that will level up your project. Inside the package, you will find 10 smoke prefabs in 4 (standard built-in, URP) or 6 variants (HD RP), 15 additional smoke examples with different shader setups, 14 mixed prefabs (ashes, flames, embers, torch, fire pit), 5 particle shaders which react to wind direction, speed, shiver, gust, etc. This pack helps you to add high-quality particle effects at low-performance cost. Multiple variants of shaders will help you to optimize render and gain proper effect in specific situations. Particles support HD, URP and Standard render. It even comes with Nature Manufacture wind with which particles react to wind speed, direction, and shiver.

gargoyles_fantasyrpg.description_text: A classic Gargoyle monster with statue poses, mesh morphing, flying & ground animations, concept art, music, particles, and sound effects! Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

autumnvalley_level.description_text: Create a valley landscape and fill it with details dedicated to the autumn atmosphere like trees with falling colorful leaves and other terrain elements that perfectly reflect that season of the year. Autumn Valley is a high-quality package, game-ready level 240x240m with a road running through hills, rivers, and forest environment, surrounded by mountains. Asphalt roads in the scene are replaceable by dirt roads (switch between objects at hierarchy) which can fit more medieval and fantasy setting.

modularcastleanddungeon_naturemanufactur.description_text: Build medieval, fantasy, castles, dungeons, towns, towers, and temples. Over 1300 prefabs, built from over 1990 meshes. Fast shaders used to save texture and GPU usage, The Demo scene is 1km square!

terrainstitcher.description_text: With Terrain Stitcher you can blend/stitch neighbor terrains using advanced or basic mathematical functions. If you get a hole at terrain borders during your work process you can easily blend it and remove it even at runtime. You can choose blend range and mathematics function power. The system contains a blended LOD system for neighbor terrains, which removes LOD differences between terrain LODs. Using Terrain Stitcher you can blend selected in hierarchy window terrains, or every terrain that exists in your current scene, simply with one click. Pack also contains free open-source matrix operations and algorithms library. Terrain scaler - it's a script that will give you the ability to rescale your terrain height without losing height data.

mountaintrees_dynamicnature.description_text: From young plants to impressive mountain trees - our package gives you high-quality elements that are indispensable symbols needed to create a mountain and forest landscape. This pack contains 8 PBR mountain fir trees in 63 prefabs. Trees could be placed in a forest (special forest tree versions) or as standalone. All trees work perfectly with Unity terrain. They are carefully optimized and created from scanned data. Trees have low overdraw, draw call usage and are very cheap in the render. All trees contain very advanced wind shading. Trees could be overlayed dynamically by snow, this feature also gives you the ability to adjust the snow amount on trees in static scenes.

forestenvironment_dynamicnature.description_text: This package is a winner of the Unity Awards 2019 in Best Artistic Content at Asset Store and allows you to create an immersive and detailed forest. Our environment is full of various elements that allow you to form an atmosphere of deep and dense forest or a small sunny meadow with a grove. Creatively use the undergrowth, shrubs, and trees to build multi-layered and high-quality terrain to level up your project. Massive library of 100% scanned assets, carefully optimized, atlased, LOD’ed - created with a view to building the natural landscape.

ram2019_riverautomaterial2019.description_text: Blend into the environment river systems that will bring a natural touch to your landscape with such options as waterfalls, lakes, cascades, swamps, or various wild forks and river mouths. R.A.M. contains tools that give you the ability to create very advanced rivers and lakes with flowmap, river bed shapes, and textures on them automatically. To create a stream you simply drag and drop river material into an earlier prepared mesh or just create it inside Unity with our spline tool. With our tool, you have full control of every river stage and have the power to connect/disconnect multiple rivers/lakes/seas in 1 place.

landscapegroundpack1.description_text: Choose between different ground proposals that will give you the right base for your environment. Whether you want to create a swamp area, a green forest, or a rocky mountain terrain, various propositions from our library of landscape ground will provide you with the necessary materials to choose from. Pack contains 163 ground/floor textures in 43 materials. In the pack, you will also find 4 example landscapes 4x4km in size. Tilled textures are useful for every ground shader. High resolution 2048x2048 guarantees good quality, textures look good at lower resolutions too and are perfect for advanced ground shaders with a height blending feature. They work at HDRP, URP and Built-in render, at terrain and mesh.

landscapegroundpack2.description_text: The natural landscape requires attention to even the smallest detail. That is why we do not forget about what is under the impressive flora that fills the environment. We take care of basic but important things such as ground texture, so in our package, you will find different materials like textures of grass, moss, eaves, mud/dirt, road and paths, rocks/stones, litter, ivy, and snow and sand. Pack contains 128 seamless high-quality PBR ground/floor textures in 33 materials. High-resolution 2048x2048 textures contain height maps for advanced tessellation or parallax shading. Maskmaps with: metallic, ambient occlusion, height, and smoothness textures give great results in PBR render at every ground shader. In the pack, you will also find 4 example landscapes 2x2km up to 4x4km in size

wintergroundpack_naturemanufacture.description_text: Enjoy the winter landscape that you can easily shape in your design thanks to our materials. Different options of snow cover allow you to create a variety of interpretations of the area - from covering all terrain snow layers to light cover on the grass. In the winter ground pack, you will find textures such as mud, snow, rocks, stones, dirty ground, grass, path, road, and dirty snow. Everything is in PBR and physically accurate. In this textures pack, you will find ground textures, that are perfect for terrain shader. All materials contain height maps for advanced tessellation or parallax shading, so you will get a better effect if you need it. Maskmaps with: metallic, ambient occlusion, height, and smoothness textures give great results in PBR rendering.

meadowenvironment_dynamicnature.description_text: Meadow Environment is a reconstruction of the environment in the smallest details. It will allow you to create flowery meadows with small groves and various plants dedicated to this terrain type. This pack is also a huge library of 100% scanned assets, carefully optimized, atlased, LOD’ed. Group of shaders which will bring you better quality and simplify your workflow, if you want to use them. All shaders are shared between all of our assets.

slimerpgcharactermonster.description_text: Slimes are classic role playing enemies with a sinister stare and likely stinky residue. Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

pbrgraveyardandnatureset20.description_text:
Graveyard asset is dedicated to creating a cemetery environment with interiors, and nature background. Thanks to these assets you can build a mystical and mysterious area full of details that will stand out in any project, giving a landscape a unique character. The content of this pack is a huge amount (over 2000) of modular, PBR, sculpted, and photo-scanned assets. All assets are high-quality optimized and atlased models with 3-4 LODs.

Pack contains 350 prefabs (like in overview screenshots), 217 models (646 meshes with LODs), 329 textures (over 1000 maps), wall/ floor shader (a specular and metallic version that supports snow or moss cover).

treantmonstercreature_infinitypbr.description_text: Treant character with dynamic animations, mesh morphing, multiple textures, and dozens of quality action animations. Rough mountain landscapes or rocky slopes covered with heather and small vegetation - these and many other possibilities can be achieved with the support of our tools.

This dedicated Unity pack is a huge library of 100% scanned assets, carefully optimized, atlased, LOD’ed, containing over 470 environment prefabs. In the package, you will find a group of shaders that will bring better quality and simplify your workflow if you want to use them.

worldstreamer2.description_text: Open world and vast terrain - all this to support your game and delight the player, by giving him a feeling of freedom while exploring the virtual worlds! Our project is based on the ability to stream the whole game from disk in any axis and space so that everything functions without the need to load screens during player movement. With streaming, the number of objects on the stage is reduced, so you can save CPU power.

monstercreature_issue2_fantasyrpg.description_text: Monster Creature 2 is a four-legged behemoth, with mesh morphing and multiple game-ready texture options. Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

cobrasnake_fantasyrpg.description_text: Why'd it have to be snakes? Cobra Snake pack provides a great addition to your project! Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

ram3_riverautomaterial3.description_text: The pack gives you the ability to create very advanced rivers and lakes, seas, waterfalls, and swamps with flow maps and connect them automatically. It can create roads and paths, fences, bend cliffs, and other 3D models as well. RAM can carve terrain and textures on it, automatically under our splines.

advancedrockpack20.description_text: This rock pack with its material can add character to the environment and shape the terrain into a rocky area. It enriches with elements of grass and moss. Stones from our pack can perfectly blend into a river system and create a unique base and more. Assets are perfectly optimized and they will run even on mobiles. Textures are atlased and compressed into Metalic/AO/Smoothness format to reduce GPU usage. This format is 100% compatible with the Unity standard shader and it reduces GPU usage and memory. Models are auto-covered by ground/snow/moss texture - you have full control over it.

weeperhorrorghostpackpbr_fantasyrpg.description_text: Weeper Statue is perfect for horror games and fantasy themed role playing projects. Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

batspackpbr_fantasyrpg.description_text: Three unique bat models, animated and ready to go! Mesh morphing provides even more customization and randomization. Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

worldstreamer.description_text: World Streamer is a memory streaming system. By using it you are able to stream whole your game from a disc in any axis and space.

plantmonster_fantasyrpg.description_text: Plant Monster comes with a ton of modular options, mesh morphing, music, concept art, and sound effects. Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

fishmanmonster_fantasyrpg.description_text: Classic Fish Man with some gear and a spear, mesh morphing, and amazing textures. Customize it with the Substance Painter source files. Magic Pig Games / Infinity PBR provides modular, customizable characters fully animated. Modularity and customization are easy to implement and use at runtime and edit time, and provide a huge variety of options to create characters that best suit your project.

lve2019_lavaandvolcanoenvironment2019.description_text: A volcanic landscape with fiery lava rivers will be a spectacular addition to your terrain. This pack contains the environment, systems, tools, textures, particles, post-processing stacks, and models. L.V.E. gives you the ability to create volcanos, caves, interiors, and rivers with high-quality results. Our spline and vertex paint tools which are included in this pack will support many very advanced systems/arts. The simulation tool allows you to create a lava river that is accurate to terrain shape via 3 mouse clicks. You just set the first point and click simulate. Physics scripts enable objects to flow on lava surfaces and heat in real time. Rocks and textures in these packs could also be used as asteroids or in other environments.

Donations to support Starlight Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Starlight Children’s Foundation delivers happiness to seriously ill children and their families. Since 1982, Starlight’s ground-breaking and innovative programs, like Starlight Virtual Reality, Starlight Hospital Wear, and Starlight Gaming, have positively impacted 21 million kids at more than 800 children’s hospitals across the U.S. To learn more, visit www.starlight.org.

iceworld.description_text: Compose a terrain based on the motive of ice that will allow you to recreate an environment of frozen land, perfectly creating the atmosphere of winter and icy areas like frozen lakes or rivers. Lake and river variants behave like water so you can control water depth, shelf colors, blend with objects, and ice depth. Shader perfectly blends with the terrain. The asset contains: over 180 Ice materials (544 with all variants of shader), 88 Ice textures, tutorial demo scenes, a frozen river demo scene

genaifornet_buildllmappswithopenaiandoll.human_name: GenAI for .NET: Build LLM Apps with OpenAI and Ollama
genaifornet_buildllmappswithopenaiandoll.description_text: Explore the fascinating world of Large Language Models (LLMs) with .NET, OpenAI, and Ollama in this in-depth course. Starting with foundational concepts like tokenization, prompt engineering, and the differences between large and small language models, you'll quickly advance to creating real-world applications. The course includes building AI-driven chat apps, text analysis tools, and vector search applications using cutting-edge .NET libraries and frameworks. You'll get hands-on experience with a variety of LLM providers, including GitHub models, Ollama, and Azure AI Foundry, helping you determine the best AI provider for your needs. The course delves into building applications that use text completion, sentiment analysis, and structured output generation. You'll also learn how to enhance your applications with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), ensuring they can retrieve real-time data to generate more powerful responses. The course concludes with a comprehensive project where you'll create a fully functional EShop vector search application using .NET, the GPT-5-mini model, and the Qdrant vector database. By the end of the course, you'll be proficient in using .NET to build AI applications, deploy LLMs locally, and work with real-time data to enhance user experiences.

harnessingllmsandtext-embeddingsapiwithg.human_name: Harnessing LLMs & Text-Embeddings API with Google Vertex AI
harnessingllmsandtext-embeddingsapiwithg.description_text: This course takes you on an in-depth journey through the capabilities of Google Vertex AI's Text-Embeddings API. Beginning with an overview of the prerequisites and course structure, you’ll establish a solid foundation by setting up your development environment and configuring your Google Cloud Platform. This preparation is crucial as you delve into the intricacies of Vertex AI and begin generating sentence embeddings. As the course progresses, you'll explore the core functionalities of Vertex AI and the fundamentals of embeddings, including their applications in Generative AI and LLMs. With a focus on real-world scenarios, you’ll engage in hands-on exercises to visualize embeddings, conduct similarity searches, and comprehend the use of text and multimodal embeddings. Each module builds on the last, deepening your understanding and preparing you to tackle more complex tasks. By the end of the course, you’ll be proficient in using the Text-Embeddings API for various applications, including text generation and information extraction. You’ll learn to build and scale solutions like a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system and visualize data in meaningful ways. This comprehensive approach ensures that you understand their practical value, making you well-equipped to leverage Vertex AI in your projects.

harnessingopensourcellmsandchatgptwithmi.human_name: Harnessing Open Source LLMs and ChatGPT with Minimal Code
harnessingopensourcellmsandchatgptwithmi.description_text: Welcome to the captivating world of Large Language Models (LLMs)! This course is designed to guide you through the fascinating landscape of LLMs, encompassing both no-code and low-code solutions powered by Python. We begin by equipping you with the necessary software to operate these models locally, enabling you to explore various open-source models, including Google’s Gemma:7b and Llama3, without the need for an internet connection. In the advanced section, you will delve into using Python for streaming responses from open-source LLMs and integrating with the official OpenAI API. The course covers low code solutions for streaming ChatGPT responses and introduces function calling within ChatGPT models. You'll also learn about the llama3 model and how to interface it with Python for web applications. Throughout the course, you'll gain experience fetching responses in both batch and streaming modes, and we will jointly develop a small web frontend using Streamlit for our streaming LLM API. By the end of the course, you'll be equipped to run open-source LLMs locally and leverage their capabilities to the fullest.

neo4j_cyphergdsgraphqlllmknowledgegraphs.human_name: Neo4j: Cypher, GDS, GraphQL, LLM, Knowledge Graphs for RAG
neo4j_cyphergdsgraphqlllmknowledgegraphs.description_text: This course offers a complete journey through Neo4j, starting with graph database fundamentals and the property graph model. You will master Cypher, Neo4j’s powerful query language, through hands-on labs covering filtering, aggregation, and advanced queries like MERGE and shortest path. Next, you’ll explore the Graph Data Science (GDS) library, applying algorithms such as centrality, community detection, and node similarity to uncover deep insights in complex networks. The course also introduces GraphQL integration to build flexible APIs that simplify querying and mutating graph data. In advanced modules, you will build knowledge graphs from unstructured data using Large Language Models (LLMs), supported by Python scripting and cloud tools like Google Colab. You’ll learn to set up Neo4j environments, install key plugins, and optimize query performance for production use. Finally, you’ll explore emerging AI trends with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and GraphRAG techniques, enabling intelligent retrieval and content generation powered by knowledge graphs. This comprehensive approach combines theory, practical labs, and real-world use cases to prepare you for leveraging Neo4j in modern data and AI-driven applications.

buildappsandfine-tunellmsusingtheopenaia.human_name: Build Apps and Fine-Tune LLMs Using the OpenAI API
buildappsandfine-tunellmsusingtheopenaia.description_text: This hands-on course on OpenAI API and ChatGPT is a meticulously crafted course that caters to both beginners and seasoned professionals. You will begin by establishing a solid foundation with AI definitions and acronyms, progressing seamlessly to creating an OpenAI account, setting up your environment, and understanding pricing structures. Next, you will learn to navigate the landscape of language models and transformers, unraveling their transformative power in generative AI. Dive into advanced techniques such as prompt engineering and thought prompting, gaining insights into how language models process prompts with encoders. Real-world applications come to life as you explore translating articles, generating images, and utilizing the text-to-speech and Computer Vision APIs for diverse tasks. From basic to advanced translation techniques, including subtitle translation to multiple languages, the course ensures that you are equipped for a broad spectrum of applications. Finally, grasp the nuances of fine-tuning, deploy models with the OpenAI API, and navigate the ethical considerations with dos and don’ts in AI. By the end of the course, you will gain the expertise needed to use the capabilities of ChatGPT and OpenAI API for language tasks.

harnessingollama_createsecurelocalllmsol.human_name: Harnessing Ollama - Create Secure Local LLM Solutions with Python
harnessingollama_createsecurelocalllmsol.description_text: Discover how to deploy and harness the power of local LLMs with Ollama in this hands-on course. You'll begin by setting up and configuring Ollama on your system, gaining full control of large language models without relying on the cloud. Learn how to optimize resources, explore model parameters, and test various LLMs, including multimodal models like Llava, for text, vision, and code-generation tasks. Delve deeper into customizing models with the Modelfile and command-line tools to meet specific needs. The course covers executing terminal commands for monitoring, troubleshooting, and deploying models. You'll also integrate Ollama models with Python, leveraging its library and OpenAI API compatibility to build interactive applications. Advanced modules guide you through creating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems using LangChain, embedding databases, and querying capabilities for enhanced performance. As you progress, you'll set up ChatGPT-like interfaces for seamless model interaction and explore advanced workflows like function calling and voice-enabled RAG systems. By the end, you’ll master Ollama’s ecosystem, equipping you with the skills to build secure, private, and highly efficient LLM-based applications that can operate independently of cloud services.

preprocessingunstructureddataforllmsandr.human_name: Preprocessing Unstructured Data for LLMs and RAG Systems
preprocessingunstructureddataforllmsandr.description_text: This course offers an in-depth exploration of preprocessing unstructured data for large language models and retrieval-augmented generation systems. You’ll start by setting up your development environment and configuring essential APIs, ensuring a solid technical foundation. Next, you’ll dive into data preprocessing techniques, tackling challenges like content extraction, cleaning, and data normalization, making your data ready for advanced AI models. As you progress, the course provides hands-on experience with various document types such as PDFs, HTML, and PPTX files. You’ll learn to transform these unstructured formats into structured data that AI systems can easily process. Advanced modules cover chunking, metadata extraction, and handling complex documents using cutting-edge techniques like visual transformers and document layout detectors. The final section guides you in building a complete RAG system using the skills acquired throughout the course. You’ll preprocess diverse documents, implement semantic similarity searches, and save elements to a vector database. By the end, you’ll be equipped to create intelligent data pipelines and interact with your documents using AI, significantly enhancing your data-driven projects.

buildanddeployaiwithhuggingface_hands-on.human_name: Build & Deploy AI with Hugging Face - Hands-On
buildanddeployaiwithhuggingface_hands-on.description_text: This course is a comprehensive guide to mastering the Hugging Face ecosystem, beginning with a deep dive into models, datasets, and spaces. The course helps learners explore how these components interact, enabling the creation of powerful AI applications. You’ll gain a hands-on understanding of pre-trained models from the Hugging Face Hub, using them for a range of AI tasks, such as text classification or natural language processing. As the course progresses, you'll delve into fine-tuning models with the Transformers library, gaining expertise in optimizing model performance. You’ll also master the art of preparing and tokenizing datasets using the Datasets library, learning essential techniques for efficient data handling. From here, you’ll explore model evaluation, logging, and how to improve your AI applications through advanced workflows. The course concludes with deploying AI models as interactive applications using Hugging Face Spaces. You’ll learn to use platforms like Gradio and Streamlit to deploy your models, making them accessible for real-world applications. By the end of this journey, you will have the skills and confidence to create production-ready AI solutions, from training and fine-tuning to scaling and deployment.

aiandllmengineeringmastery_genairagcompl.human_name: AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide
aiandllmengineeringmastery_genairagcompl.description_text: This course is your launchpad into the fast-growing world of Generative AI and LLM application development. You'll begin by setting up a robust development environment and, if needed, reviewing Python fundamentals. From there, you'll dive into deep learning, machine learning, and neural network theory to build a strong conceptual foundation. Next, you'll shift to hands-on learning—exploring the architecture of LLMs and how Transformer models work. You'll develop real-world applications using Hugging Face’s Transformers and LangChain, while mastering Prompt Engineering, OpenAI API integration, memory management, and logging in AI-driven apps. Projects include chatbots, PDF RAG systems, news summarizers, and voice assistants designed for interactive, context-aware experiences. In the final chapters, you'll fine-tune LLMs using OpenAI tools and advanced techniques like LoRA. The course concludes by guiding you through the full lifecycle of AI application development—from concept to deployment as a production API. Whether you're starting out in GenAI or refining your LLM skills, this course equips you to build powerful AI solutions with confidence.

mcpcompleteguide_buildandconnecttoolsfor.human_name: MCP Complete Guide - Build and Connect Tools for LLMs
mcpcompleteguide_buildandconnecttoolsfor.description_text: This comprehensive course offers a deep dive into MCP (Model Context Protocol), guiding learners from fundamental concepts to advanced applications for building and connecting tools for Large Language Models (LLMs). You’ll start by setting up the MCP environment and exploring the server-client architecture, learning how to connect clients to locally and remotely hosted MCP servers. The course covers key topics such as using MCP servers to interact with local files, make API calls, and integrate with external AI models or web searches. It also explores advanced concepts, including managing memory, deploying solutions via package managers like Git, and working with complex inputs. Special focus is given to remote MCP servers using Streamable HTTP and virtual machines, ensuring learners are equipped to handle both local and remote configurations. Through hands-on examples like building a memory tracker and multi-server solutions, this course provides a robust understanding of MCP tools, resources, prompts, and deployment techniques. By the end, you’ll have the knowledge to build and deploy sophisticated MCP systems, enhancing your ability to work with LLMs and integrate them with other tools effectively.

completelangchainandllmsguide.description_text: This comprehensive masterclass takes you on a transformative journey into the realm of LangChain and Large Language Models, equipping you with the skills to build autonomous AI tools. Starting with the basics, you'll set up your development environment, including OpenAI API and Python, and progress to advanced topics like LangChain's architecture, prompt templates, and parsers. The course meticulously guides you through creating complex chains, memory models, and agents, culminating in the development of practical applications such as PDF extractors, newsletter generators, and multi-document chatbots. With hands-on tutorials, you'll learn to leverage LangChain for tasks ranging from document loading and splitting to embedding vector stores for semantic similarity searches. By the end, you'll have the knowledge to implement AI in creative and impactful ways, from image-to-text conversion to building interactive chatbots and more, all while navigating the ethical considerations of AI deployment.

aisecurityfundamentals_llmthreatsandowas.human_name: AI Security Fundamentals - LLM Threats and OWASP Principles 2026
aisecurityfundamentals_llmthreatsandowas.description_text: Learn to secure LLM applications by addressing threats like prompt injection, data poisoning, and implementing OWASP principles for effective protection.

productionllmmonitoring_observabilitytra.human_name: Production LLM Monitoring: Observability, Tracing & Cost Optimization
productionllmmonitoring_observabilitytra.description_text: Production LLM systems introduce unpredictable token usage, hidden RAG multipliers, and debugging blind spots that traditional monitoring cannot solve. This course begins by building the business case for observability, demonstrating how tracing and cost transparency directly impact ROI. You will explore how LLM costs accumulate, where money leaks inside pipelines, and why traditional observability models fall short for generative AI workloads. The journey then moves into platform evaluation and hands-on implementation. You will set up Langfuse, understand its data model, create traces, and instrument multi-step RAG workflows. Framework integrations such as LangChain are covered to show how real production systems capture spans, metadata, and token usage. Each step transforms abstract monitoring theory into practical, deployable code patterns. In the final sections, the focus shifts to optimization and operational excellence. You will implement prompt tuning, semantic caching, smart model routing, cost alerts, and monitoring dashboards. The course concludes with security patterns, PII redaction strategies, and enterprise-ready production practices, ensuring you leave with a complete observability and cost governance framework.

aillmfundamentals_introtolargelanguagemo.human_name: AI LLM Fundamentals: Intro to Large Language Models+ChatGPT
aillmfundamentals_introtolargelanguagemo.description_text: This course introduces Large Language Models (LLMs) and their pivotal role in AI. It starts with a historical overview of artificial intelligence, followed by in-depth exploration of LLM architecture, including machine learning, transformers, deep learning, and neural networks. You'll also learn about embeddings and fine-tuning models for specific tasks. As you progress, discover how LLMs are transforming generative AI, with practical insights into prompt engineering and using tools like ChatGPT. You'll learn to create content using templates and refine outputs, all while considering the ethical implications of AI. The course ensures you're equipped to use LLMs effectively for various AI-driven tasks. In addition, you'll explore popular LLMs like GPT, understanding their use in content creation, translation, and natural language processing. The course emphasizes hands-on experience, teaching you to tailor LLMs for specific domains. You’ll also delve into the latest advancements in LLMs, model scaling, and AI research, preparing you to apply your knowledge confidently in real-world scenarios.

trainlargelanguagemodelsfaster_paralleli.human_name: Train Large Language Models Faster - Parallelism Deep Dive
trainlargelanguagemodelsfaster_paralleli.description_text: This course offers an in-depth exploration of parallelism in Large Language Model (LLM) training. Beginning with foundational IT concepts like cloud computing, GPUs, and network communication, the course introduces various parallelism techniques such as data parallelism, model parallelism, hybrid approaches, and pipeline parallelism, explaining their benefits and trade-offs. You’ll then apply these strategies in hands-on demos using real-world datasets like MNIST and WikiText. As you progress, you’ll work on true parallelism with multiple GPUs through platforms like Runpod.io, and dive into essential topics such as fault tolerance, scalability, and checkpointing strategies. These lessons ensure your training systems are resilient and optimized for large-scale machine learning workflows. With insights into GPU architectures and advanced tools like DeepSpeed, you'll be equipped to handle the complexities of training massive models efficiently. Whether you're an AI researcher or a data scientist, this course provides the knowledge and practical experience needed to accelerate LLM training and build scalable, efficient AI systems. Through a combination of theoretical lessons and hands-on applications, you’ll master parallelism techniques and become proficient in building and optimizing high-performance LLM training pipelines.

fromrecipetochef_becomeanllmengineer.human_name: From Recipe to Chef - Become an LLM Engineer
fromrecipetochef_becomeanllmengineer.description_text: This course takes you from AI novice to skilled LLM engineer using a creative culinary metaphor. You'll start with a flavorful intro to language models, their evolution, and how they predict text. As you progress, you'll explore how data quality, tokenization, and bias impact training, before diving into the model development process—training, tuning, and optimizing performance using real-world tools. Prompt engineering is framed as seasoning your outputs, teaching techniques like zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought prompting. You’ll then explore deployment options, API creation, UI design, and cloud hosting to serve your models effectively. The journey wraps with hands-on app development, monitoring techniques, and capstone projects to solidify your expertise. You’ll leave this course ready to build, deploy, and refine LLM-powered apps, with a strong portfolio and the practical skills needed for a career in AI.

langchainmasterclass_build15openaiandlla.human_name: LangChain Masterclass - Build 15 OpenAI and LLAMA 2 LLM Apps Using Python
langchainmasterclass_build15openaiandlla.description_text: This course offers an in-depth exploration of LangChain and its integration with OpenAI and LLAMA 2 for building state-of-the-art LLM applications. Starting with an introduction to LangChain, you’ll learn how to harness its power to create dynamic applications, from simple question-and-answer apps to complex conversational tools. The course covers key concepts such as HuggingFace token generation, environment setup, and how to utilize models, memory, and data connections in LangChain. You’ll then move into projects, such as creating a simple Q&A app, a text-to-SQL query tool, and even a customer care call summary alert system. By the end of the course, you’ll have built 15 diverse LangChain apps, including email generators, HR resume screeners, and data analysis tools, each showcasing LangChain's flexibility and power for building LLM applications. This course also provides a deep dive into essential LangChain modules, such as the prompt module, chains, and agents, equipping you with the skills to develop sophisticated workflows. Additionally, you’ll gain practical experience in integrating and deploying applications using Streamlit, HuggingFace, and Pinecone, ensuring you're well-prepared to tackle real-world projects in AI-driven app development.

naturallanguageprocessing_transformerswi.human_name: Natural Language Processing - Transformers with Hugging Face
naturallanguageprocessing_transformerswi.description_text: This course begins with a warm welcome and an overview of the curriculum, setting the stage for an exciting journey into the world of Natural Language Processing (NLP). The initial section ensures you are well-prepared, guiding you on how to access the necessary code and providing tips for succeeding in the course. We delve deep into the realm of Transformers, starting from the basics of Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) and advancing to the attention mechanisms that power modern NLP models. The course covers a wide range of practical applications, including sentiment analysis, text generation, embeddings, semantic search, and named entity recognition. Each concept is paired with hands-on Python tutorials, enabling you to implement these techniques in real-world scenarios. By the end of this course, you will have a solid understanding of various NLP tasks and how to approach them using Hugging Face's powerful library. Whether you are analyzing sentiment, summarizing text, or translating languages, this course equips you with the skills to tackle these challenges efficiently. The comprehensive coverage ensures you gain both theoretical knowledge and practical experience, making you proficient in applying Transformers to solve complex NLP problems.

worldwildlifefund.description_text:
Payments to the World Wildlife Fund are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

WWF is one of the world’s largest and most experienced independent conservation organizations, with over 5 million supporters and a global network active in more than 100 countries.

WWF’s mission is to stop the degradation of the planet’s natural environment and to build a future in which humans live in harmony with nature, by conserving the world’s biological diversity, ensuring that the use of renewable natural resources is sustainable, and promoting the reduction of pollution and wasteful consumption.

The WWF name and logo are used with its permission, which in no way constitutes an endorsement, express or implied, of any product, service, company, opinion or political position. The WWF name and logo is a registered trademark owned by WWF. For more information about WWF, please visit www.wwf.org

from_bundle.tile_short_name: The Ultimate GenAI & LLM Developer Bundle
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get The Complete LangChain & LLMs Guide, Build Apps and Fine-Tune LLMs Using the OpenAI API, Preprocessing Unstructured Data for LLMs and RAG Systems, AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Learn how to create your own LLMs and GenAI that understand, generate, and process at lightning speed with an all-new Humble Video Learning Bundle. Jump-start your career with this 15+ course library, highlighted by The Complete LangChain & LLMs Guide and AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide, you’ll gain the knowledge and confidence you need to succeed in these challenging and in-demand fields. Pay what you want for the ultimate GenAI and LLM bundle, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!
from_bundle.author: Packt

basic_data.human_name: Humble Book Bundle: The Ultimate Biohacking & High-Performance Lifestyle Bundle
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: Looking for new ways to get healthier this summer? Take control of your habits with biohacking—the art of making lifestyle changes that improve your health, performance, and longevity—with this high-performance bundle from the teaching experts at Wiley. Forge your own path to better health with meaningful eBooks like Stress Management For Dummies, Biochemistry For Dummies, and more. Don’t be a dummy—unlock these helpful eBooks today and help support the Movember Foundation with your purchase.
basic_data.description:
Start feeling better than ever. Looking for new ways to get healthier this summer? Take control of your habits with biohacking—the art of making lifestyle changes that improve your health, performance, and longevity—with this high-performance bundle from the teaching experts at Wiley. Forge your own path to better health with meaningful eBooks like Stress Management For Dummies, Biochemistry For Dummies, and more. Don’t be a dummy—unlock these helpful eBooks today and help support the Movember Foundation with your purchase.

Pay $2 or more. Normally, the total cost for the ebooks in this bundle is as much as $421. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $2 purchase.

Read them anywhere. The ebooks in this bundle are available in PDF and ePUB format, so they work on your computer, e-readers, iPads, cell phones, and a wide array of mobile devices! Instructions and a list of recommended reading programs can be found here.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publisher and to support Movember. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

brainhealthfordummies.description_text:
Whether looking to improve your cognitive performance, prevent diseases of brain aging, or support an aging loved one, Brain Health For Dummies is the ultimate evidence-based guide to understanding the brains role in the various stages of our lives.

By integrating a wealth of expert advice and strategies, this approachable resource breaks down the science of our brain and gives you clear steps on how to optimize your brain health. Ensure youre living your best life with Brain Health for Dummies. 

Inside:

- Brain health as it relates to: children, adolescents, adults, sex and gender differences, and diseases of aging.

- Modifiable risk factors, and strategies for improving brain health through lifestyle changes (e.g., diet, exercise, stress reduction, sleep and social engagement).

– The impact of concussion, genetics, environmental factors, and how mental health impacts brain health.

- How to alter your behavior and develop a lifestyle plan for maintaining a healthy brain at any life stage.

healthyagingfordummies.description_text:
Healthy Aging For Dummies shows readers how to effectively approach the aging process and how to deal with the body and mind.

It covers:

- Tips and advice on choosing the ideal physician, starting an exercise program, learning to meditate, taking the right vitamins and herbs, etc

- Dealing with or preventing heart disease, cancer, and dementia, explaining why these things happen and what can be done to improve their effects,

- Replacing negative thinking with positive thinking, building memory and learning skills.

guthealthfordummies.description_text:
Gut Health For Dummies will serve as the essential guide for restoring and improving your gut health. With an introduction to gut health, youll gain the foundation for understanding what makes the gut so important and how it influences the rest of your body.

Figure out how to manage your digestive disorders and gut symptoms, and find what diet and lifestyle works best for you.

So, whether youre one of the millions struggling with gut issues or youre trying to be proactive about your health, Gut Health For Dummies will set you on the right path to optimizing your gut health!

Includes:

- An introduction to gut health, restoring gut health, diet and lifestyle for good gut health, and adopting healthy habits for good gut health and longevity.

mindfulnessfordummies3rdedition.description_text:
Are you tired, unproductive or stressed out?

Maybe you're suffering from high-blood pressure, illness or even chronic pain?

Recommended by medical professionals throughout the UK, mindfulness helps to clear the mind of the distracting thoughts and mental clutter that accumulate day-to-day.

Focusing on breathing and other self-control techniques, mindfulness is scientifically proven to leave patients calmer, more self-aware, and free from the unrealistic expectations that damage the way we all live and work. And with this expert, easy-to-follow guide, there's never been a better time to get to grips with mindfulness and the many ways it can help you lead a happier, healthier life.  

Mindfulness For Dummies, 3rd Edition includes:      

- Small steps to being more mindful      

- Insights on motivation and ability      

- The latest research on mindfulness and the brain      

- The importance of self-compassion and self-care

organicchemistryifordummies2ndedition.human_name: Organic Chemistry I For Dummies, 2nd Edition
organicchemistryifordummies2ndedition.description_text:
This book will explain the principles of organic chemistry in simple terms and include worked-out problems to assist in understanding the field.

Organic Chemistry is a course needed by all pre-med and nursing students. It is also said to be the most difficult course students take with a low passing rate. 

Organic Chemistry I For Dummies, 2nd Edition, will feature new and revised material including:

- Renewed example equations

- New explanations and practical examples that reflect todays teaching methods

- eBook formats that were not previously available

cognitivepsychologyfordummies.description_text:
Written for psychology students - not other academics -

Cognitive Psychology For Dummies is an accessible and entertaining introduction to the field.

Having found most textbooks to be too dense and jargon-laden, the authors of this title demystify the core concepts of cognitive psychology and provide readers with the tools they need to succeed.

Cognitive Psychology For Dummies follows a typical university course, which makes it the perfect supplement for students in need of a clear (and enjoyable) overview of the topic.

geneticsfordummies4thedition.description_text:
Genetics For Dummies, 4th Edition is a perfect course supplement for students pursuing degrees in the biological sciences. It's packed with coverage of recent discoveries in the field of genetics and provides science lovers of all skill levels with easy-to-follow and easy-to-understand information about this increasingly advanced field. 

Genetics For Dummies, 4th Edition includes a basic overview of cell biology, how genetics can affect your health and wellbeing, breakthroughs in genetic testing, whole-genome sequencing, and so much more!

nutritionfordummies7thedition.description_text:
The 2020-2025 Dietary Guidelines for Americans will be out later this year. The guidelines provide evidence-based nutrition information and advice to help Americans make healthy choices about food and beverage in their daily lives.  

Nutrition For Dummies, 7th Edition, will include the latest information, including what readers need to know about the upcoming report and its suggestions for living a nutritionally-sound life.

New and updated information includes:

- Focus on life stages: For the first time, specific guidance will be included for pregnant women, as well as infants and toddlers from birth to 24 months.

- Dietary patterns: What is the relationship between dietary patterns (at each stage of life) and disease?

- Obesity and dementia: A study has found that obesity in midlife is linked to a greater risk of dementia later in life.

- The end of the peanut allergy?: Peanut allergies could become a thing of the past as breakthrough research from the University of South Australia develops a radically novel vaccination thats poised to cure the potentially life threatening condition.

- Eating disorders: New research on DNA samples from thousands of people with anorexia has found a link to genes involved in regulating metabolism, as well as those connected with anxiety and obsessive-compulsive disorders.

movember.description_text:
Payments to The Movember Foundation are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Movember is the leading charity changing the face of men’s health on a global scale, focusing on mental health and suicide prevention, prostate cancer and testicular cancer.

The charity raises funds to deliver innovative, breakthrough research and support programmes that enable men to live happier, healthier and longer lives. In addition to tackling key health issues faced by men, Movember is working to encourage men to stay healthy in all areas of their life, with a focus on men staying socially connected and becoming more open to discussing their health and significant moments in their lives.

livinglongerfordummies.description_text:
What’s the average human life span...72 years...78 years? Actually, science has determined that humans were designed to live 120 years, and that, until now, most people died too soon. It’s also now clear that most of the maladies we commonly associate with aging, such as frailty, senility, and arthritis aren’t part of nature’s plan, but the result of other factors such as bad nutrition, disease ,and disuse. Best of all is the news that, no matter how old you are or what shape you’re in, you can take steps to reverse the aging process that has already occurred in you and to slow your rate of aging in the future.

You’re never too old–or too young–to begin living a longer, healthier life, and Living Longer For Dummies can show you how. Written by a leading national expert on aging, it’s packed with life-changing tips on nutrition, exercise, attitude and behavior, that can help enhance and sustain your physical and psychological well- being to age 100 and beyond.

You’ll discover how to:

- Slow your rate of aging

- Reverse many of the effects of aging

- Avoid maladies associated with age

- Keep your mind and senses sharp

- Maintain limberness and muscle tone

- Keep your energy level high

- Rebound from illness

- Stay sexually active

Dr. Bortz shatters common myths about aging and explains, in plain English, what science now knows about the normal aging process in humans. And he explores a wide range of life-prolonging topics, including:

- Getting good health care

- Exercising to stay healthy for life

- Eating right for a long life

- Getting adequate rest and relaxation

- Using alternative medicine and exercise techniques

- Maintaining brain-power

- Having sex to prolong your life and coping with sexual difficulties

- Handling health crises

The number of people age 100 and older increases a whopping 8 percent every year in the United States? If you choose to, you can become one of them someday. Let Living Longer For Dummies show you how.

neurosciencefordummies3rdedition.description_text:
The field of neuroscience has been transformed by new technologies and an explosion of knowledge about the brain.

The new edition will be fully updated to reflect these and other rapid advances in the field, while honoring its commitment to be student-friendly with new illustrations.

Updates will include:      

- New content on genetics and epigenetics      

- Increased coverage of hippocampus: Where memory begins to be stored in brain      

- Expanded coverage on depression      

- Latest research and advances in our understanding of the mind-body connection and learning

biochemistryfordummies3rdedition.description_text:
ITS ALL CARBON AND IT ALWAYS HAS BEEN

From proteins to carbon to lipids, the details of how chemical reactions create life can seem overwhelming. But not anymore, thanks to Biochemistry For Dummies 3e!

Readers will gain a foundational understanding of whats inside a cell, the basics structures of all living organisms, and how to apply all these microscopic details to the big picture of life.

This book tracks to an typical college-level biochemistry class, and it gives students an extra resource to help them get the grades they need.

INSIDE:

- Cell biology

- Carbohydrates, proteins, and lipids

- Easy to follow diagrams

- Real life examples

developers.developer-name: John T. Moore, Richard H. Langley

anatomyandphysiologyfordummies3rdedition.description_text:
Anatomy & Physiology For Dummies, 3rd Edition, combines anatomical terminology and function so readers not only learn names and terms but also gain an understanding of how the human body works.

Readers of this updated edition will come to understand the meanings of terms in anatomy and physiology, will get to know the body's anatomical structures, and will gain insights into how the structures and systems function in sickness and health.

meditationfordummies4thedition.description_text:
This new edition will present the latest research on the health benefits of meditation, along with new advice on how to get the most out of meditation in today's fast-paced world.

Updates include:

- The latest research on the causes of happiness and how meditation can improve mood. A new chapter on the growing trend of meditation in the workplace.

- How meditation and other mindfulness practices have made their way into hospitals, schools, prisons, and military groups.

- Increasing practice of mindfulness meditation--an activity where you make time deliberately and consciously for cultivating mindfulness.

Beyond the book: 

The updated multimedia component for the 4th Edition will be hosted at Dummies.com and will feature companion guided meditations and music that will help readers master the concepts and techniques covered in the book including mediation in the workplace.

intermittentfastingfordummies.description_text:
Intermittent Fasting For Dummies discusses the six standard methods of IF and their benefits, as each type is effective but may not be the right fit for everyone.

Learn to:

- Select which intermittent fasting diet plan works best for you.

- Make more than 50 health and delicious calorie-controlled meals.

- Lose weight the easier way and keep it off.

- Improve your health and prevent disease.

fitnessfordummies4thedition.description_text:
In addition to clear, concise information and all-new informative photos and illustrations throughout, readers of Fitness For Dummies, 4th Edition, will find:

- The latest ways to achieve motivation and social support from digital sources such as Twitter, Facebook, and podcasts Information on taking advantage of group classes, video instructors/systems (such as Wii Fit), available apps, in-shoe tracking systems, digital watch training systems, and more

- The latest tips and methods to test their own fitness levels, set realistic goals, stick with their program, and get great results

- Advice on making sense of the latest scientific studies that pop up in the news media almost daily

- Ways to identify where fat is sneaking into their diet

- The most up-to-date advice on getting the most out of high-tech exercise machines and equipment, plus tips for using plain ol' barbells and dumbbells or a simple jump rope to achieve the same results

- A revised nutrition chapter reflecting updated information on such topics as trans fats, vitamin D, and soy

- Refreshed information on using BMI rather than waist-to-hip ratio and waist measurements as a diagnostic tool to identify weight problems

- Step-by-step instructions on creating a home gym on a budget

stressmanagementfordummies3rdedition.description_text:
Lower stress and anxiety with accessible tips you can use today

Whether related to love, work, family, or other parts of everyday life, Stress Management For Dummies, 3rd Edition is dedicated to helping you stock up your wellness toolbox. This new edition will help you identify your stress triggers and ways to manage them, practice mindfulness and meditation, understand the mind-body connection and how this applies to you and your experience, apply quieting rumination, and more.

With straightforward advice incorporating scientific research on the relationship between stress and health, Stress Management For Dummies, 3rd Edition provides practical tips on how to use key techniques, including the power of gratitude and perspective, to transform your mindset and improve your resilience toward stress.

Inside:

- Explore the impacts that stress has on your biology—including sleep

- Find step-by-step guidance that demonstrates how to manage worry and feel less anxious

- Discover your mental health needs and ways to implement them in your everyday life

- Understand the effects of smartphones, social media, and world events on your mental health and ways to cope

Stress Management For Dummies, 3rd Edition is a trustable, calming handbook that helps you reduce stress and build the life you want.

movember.description_text:
Payments to The Movember Foundation are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Movember is the leading charity changing the face of men’s health on a global scale, focusing on mental health and suicide prevention, prostate cancer and testicular cancer.

The charity raises funds to deliver innovative, breakthrough research and support programmes that enable men to live happier, healthier and longer lives. In addition to tackling key health issues faced by men, Movember is working to encourage men to stay healthy in all areas of their life, with a focus on men staying socially connected and becoming more open to discussing their health and significant moments in their lives.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: The Ultimate Biohacking & High-Performance Lifestyle Bundle
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Gut Health For Dummies, Brain Health For Dummies, Intermittent Fasting For Dummies, Cognitive Psychology For Dummies, Biochemistry For Dummies, 3rd Edition, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Looking for new ways to get healthier this summer? Take control of your habits with biohacking—the art of making lifestyle changes that improve your health, performance, and longevity—with this high-performance bundle from the teaching experts at Wiley. Forge your own path to better health with meaningful eBooks like Stress Management For Dummies, Biochemistry For Dummies, and more. Don’t be a dummy—unlock these helpful eBooks today and help support the Movember Foundation with your purchase.
from_bundle.author: Wiley

basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Get ready for your next steam-powered adventure with this digital Ticket to Ride bundle—which includes digital copies of the main game and a haul of expansions! Ride the rails of iconic American train lines in the original version, or plan your international jaunt into the Nordic countries, the nations of Europe, the cherry-lined railways of Japan, and the jungles and savannahs at the Heart of Africa. Plan your routes, challenge your friends, and fill the world with trains! Get this bundle before it leaves the station at the price of your choosing, and support the baby banks of Little Village, providing clothes and toys for babies in need.

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 29th, 2027
basic_data.short_marketing_blurb: All aboard your new favorite game!
basic_data.description:
All aboard your new favorite game! Get ready for your next steam-powered adventure with this digital Ticket to Ride bundle—which includes digital copies of the main game and a haul of expansions! Ride the rails of iconic American train lines in the original version, or plan your international jaunt into the Nordic countries, the nations of Europe, the cherry-lined railways of Japan, and the jungles and savannahs at the Heart of Africa. Plan your routes, challenge your friends, and fill the world with trains! Get this bundle before it leaves the station at the price of your choosing, and support the baby banks of Little Village, providing clothes and toys for babies in need.

Pay $10 or more. Normally, the total cost for the games in this bundle is as much as $89. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $10 purchase. Pay $10 or more to access Steam keys.
