Keys expire. Please redeem before May 29th, 2027

tickettoride.callout: Discover a fresh adaptation of the iconic, multi-award-winning board game. Play against fellow fans around the world, or take on state-of-the-art AI opponents. Build a railway empire, claim routes and dominate your competitors on the leaderboards
tickettoride.description_text:
Play the ultimate digital version of the multi-award-winning modern classic board game Ticket to Ride!

Journey across various countries, connecting their vibrant cities and exploring their unique gameplay mechanics and bonuses on the way.

Ticket to Ride offers a variety of game modes to suit you. Want to get competitive? Head online to challenge other players around the world and climb the leaderboards, or play with friends further afield in a private game. Got a packed schedule? Set up or join an asynchronous game and play across multiple days – we’ll notify you when it is your turn, so you can go at your own pace.

Test out new strategies or keep it casual in single-player mode against state-of-the-art AI opponents. You can even make a game night of it with friends and family in couch play!

Get to know a cast of unforgettable characters, each bringing their own tales to the table. Add new locomotives and carriages to your fleet with every expansion, and cement your name in railway history on the leaderboard!

Become a railway legend in the iconic, fan-favourite modern classic

  • Players are dealt a number of tickets and must pick a certain number to keep (depending on the map).

  • Players are also dealt four train cards of various colours. This number can also vary depending on the map you’re playing on, but don’t worry – the AI takes care of this!

  • Each turn, players can draw two train cards from the face-up pile, draw two train cards from the face-down pile, draw another ticket to complete, or use their train cards to claim a route! A claimed route is shown by placing train pieces along the route.

  • When a player has three or fewer train pieces left, the last round starts. Whoever has the most points at the end of the game is the winner!

Play online with friends or enjoy a seamless matchmaking experience when you challenge players from around the world. Alternatively, take on your friend sitting right next to you in couch play – use the free Ticket to Ride Companion App to really boost your couch gaming session!

Set up a game in async mode and play a game across multiple days.

Powered by an innovative adaptive AI system, single-player mode offers a challenge for new and experienced players alike.

Every moment has been brought to life with beautiful graphics that will immerse you in the adventure.

Every game presents fresh challenges, and it’s your mission to work out the most efficient solutions. Collect points by completing tickets, linking destinations and building the longest route.

Join the Marmalade Game Studio Discord server to connect with players, organise matches, see the latest news and updates, and take part in events!

tickettoride_legendaryasiaexpansion.callout: Plan your mountain routes carefully, as they’ll cost you an additional train piece for each X marked there—but you’ll get an additional two points for each discarded piece! Aim for the Asian Explorer Bonus by connecting the most cities in one network.
tickettoride_legendaryasiaexpansion.description_text:
Nǐ hǎo! Annyeong haseyo! Xin chào! Salam!

Pack your bags and get ready for the trip of a lifetime in Ticket to Ride’s Legendary Asia Expansion!

Travel across incredible mountainous terrain, connecting cities along the length and breadth of Asia. Plan your mountain routes carefully, as they’ll cost you an additional train piece for each X marked there – but you’ll get an additional two points for each discarded piece!

Grab an extra 10 bonus points with the Asian Explorer Bonus! Connect the most cities in one network to earn this endgame bonus.

INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Travel with Wang Ling, an elegant opera singer, and Lê Chinh, a wandering artisan, as they showcase their talents across Asia.

  • TWO NEW TRAINS – Climb aboard the impressive Emperor or the trusty Mountain Maiden and set off on your thrilling journey!

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – Relax in the luxury Silk Zephyr carriage or tap into your spiritual side in the Pagoda Pilgrim.

Add another awe-inspiring destination to your train journey!

tickettoride_usa1910.callout: Travel back to USA 1910 and begin your railway empire once more. Enjoy 35 new tickets and 3 new game modes and earn the Globetrotter Bonus for completing the most tickets!
tickettoride_usa1910.description_text:
Expand your base game with 3 new Game variants and a whole new deck of Destinations tickets! Includes 35 new Destination Tickets and a new GlobeTrotter bonus card for completing the most tickets. There are three new ways to play: the 1910 variant, using only the new Destination Tickets; the Mega Game variant, featuring all tickets; and the Big Cities variant, with select large cities tickets.

Key Features:

  • 3 new ways to play the original US Map
  • 1910 variant features 35 whole new Destination Tickets
  • Mega Game features a huge deck of 69 Destination Tickets!
  • Big Cities variant exclusively features Tickets to major US cities
  • New GlobeTrotter Bonus for most tickets completed

 

Copyright ©2004-2016 Days of Wonder Inc.

humblestorediscountcouponforgermanyexpan.human_name: Humble Store discount coupon for Germany Expansion
humblestorediscountcouponforgermanyexpan.description_text:
Get 25% Off Ticket To Ride: Polar Expansion

NOTE: Expires June 12th, 2026, 6pm PST. Does not stack with Humble Store sales.

The Ticket to Ride: Germany Expansion arrives with carriages full of Passengers! 

Set off across the country alongside atelier owner Franziska Braun and scholar Reinhard Hofmann, connect cities and countries with Long and Short Tickets, and pick up Passengers to earn bonus points.

When you set up a game of Ticket to Ride: Germany Expansion, 60 Passengers are distributed across various cities on the map. Build the most connected routes while also gathering the most Passengers of a given colour – red, black, green, yellow, blue or white – to win!  

Wrap around the rails with the swift Schlange train, or choose the Immer Zuverlässige train for reliability. Attach the cosy Gemütlichkeit carriage or the double-decker Neue Höhen carriage. 

Connect places and people in Ticket to Ride: Germany Expansion today! 

INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Journey across Germany with atelier owner Franziska Braun and scholar Reinhard Hofmann. 

  • TWO NEW TRAINS – Add the Schlange train and the Immer Zuverlässige train to your train collection!

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – Gather your Passengers into the comfy Gemütlichkeit or impressive Neue Höhen carriages. 

Show the world your strategic skill when you play the Ticket to Ride: Germany Expansion!

tickettoride_sanfranciscocityexpansion.callout: Cruise through San Francisco in the Sixties! This fast-paced expansion introduces Souvenirs—collect these trinkets as you travel to earn massive bonus points at the end of the game
tickettoride_sanfranciscocityexpansion.description_text:
Travel back in time and explore San Francisco in the Sixties as this fan-favourite map gets the digital treatment for the first time!

By rail or road, take in the city sights and gather Souvenirs from your trip as you go. Meet fashion designer Summer Ashbury and silver-screen icon Felix Woods as you embark on the ultimate city break.

Want a speedy game? This city map is perfect for those times when you want to squeeze in a quick match and enjoy a bit of Ticket to Ride on the fly! Save even more time with the brand-new rematch feature, which allows players to dive back into a game right away. Simply tap the “Rematch” button in the endgame screen and you’ll be kept in the lobby with other players who want another round.

Plus, to celebrate San Francisco coming to the video game version of Ticket to Ride for the first time, we’re giving away a free bonus token to every player – with or without the San Francisco City Expansion!



INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Seek out inspiration with fashion designer Summer Ashbury or enjoy a life of luxury with movie star Felix Woods.

  • MULTIPLE NEW VEHICLES – Travel by rail or by road! This expansion introduces trams and cars to your usual line-up of trains and carriages.

  • SOUVENIRS – Make sure to pick up those trinkets as you travel the city! The more Souvenirs you pick up, the more points you’ll earn at the end of the game.

The city break of your dreams awaits!

tickettoride_switzerlandexpansion.callout: Ticket to Ride’s most competitive map yet! In Switzerland, you'll connect neighboring countries to one another. With limited nodes and country-to-country tickets, you’ll have to think fast to keep up
tickettoride_switzerlandexpansion.description_text:
Take in the stunning sights of nature’s very own masterpiece as you strategise your way across Ticket to Ride’s most competitive map yet – the Switzerland Expansion!

You’ll need to plan several moves ahead when you play this uniquely challenging map. Not only will you connect cities to cities, you’ll be connecting neighbouring countries to one another. With limited nodes available to do so, you’ll have to think fast to keep up!

The new country-to-country tickets offer a list of countries to attempt to connect. Build at least one of the requested routes to complete the ticket and score points – but if you fail to do so, you’ll have points deducted.

Are you ready to take on the unique challenge of the Switzerland Expansion?

INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Join professional photographer Ayla Vogel and artisan watchmaker Elias Hartmann as they journey across Switzerland and beyond.

  • TWO NEW TRAINS – Climb aboard the Splendid Smokestack or take on any weather in the Blizzardblaster!

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – Go at your own pace in the Golden Wanderer or enjoy the quirky vibes of the Barrelbahn!

Put your railway-building skills to the test and get Ticket to Ride: The Switzerland Expansion today!

tickettoride_heartofafricaexpansion.callout: Venture into the Heart of Africa to build routes through some of the continent's most remote and desolate locales. Will you bolster your terrain surveying skills and local knowledge to try and establish more valuable routes – or dare to dash across the continent in a mad race to cut the game short?
tickettoride_heartofafricaexpansion.description_text:
Head to the Heart of Africa for the first time in digital Ticket to Ride!

Meet festival organiser Blessing Kipruto and griot Nnamdi Okpara as you travel across a variety of new terrains, building your train network on this vibrant map.

Utilise the new Terrain cards to double your points on a completed route! There are three types of Terrain cards to master – Desert and Savanna, which covers yellow, orange and red routes; Jungle and Forest, which covers purple, blue and green routes; and Mountain and Cliff, which covers white, grey and black routes.

Set off in the historic Fahagola railbus or the Safari Sights car, coupled with either the Animal Trails or the Stately Travels carriages!

Plus, switch the Heart of Africa map view with the new Landscape Mode! Toggle this setting in the map selection screen and play the new board whichever way you like.

Get ready for the adventure of your life in Ticket to Ride: Heart of Africa Expansion!

INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Explore Africa with festival organiser Blessing Kipruto and griot Nnamdi Okpara.

  • TWO NEW VEHICLES – Traverse the tricky terrain in the Safari Sights car or Fahagola railbus!

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – Take your animal buddies along for the ride with the Animal Trails carriage, or relax in the Stately Travels carriage.

Can you successfully navigate different terrains and double your points? Find out when you play Ticket to Ride: Heart of Africa today!

Copyright © 2025 Days of Wonder. Ticket to Ride and the Days of Wonder logos are trademarks of Days of Wonder. Copyrights and trademarks used under license from Asmodee Group SAS. The Asmodee name and logo are ™ and © 2019-2025 Asmodee Group SAS. All rights reserved.

tickettoride_nordicexpansion.callout: Build routes between colourful Nordic cities, claim the sprawling Murmansk-Lieksa route, and navigate the snowy tunnels and ferries of Denmark, Finland, Norway, and Sweden in this competitive map designed specifically for 2–3 players.
tickettoride_nordicexpansion.description_text:
Hello! Hei! Halló! Hej! Hallå! Hallo!

It’s time to set off on a brand-new adventure with the Ticket to Ride Nordic Expansion! Ride across the northern reaches, connect colourful cities, and complete tickets from the top of Iceland to the southern border of Denmark!

Chase the Globetrotter Bonus, awarded to the player with the most completed tickets. Strategise with 40 train pieces instead of 45 to make connecting the Nordic cities more challenging, and tackle the Murmansk-Lieksa route, a new nine-train-long route! Plus, you can swap three coloured railway car cards for one locomotive card.

Includes:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Play as Mina Larsen, a cheerful reindeer herder who is wrapped up warm in preparation for the snowy northern lands, and Morten Jensen, an elegant author with bold ambitions to collect as many Nordic folklore stories as train tickets!

  • TWO NEW TRAINS – The charming Arctic Express and the titanic Frosthammer locomotives!

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – The Snowdrifter keeps its passengers warm and snug as they travel from city to city. To reach new heights, pick the towering Hearthside double-decker carriage!

Take on new horizons with the Nordic Expansion!

tickettoride_indiaexpansion.callout: Rethink your strategies and ponder beyond single routes as you chase the elusive Mandala Bonus, awarded for completing tickets in multiple different ways
tickettoride_indiaexpansion.description_text:
It’s time to head to India in Ticket to Ride! With shorter ticket routes, the India Expansion presents new opportunities to get creative with connecting cities.

Make use of ferry routes or stick to land as you chase the unique Mandala Bonus – awarded to players who link up the same cities in multiple ways! Meet two new characters and add two more locomotives and carriages to your ever-growing fleet.

The India Expansion makes for a cosier way to play Ticket to Ride, as it thrives in smaller games of 2-4 players. You’ll need to think outside the box to come out on top as a railway legend here!

INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Join Bhaskar Singh, an aspiring poet, and Aanandi Johri, an inspiring doctor, as they journey across India!

  • TWO NEW TRAINS – Head out in the iconic Star Royale, or live it up in luxury in the Maharaja’s Chariot!

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – Bring a little elegance to your railway with the Lotus Wagon, or indulge with the Maharani’s Palace.

A new chapter of your travel diary calls to be written!

tickettoride_japanexpansion.callout: The Japan expansion introduces the Bullet Train mechanic where everyone can use the high-speed rail, but only the contributors reap the points—and avoid a massive point penalty!
tickettoride_japanexpansion.description_text:
For the first time ever, play Ticket to Ride: Japan Expansion in digital form!

Join two new characters – travel blogger Nakanishi Kimiko and Gyōji Moriyama Isamu – as you explore the beautiful map of Japan, connecting cities and scoring points.

Will you help to build the Bullet Train network across the country? Doing so will open up more routes for you – but also for your opponents! However, if you opt to stay out of the project, you’ll be giving up the chance to score bonus points…and you’ll be docked an eyewatering 20 points too! Decisions, decisions!

To help you on your journey, you’ll also get the Ichi Eki Saki and Tsuki Sleeper train and carriage, along with the Isogaba Maware and Hayai Carriage.

Enjoy your next adventure in Ticket to Ride: Japan Expansion!

INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Travel across Japan with travel blogger Nakanishi Kimiko and Gyōji Moriyama Isamu.

  • TWO NEW TRAINS – Zoom to your next destination with the Ichi Eki Saki, or settle aboard the Tsuki Sleeper!

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – Relax in the Isogaba Maware, or take it up a notch in the Hayai Carriage!

You’ve never played a game of Ticket to Ride quite like the Ticket to Ride: Japan Expansion. Experience the strategic-yet-cooperative twist on your favourite digital board game today!

littlevillage.description_text:
Donations to supportLittle Village are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.
 
We are a non-profit focused on global reforestation. Every dollar donated plants one tree.

tickettoride_europeexpansion.callout: Tunnel through the Alps and claim ferry routes across the Mediterranean. This expansion includes the Europa 1912 Ticket Pack, adding three new game modes: Europe Expanded, Big Cities of Europe, and the ultimate challenge, Mega Europe!
tickettoride_europeexpansion.description_text:
Hello! Bonjour! Ciao! Hola! Hérete! Buna ziua!

The Ticket to Ride: Europe Expansion will take you from coast to coast on land and sea as you build your travel network! Tunnel through the Alps, claim ferry routes across the Mediterranean, and complete tickets from Portugal to Poland!

Plus, when you buy the Europe Expansion, you’ll get the Europa 1912 Ticket Pack too! This special bonus content includes three new game modes and even more new tickets to complete. The Europa 1912 Ticket Pack adds even more ways to play the Europe Expansion, bringing your adventures from past to present and back again. You’ll be forging the history of your railway empire in no time!

INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Play as Erika Ford, a young businesswoman with a vision and the brains to make it happen, and Bertie Hawkes, a friendly smooth-talking salesman, loving life from city to city!

  • TWO NEW TRAINS – Cross the continent with the sturdy and reliable Dolomite Dynamite, and stay at the cutting-edge of steam train technology with the Rocket!

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – The Lumberjack and the Oil Baron. Timber travels best on the railway, and with your sturdy oil tanker, you’ll keep the lamps burning wherever you go!

It’s time to take your railway network international!

tickettoride_winterwonderlandbundle.callout: A festive cosmetic bundle to bring a little magic to your next journey! Play with the new Santa’s Wheels and the Special Tree-livery tokens. As a bonus, unlock two brand-new player colours and stand out on the board with teal or purple tokens.
tickettoride_winterwonderlandbundle.description_text:
A festive bundle to bring a little magic to your next game of Ticket to Ride®!

Travel across the map in Santa’s Wheels, borrowed from the rosy-cheeked chap himself specially for you. Attach the Special Tree-livery carriage and spread the joy from city to city as you journey across the world.

Plus, this bundle adds two new player colours – teal and purple.

INCLUDES:

  • SANTA’S WHEELS TOKEN – Explore the world aboard the most trustworthy and magical vehicle ever!

  • SPECIAL TREE-LIVERY TOKEN – Brighten up someone’s holiday season with a delivery of the most lovely Christmas three you can find.

  • TEAL AND PURPLE PLAYER COLOURS – Stand out in your next game with two amazing new player colours: teal and purple.

Head off on a magical adventure this Christmas with Ticket to Ride®! Play today!

humblestorediscountcouponforpolandexpans.human_name: Humble Store discount Coupon for Poland Expansion
humblestorediscountcouponforpolandexpans.callout: 25% off on the TTR Poland Expansion
humblestorediscountcouponforpolandexpans.description_text:
Get 25% Off Ticket To Ride: Polar Expansion

Poland Expansion will be available after May 13th. 

NOTE: Expires June 12th, 2026, 6pm PST. Does not stack with Humble Store sales.

Play the Ticket to Ride: Poland Expansion digitally for the first time!

Meet talented make-up artist Regina Kamińska and energetic drummer Kacper Pawlak as you journey across Poland, connecting its neighbouring countries and collecting Coins as you do so. Those Coins will come in handy at the end of the game, as they add bonus points to your score!

Ride the noble Polonaise train, or set off aboard the historic Copernicus. Attach the Kujawiak carriage for comfort, or use the Orbiting Greatness to carry your cargo across Poland.

Enjoy your Polish adventure in Ticket to Ride today!

INCLUDES:

  • TWO NEW CHARACTERS – Head out with make-up artist Regina Kamińska and drummer Kacper Pawlak.

  • TWO NEW LOCOMOTIVES – Expand your fleet with the Polonaise and the Copernicus.

  • TWO NEW CARRIAGES – Use the Kujawiak or the Orbiting Greatness carriage in your next game.

Collect those all-important Country Coins as you play the Ticket to Ride: Poland Expansion!

We are a non-profit focused on global reforestation. Every dollar donated plants one tree.

basic_data.description:
Bullet hell? More like bullet heaven! The thrills never stop in this bundle of action and survival games that will test your mettle and launch you to new heights! Slaughter monsters and turn yourself into an arsenal of weapons in Greedland! Fight off hordes of enemies and ascend the Tower of Zhor in action roguelike God of Weapons! ak-xolotl_together.callout: AK-xolotl: Together brings the local 2 player co-op update, letting you and a friend double the firepower
ak-xolotl_together.description_text:
Double the firepower! Local co-op update now live!

Two guns are always better than one. Dive into AK-xolotl's local co-op mode with a friend, battle through hordes of enemies, share epic power-ups, and blast through levels as a lethal duo of axolotls armed to the teeth.

AK-xolotl 2.0

A massive update has arrived in AK-xolotl! Discover 20+ new weapons, new items, new biomes, and face off against new bosses and enemies. Major overhauls to the Axolittles, cooking, and weapon systems, plus the addition of weapon mods, bring new depth and variety to your axolotl adventures!

AK-xolotl is the ultimate top-down roguelite shooter starring the most adorable amphibian! You're an axolotl armed with an AK, that embarks on an epic rampage, shooting down anything that stands in your way. Slaughter your way through a variety of biomes and conquer randomly generated rooms, all while collecting delicious food and capturing precious baby Axolotls.

Channel the incredible power of Axolotls' regeneration! If you're knocked down, you will rise again from the ashes and start stronger, unlocking new weapons with each fight. Fight, die, come back stronger and fight again!

On your journey, you will find different baby Axolotls - Axolittles! Bring Axolittles back to your pond; nurturing them with love and care, they will grow up and become your next fighter with killer abilities!

From Slithering Sock Snakes to Giant (knife wielding) Enemy Crabs, these bosses will put your regenerative abilities to the test. Time to bring an AK-47 to a knife fight!

Find Axolotl eggs and raise new powerful Axolittles by turning them into highly specialized little killing machines. Take their firepower to the next level by cooking up permanent, stat-improving recipes. Take no prisoners, eat everything and become unstoppable.

Fight up close with the Axe-alotl or or set your Phaser to “murder”... your playstyle is your pick! Take your firepower to the next level with mighty power-ups like Mjolnir, Gamer Juice or…Cousin Carl?

karatesurvivor.callout: No bullets, no problem. Use your Karate Mastery, the environment and improvised weapons to fight off relentless goons and bandits
karatesurvivor.description_text:
Step into the shoes of a martial arts master in a thrilling survivor-like roguelite inspired by action movies of the ‘80s. Use the environment and improvised weapons, master new techniques, and create devastating combos to fight off relentless goons and bandits! Karate Survivor delivers intense, fast-paced combat where improvisation and creativity are key to surviving the streets.

Key Features

  • Improvised Combat. Use whatever you can get your hands on to defeat your enemies. From plastic flamingos to mop handles, even a child's toy hammer can be deadly in the right hands.

  • Environmental Warfare. Manipulate your surroundings to your advantage. Push objects at enemies, bring down scaffolding, or slam them with a microwave door.

  • Dynamic Combos. Dozens of different attacks allow you to create unique combinations of up to six attacks, tailored to your fighting style. Experiment and discover the most effective combos.

  • Progression and Mastery. Collect experience to unlock and master new permanent techniques and skills between runs, making each playthrough more rewarding.

  • Diverse Locations and Boss Battles. Battle through various areas, each with its own distinct features and items for combat. Face powerful bosses in each location, testing your skills to the limit.

  • Fast-Paced Runs. Immerse yourself in rapid, intense street battles. Test your martial arts skills and survival instincts in action-packed showdowns that pay homage to the adrenaline-fueled scenes of action movies, ensuring you're always on the edge of your seat.

Fight fast, precisely, and without remorse.

armyofruin.callout: You're on a quest to defeat the Armys of Evil! Includes local Co-Op
armyofruin.description_text:
Army of Ruin is an auto-shooter in which you guide legendary heroes on a quest to defeat the Armies of Evil.

Countless Foes

Get hold of a deadly arsenal capable of slaying hundreds of enemies in seconds, and you may have a shot at defeating the fearsome Army Generals!

Power in your own hands

Use the unique skills of each hero to turn the tides when they least expect it. Enhance your trinkets and equipment and find powerful combinations that will evolve your weapons beyond their limits!

Upgrade your arsenal

Level up your skills between missions and test new combinations as you keep earning rewards, unlock new equipment to become even more powerful and face the hardest quests. Hundreds of challenges await you!

Quick and thrilling experience

Army of Ruin has been designed to offer a quick and thrilling game experience, while also focusing on simplicity and fun. Get ready to enjoy the game for hours!

greedland.callout: Mow down thousands of monsters on an alien planet and escape the clutches of death. 2 player online co-op
greedland.description_text:
Introducing Greedland: A Top-Down Shooter for Fans of "Vampire Survivors" and Beyond
EPIC BATTLES WITH MASSIVE ENEMY WAVES
Powered by Unreal Engine 5, "Greedland" delivers finely crafted enemies that swarm you from every direction, igniting an adrenaline-fueled gaming experience that tests your boundary of sanity.

BUILD YOUR ULTIMATE WARRIOR
Unlock a vast array of potent weapons and skills to create satisfying build and relive the thrill of classic games like "Alien Shooter" and "Crimsonland".

EXPLORE A MONSTROUS ARSENAL

Arm youself with the most ferocious the Galaxy can provide along with a long list of skills. The life of a mercenary offering endless strategic possibilities. Powerful mechs are in the furture updates!

DIVERSE MAPS AND CHALLENGING FOES
Experience three distinct maps, each with unique enemy combinations and varying difficulty levels, including formidable boss battles.

CONTINUOUSLY EXPANDING CONTENT
The game has already provided three challenging maps, each with a unique combination of enemies and powerful BOSS to challenge. As the game continues to be updated, you will encounter more new maps, new game modes, and a four-player co-op mode, making your adventure more diverse.

Add Greedland to your wishlist now and stay tuned for exciting updates and fresh content. Immerse yourself in a thrilling top-down shooter adventure like no other!
Progress from Next Feast demo will be inheirited to the retail version.

worldwildlifefund.description_text:
Payments to the World Wildlife Fund are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

WWF is one of the world’s largest and most experienced independent conservation organizations, with over 5 million supporters and a global network active in more than 100 countries.

WWF’s mission is to stop the degradation of the planet’s natural environment and to build a future in which humans live in harmony with nature, by conserving the world’s biological diversity, ensuring that the use of renewable natural resources is sustainable, and promoting the reduction of pollution and wasteful consumption.

The WWF name and logo are used with its permission, which in no way constitutes an endorsement, express or implied, of any product, service, company, opinion or political position. The WWF name and logo is a registered trademark owned by WWF. For more information about WWF, please visit www.wwf.org

pesticidenotrequired.callout: Mow down countless crops and corrupt critters while crafting game-breaking builds!
pesticidenotrequired.description_text:
Pesticide Not Required combines auto-attacking bullet heaven roguelites with farming game mechanics to create an expansive set of strategies and build combinations. Destroy huge hordes of evil insects, grow tons of crops, create your own build path, and unlock unique characters to play with!

Create Overpowered Builds
You are the bullet hell! Grow an arsenal of ridiculous weapons and craft your own unique build with a combination of 40+ stats. Additionally, each character has their own unique traits that keep runs fresh.

Farm, Fish, and Mine
Earn vital gold and experience from growing crops, catching fish, and mining. Expand your plot to harvest huge quantities of crops and build carefully to enhance your farming, fishing, and mining capabilities.

Automate Your Farm With Pets
Recruit friendly pets that will enhance your farm, collect loot, and kill enemies.

Other Features
  • Quick ~20-minute play sessions
  • Customizable home interior and backyard garden area
  • Season-themed map variations with 16 difficulty levels
  • 20+ unlockable characters with special traits
  • Persistent skill tree upgrades
  • 100+ achievements to unlock
  • Compendium with unique fish for each season
  • Mouse-only gameplay support
  • Gamepad and keyboard support
  • Go WUMBO!Pesticide Not Required is inspired by awesome games like Brotato, Vampire Survivors, and Atomicrops.

godofweapons.callout: Ascend the tower of Zhor to reclaim the last light for the world.
godofweapons.description_text:
The world was once a bright and beautiful place, filled with light and wonder. But one day, an evil force swept across the land, stealing away the world's light and plunging it into darkness. As a result, chaos and destruction spread across the world, and many feared that the darkness would never end.

In this action roguelike, survive hordes of monsters on every level with automatic weapon attacks. Dodge and collect loot to improve your chances in the next round. It's all about strategy, reflexes, and smart movement.

Collecting weapons and accessories and strategically organizing them in your inventory is crucial to your survival. Your inventory space is limited, hence before putting in a new item, you'll need to consider its strengths and weaknesses and how it fits into your overall strategy.

Careful management of your inventory can make the difference between victory and defeat. As you progress through the game, you will amass an arsenal of powerful weapons and accessories, making you an unstoppable force to be reckoned with.

iamlegion_standsurvivors.callout: Summon your stands and brawl it out!
iamlegion_standsurvivors.description_text:
Summon up to eight powerful stands and face waves of enemies together. Get ready for epic battles like never before. Each stand has unique skills and fighting styles: from the crushing blows of melee warriors to the dazzling spells of mages that light up the battlefield. Whether you prefer close combat or flashy magic, your stands' powers make every fight thrilling!

Orange Stands are here to shatter the limits! Prepare for completely new combat strategies and sky-high damage potential. Hunt down Special Bosses mid-battle to seize Awakening Scrolls and unleash the true, hidden power of any Purple Stand. From the Helicopter and the Skeleton King to the Monkey King wielding his legendary staff—they have all evolved into brand-new forms. Now, it’s time to show them what you’re really made of!

The all-new Artifact Mode is officially live! Say goodbye to the frustration of random reforging and hello to Artifact combos. Our completely overhauled crafting system offers massive stat growth and infinite depth for your builds. Artifacts aren't just about big numbers—they introduce entirely new combat mechanics that revolutionize the satisfaction of your endgame builds. Combined with the new upgrade system, forge your ultimate arsenal and become unstoppable!

Over 100 different stands and loads of hero archetypes mean endless ways to build your dream team. Choose strength-based heroes with high-defense or attribute-boosting stands for an indestructible tank squad, or pick mage heroes to supercharge your spellcasters for massive damage. Your choice of heroes and stands will shape your unique combat style. Mix and match to discover countless strategies and keep every battle fresh and exciting!
Mine resources and forge powerful gear with random attributes. Combine identical items to create higher-level gear with evolving bonuses. Whether you favor attack, defense, magic, or physical builds, crafting gear always brings new surprises! Sell gear anytime with proportional ore refunds, and experiment with different gear to find your perfect upgrade path.

The stand system is packed with variety and fun. Boost the same stands by upgrading their star levels, or combine different ones to summon higher-tier stands and quickly increase your strength. Explore different strategies, feel the power boost with each upgrade, and easily tackle various challenges to build your ultimate team of stands!

godofweapons_eternalnightmare.callout: This major expansion introduces a powerful new playable character, fresh gameplay mechanics, unique weapons, and vicious new bosses. Test your limits in the all-new Infinity Mode
godofweapons_eternalnightmare.description_text:
After defeating the malevolent Zhor and reclaiming the last light for the world, hope began to flicker once more. But the darkness had roots far deeper than anyone imagined. In the shadows of victory, a new evil stirs, festering in a forgotten, cursed city long lost to time. The light you restored has failed to reach this forsaken place, where nightmares reign and twisted creatures lurk.

Treasure Hunter

Features a brand new Socket system that lets you power up your weapons with gems.

Necromancer

Wield the new Summon system, you are no longer alone on the battlefield.

Plague Doctor

With control over disease, they spread deadly contagions to crush their enemies and gain even more power from it.

Favor System

From the very beginning, players can upgrade their weapon of choice with Titanite, boosting its strength and increasing item drop rates.

New Weapons

Equip unique weapons, each with distinct looks and abilities.

Points of Interest

The challenges along the way test the player's courage and skill, offering valuable rewards for those who overcome them.

New Enemies and Bosses

Prepare to battle against ruthless new adversaries and fearsome bosses, each more terrifying than the last. Do you have what it takes to stand your ground?

Infinity Mode

Step into an endless fight against the forces of darkness. With every passing moment, the challenge intensifies—how long can you survive before the shadows consume you?

keeperstoll.callout: Purge a callous world through a methodical experience where each hero has specialized, game-defining mechanics.
keeperstoll.description_text:
Arise, fallen hero! Enter Keeper's Toll, an action-packed roguelite set within a retro-infused dark fantasy world that demands skill and courage. Every moment could be your last, but with each setback, you grow stronger. Seize the challenge, overcome daunting foes, and purge a callous world through a methodical genre-bending experience.

Keeper’s Toll places a heavy focus on skill-based gameplay with ARPG elements. Each run allows you to study your enemies and hone your skills while progressing through the main quest. Once you have mastered the basics, Keeper’s Toll introduces unique enemy archetypes, intricate bosses, and fresh mechanics that will challenge any worthy hero.

Keeper's Toll features 6 unique risen heroes: the Shadow Monk, Pyromancer, Blood Maiden, Necromancer, Ranger, and Bogatyr. Each hero has their own specialized game-defining mechanics, as well as completely unique abilities and progression trees.

Ferocious bosses and cutthroat invaders lie at the heart of Keeper’s Toll and its perilous lands. All of the bosses, mini bosses, and invaders you will encounter feature their own unique battle mechanics and twists on the core gameplay. Overcoming the bosses requires a keen sense of strategy, so strengthen your character with purpose or suffer a swift end to your journey.

Key Features:

  • Unique genre blend between horde survival and ARPG with a touch of souls-like

  • Skill-based gameplay designed to be approached methodically

  • Custom character classes featuring their own progression trees, unique abilities and playstyles

  • Destructive boss encounters with intricate designs, mechanics, and gameplay twists

entropysurvivors.callout: A sword-wielding mech. A sharpshooting space frog. Bring these two unlikely heroes home using nothing but the unstoppable power of friendship. 2-4 player online co-op
entropysurvivors.description_text:
A sword-wielding mech. A sharpshooting space frog. Control both characters simultaneously against the forces of Entropy in this reverse bullet hell roguelike. You’ll bring these two unlikely heroes home using nothing but the unstoppable power of friendship (and an arsenal of mind-blowing cartoon weapons)!

Play by yourself, or bring your friends along for a genre-bending online co-op experience! Become best buddies with synergetic builds or prove yourself champion in the contest for high score.

Is your shotgun out of ammo? Throw it at your enemies! Feeling hungry? Use your spear as a shish-kabob. Unlock dozens of customizable options to power up and create your own playstyle.

From weaponized garbage trucks to a gun that shoots bees, Entropy Survivors is overflowing with unique weapons, abilities, and upgrades that’ll make you ask “What?”

Beautifully crafted alien landscapes meet colorful bomb bursts and delicious chain reactions. Find the sights and sounds of an entire carnival arcade within one 20-minute level!

Entropy Survivors is a prequel set in the Shoulders of Giants universe–but don’t worry: this game stands completely on its own.

sodaman.callout: You're a supersoldier fighting alien hordes with soda powers. Discover planets, unlock weapons, and cybernetics. But first, crack open a cold one
sodaman.description_text:
"Sodaman is infuriated, ever since Entity-X caused the Sodacalypse, making almost all of the sodas in the existence go flat, becoming bland and tasteless with the press of a button. Yet there are still some out there, untouched by this catastrophe and it is up to Sodaman himself to find them."

"I'm here to drink soda and kick aliens... but I'm all outta soda."

Chug Sodas Down

  • Choose from a variety of soda powers across 7 different colors, mix, shake, add a little dash of fury and create the freshest builds found in this side of the universe.

    Arm Yourself

  • Choose the weapon most suited to your playstyle and discover the most powerful synergies.

    Augment Yourself

  • With six different body parts and over 30 cybernetic augments available for implementation, you'll have endless options for character customization.

Build Your Deck

  • Choose from dozens of power-up cards and build your deck. Take your soda power to the next level!

Explore Your Spaceship

  • Relax between runs in your spaceship, meet new characters and explore more of the Sodaman universe.

"We’re a small team of 4 devs creating the game. So if you have any question, suggestions or just want to hang out, grab a six-pack and join our Discord."

from_bundle.short_marketing_blurb: Get Sodaman, Greedland, Army of Ruin, God Of Weapons and more!
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Sodaman, Greedland, Army of Ruin, God Of Weapons, Karate Survivor, AK-xolotl: Together, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
The thrills never stop in this bundle of action and survival games that will test your mettle and launch you to new heights! Slaughter monsters and turn yourself into an arsenal of weapons in Greedland! Fight off hordes of enemies and ascend the Tower of Zhor in action roguelike God of Weapons! Live out your ’80s martial arts dreams by mastering fighting combos and turning everyday objects into deadly weapons in Karate Survivor! Join the melee and get this high octane bundle at the price of your choice, and support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 29th, 2027
from_bundle.author: Publishers

basic_data.human_name: Ultimate Farming RPG Assets Bundle
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: Craft amazing farming games with your design in mind using the ultimate collection of genre-specific assets! Give your players the sensation of dirt beneath their fingertips with a rich, lived-in environment to spread their roots with asset packs like Forest Tileset 4 Seasons and Mountains Tileset 2 Seasons. Or design your homestead from the ground up with House Interior Tileset and Houses Tileset 2 Seasons—the options are endless! Grab this deal before it spoils and help support Code.org with your purchase.
basic_data.description:
Freshen up your farming assets. Craft amazing farming games with your design in mind using the ultimate collection of genre-specific assets! Give your players the sensation of dirt beneath their fingertips with a rich, lived-in environment to spread their roots with asset packs like Forest Tileset 4 Seasons and Mountains Tileset 2 Seasons. Or design your homestead from the ground up with House Interior Tileset and Houses Tileset 2 Seasons—the options are endless! Grab this deal before it spoils and help support Code.org with your purchase.

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the software in this bundle is as much as $446. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase. Pay $5 or more to access keys.

Redeem your keys. All keys can be redeemed on the ElvGames Itch.io website.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the developer and to support Code.org. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

code_org.description_text:
Donations to support Code.org are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Launched in 2013, Code.org® is a non-profit dedicated to expanding participation in computer science by making it available in more schools, and increasing participation by women and underrepresented students of color. Code.org's comprehensive approach represents the vanguard of effective integration of Computer Science (CS) into the core of public school education. Our vision is that every student in every school should have the opportunity to learn computer science. We believe computer science and computer programming should be part of the core curriculum in education, alongside other science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) courses, such as biology, physics, chemistry and algebra.

- Any game engine that can use PNG sprites.

code_org.description_text:
Donations to support Code.org are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Launched in 2013, Code.org® is a non-profit dedicated to expanding participation in computer science by making it available in more schools, and increasing participation by women and underrepresented students of color. Code.org's comprehensive approach represents the vanguard of effective integration of Computer Science (CS) into the core of public school education. Our vision is that every student in every school should have the opportunity to learn computer science. We believe computer science and computer programming should be part of the core curriculum in education, alongside other science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) courses, such as biology, physics, chemistry and algebra.

from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Craft amazing farming games with your design in mind using the ultimate collection of genre-specific assets! Give your players the sensation of dirt beneath their fingertips with a rich, lived-in environment to spread their roots with asset packs like Forest Tileset 4 Seasons and Mountains Tileset 2 Seasons. Or design your homestead from the ground up with House Interior Tileset and Houses Tileset 2 Seasons—the options are endless! Grab this deal before it spoils and help support Code.org with your purchase.

basic_data.description:
Make musical magic. Curate the perfect audioscape for your next game, movie, or vlog with an epic 50+ pack bundle of completely royalty-free musical assets from ElvGames! Everything you need, from individual instruments and samples to fully composed songs, is here for your next epic boss battle, scenic open-world soundtrack, and beyond. Pay what you want for Atmospheric Harp 1–5, Atmospheric Fantasy Music 1–5, and so much more today! Get the audio assets you need to achieve the right sound you’re looking for, and help support Save the Children with your purchase.

Pay $5 or more. Normally, the total cost for the software in this bundle is as much as $470. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $5 purchase. Pay $5 or more to access keys.

Redeem your keys. All of the software in this bundle is available for Windows.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the developer and to support Save the Children. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

savethechildren.description_text:
Donations to support Save the Children are made to PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Save the Children believes every child deserves a future. In 120 countries around the world, they work every day to give children a healthy start in life, the opportunity to learn in school and protection from harm. When crisis strikes, and children are most vulnerable, they are among the first to respond and the last to leave. They ensure children’s unique needs are met and their voices are heard. They do whatever it takes to reach every last child.

savethechildren.description_text:
Donations to support Save the Children are made to PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Save the Children believes every child deserves a future. In 120 countries around the world, they work every day to give children a healthy start in life, the opportunity to learn in school and protection from harm. When crisis strikes, and children are most vulnerable, they are among the first to respond and the last to leave. They ensure children’s unique needs are met and their voices are heard. They do whatever it takes to reach every last child.

from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Viking Music 1, Viking Music 2, Atmospheric Harp 1, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb: Curate the perfect audioscape for your next game, movie, or vlog with an epic 50+ pack bundle of completely royalty-free musical assets from ElvGames! Everything you need, from individual instruments and samples to fully composed songs, is here for your next epic boss battle, scenic open-world soundtrack, and beyond. Pay what you want for Atmospheric Harp 1–5, Atmospheric Fantasy Music 1–5, and so much more today! Get the audio assets you need to achieve the right sound you’re looking for, and help support Save the Children with your purchase.
from_bundle.author: ElvGames

basic_data.human_name: Humble Physical Book Bundle: Magpie Games Classic Indie RPG Physical Book Bundle
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Got a table at home that’s looking a little empty? Why not fill it with stacks of fantastic roleplaying books—available as physical copies in this bundle from Magpie Games! Get a group together and play through fan-favorite plotlines like The Play’s The Thing, an adventure that lets you retell and remix Shakespeare’s greatest works! Or dive into Our Last Best Hope, which sets high-octane thrills within end-of-the-world plots like Sunshine and Armageddon! americancivillibertiesunion.description_text:
Donations to support the American Civil Liberties Union Foundation, Inc. (ACLU) are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

For nearly 100 years, the American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) has been our nation's guardian of liberty, working in courts, legislatures, and communities to defend and preserve the individual rights and liberties that the Constitution and the laws of the United States guarantee everyone in this country. Whether it's achieving full equality for LGBT people, establishing new privacy protections for our digital age of widespread government surveillance, ending mass incarceration, or preserving the right to vote or the right to have an abortion, the ACLU takes up the toughest civil liberties cases and issues to defend all people from government abuse and overreach. With more than 2 million members, activists, and supporters, the ACLU is a nationwide organization that fights tirelessly in all 50 states, Puerto Rico, and Washington, D.C., to safeguard everyone's rights.

ourlastbesthope.description_text:
Bundle Estimated Shipping:

United States - $11
UK - $15
Canada - $19
Europe - $23
ROW - $29



Our Last Best Hope is tabletop roleplaying game about a crew of people on a mission to save humanity from a terrible crisis. During the game, you and your friends will play through a classic disaster movie in which your characters are the stars. Each game is unique, as your group confronts a new crisis with a new set of characters and a new plan to save humanity.

epyllion_encylopediadraconica.description_text: The Encyclopedia Draconica, Volume 1: Tales & Stories is a supplement for Epyllion, a tabletop roleplaying game in which you play young drakes who adventure throughout Dragonia while discovering the power of friendship and tradition. This companion book contains encyclopedic entries on the tales and stories of Dragonia, featuring new playbooks, exciting entries, and unique moves that add depth to the history of Dragonia while giving players and GMs new tools for play!

epyllion_adragonepic.description_text: Epyllion is a tabletop role playing game about young drakes who investigate rumors, solve problems, and discover the truth of a growing evil in Dragonia. While you play, you and your friends tell awesome stories, explore what it means to be a drake of Dragonia, and discover the value of friendship through magical, whimsical, and heartfelt adventures.

ourlastbesthopeexpansion.description_text: In this Expansion Book for Our Last Best Hope, you'll find four new playsets, including The Core and Giant Monster Mission alongside four advanced Missions, including the Fantasy Adventure and Superhero Missions, and new playsets that change key rules of the game. Finally, you'll also discover three new Hacks that let you use the Our Last Best Hope mechanics to play entirely new games, allowing you to wander through dreamscapes implanting memories and explore alien ruins on distant worlds.

playsthething.description_text: The Play’s The Thing is a tabletop roleplaying game about actors who want to rewrite the Shakespearean roles they’ve been given. You and your friends tell the story of an acting troupe that is scheduled to perform a new play, but has a lot of disagreements about how that play should go. While the playwright might present you with a classic Shakespearean folio, you’ll use your imagination and wit to craft new events and excitement in old stories.

stealthandtensionaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Stealth/Tension Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Stealth / Tension is built for moments of uncertainty, risk, and controlled movement under pressure. These tracks create a focused, restrained atmosphere that heightens awareness without overwhelming player concentration.

Designed for infiltration, surveillance, evasion, and situations where detection carries consequences, this pack reinforces the constant sense that something could change at any moment.

Includes 39 tracks.

overworldtravelaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Overworld Travel Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Overworld Travel is designed to accompany movement across vast landscapes and long journeys between destinations. These tracks create a sense of scale, progression, and continuity, supporting travel through open terrain, shifting environments, and the spaces that connect major locations.

Built to sustain atmosphere over distance and time, this pack reinforces the feeling of traversing a living world where every path leads somewhere meaningful.

Includes 65 tracks.

combat_highintensityaudiopack_vol1.human_name: Combat - High Intensity Audio Pack, Vol. 1
combat_highintensityaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Combat - High Intensity Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Combat – High Intensity delivers relentless, high-energy battle music designed for moments of peak danger and decisive action. These tracks drive momentum with urgency and weight, supporting large-scale encounters, boss fights, and critical turning points where the outcome truly matters.

Built to sustain tension and intensity without losing clarity, this pack gives combat scenes the force, pace, and emotional impact needed to make every confrontation feel immediate and consequential.

Includes 50 tracks.

dungeonexplorationaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Dungeon Exploration Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Dungeon Exploration is crafted to support tense, methodical discovery in hostile and forgotten spaces. These tracks create a sense of depth, uncertainty, and restrained danger, reinforcing environments where every step forward carries risk.

Designed for subterranean ruins, ancient corridors, and long-deserted strongholds, this pack provides the atmospheric foundation needed to sustain exploration without overpowering gameplay.

Includes 60 tracks.

combat_skirmishaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Combat - Skirmish Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Combat – Skirmish is designed for fast-paced encounters and moment-to-moment action. These tracks support smaller battles, roaming threats, and unpredictable clashes where tension rises quickly and resolution comes just as fast.

Built to sustain energy without overwhelming the scene, this pack gives everyday combat the momentum and urgency it needs while remaining flexible enough for repeated encounters and dynamic gameplay.

Includes 70 tracks.

localexplorationaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Local Exploration Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Local Exploration supports moment-to-moment discovery across the everyday spaces that make a world feel alive. These tracks create a sense of movement, curiosity, and environmental presence without drawing focus away from player interaction.

Designed for traveling between points of interest, navigating open environments, and exploring familiar territory, this pack provides the ambient continuity that connects a world together.

Includes 60 tracks.

esafoundation.description_text:
Payments to ESA Foundation are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Created by the American entertainment software industry, the ESA Foundation (ESAF) works to make a positive difference in the lives of America's youth by providing scholarships to the next generation of industry innovators and supporting teachers and organizations that leverage entertainment software technology to create educational opportunities. The Foundation is supported through direct donations, its signature fundraising event "Nite to Unite" and partnerships with organizations like Humble Bundle.

arcanelocationsaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Arcane Locations Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Arcane Locations is a collection of atmospheric soundscapes designed to bring magical environments to life. From ancient ritual chambers and hidden sanctums to forgotten towers humming with latent power, these tracks create a sense of mystery, depth, and quiet tension that defines spaces shaped by magic.

Built for exploration, discovery, and ambient world presence, this pack provides the sonic identity of places where unseen forces linger and reality feels subtly altered. Ideal for games, narrative environments, interactive worlds, and any setting where magic is part of the atmosphere itself.

Includes 40 tracks.

settlementaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Settlement Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Settlement captures the sound of inhabited spaces shaped by daily life and quiet activity. These tracks create a sense of stability, presence, and continuity, reinforcing environments where people gather, work, and exist between moments of conflict or travel.

Designed to support towns, villages, outposts, and established communities, this pack provides the atmospheric foundation that makes a world feel lived in rather than merely visited.

Includes 50 tracks.

townandtavernaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Town & Tavern Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Town & Tavern captures the sound of communal spaces where stories are shared, alliances are formed, and the world briefly feels at rest. These tracks create a sense of warmth, familiarity, and subtle activity, reinforcing environments centered around gathering and social exchange.

Designed for inns, marketplaces, guild halls, and lived-in interiors, this pack provides the atmosphere that makes communal spaces feel active and grounded without overwhelming conversation or interaction.

Includes 50 tracks.

menuanduiaudiopack_vol1.description_text:
Ego Audio · Menu/UI Audio Pack, Vol. 1 (High Fantasy)

Menu / UI provides focused, unobtrusive music designed for interface spaces and system navigation. These tracks establish atmosphere without overwhelming attention, supporting menus, character screens, inventory management, and non-combat decision moments.

Built to reinforce world identity even outside active gameplay, this pack ensures that transitions, pauses, and player interaction spaces remain cohesive with the broader experience.

Includes 30 tracks.

headfirstc_5thedition.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

Go from beginner to confident developer as you create apps, games, and real-world projects using C#, .NET 9, and Visual Studio. With this engaging, visual guide, you'll master object-oriented programming, build 3D games in Unity, harness the power of LINQ for data queries, and learn to leverage AI tools in your development, through puzzles, hands-on exercises, and practical projects that stick. Dive right in and build a cross-platform game in chapter one using C# and .NET MAUI--running on Windows, macOS, Android, and iOS. Our readers have become professional developers, team leads, and coding streamers. No experience needed--just bring your desire to learn. This is where your coding journey begins.

What's so special about this book?

If you've read a Head First book, you know what to expect: a visually rich format designed for the way your brain works. If you haven't, you're in for a treat. With this book, you'll learn C# through a multisensory experience that engages your mind--rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep.

headfirstsoftwarearchitecture.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

If you're a software developer looking for a quick on-ramp to software architecture, this handy guide is a great place to start. From the authors of Fundamentals of Software Architecture, Head First Software Architecture teaches you how to think architecturally and explores the unique challenges of software architecture. You'll learn the distinction between architecture and design and the relationship between code, components, and architectural styles. You'll also learn how to work with some common architectural styles through vivid, fun examples. Quick, easy, and entertaining, this book is a valuable introduction to the world of software architecture.

Why does this book look so different?

Based on the latest research in cognitive science and learning theory, Head First Software Architecture uses a visually rich format to engage your mind, rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep. Why waste your time struggling with new concepts? This multisensory learning experience is designed for the way your brain really works.

developers.developer-name: Raju Gandhi, Mark Richards, Neal Ford

headfirstgit.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

Many people who use Git rely on "recipes"--copying and pasting commands they find on the internet without really understanding how Git actually works. But what do you do if you find yourself in a tight spot? You can't simply wing it. With this unique hands-on guide, you'll learn the ways of Git and have fun while doing it. Raju Gandhi peels back the layers to reveal the simple yet powerful engine that powers Git, so you'll understand not just the how but the why. You'll master branches, merges, commit messages, search, utilities, and more; learn best practices for collaborative work; and unlock the full potential of Git.

What's so special about this book?

If you've read a Head First book, you know what to expect--a visually rich format designed for the way your brain works. If you haven't, you're in for a treat. With this book, you'll learn Git through a multisensory experience that engages your mind rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep.

headfirstjavascriptprogramming.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

The new edition of this brain-friendly guide takes you through a comprehensive journey into modern JavaScript, covering everything from core language fundamentals to today's cutting-edge features. You'll dive into the nuances of JavaScript types and the unparalleled flexibility of its functions. You'll also learn how to expertly navigate classes and objects, and finally understand closures. But that's just the beginning. You'll also get hands-on with the browser's document object model (DOM), engaging with JavaScript in exciting ways. You won't just be reading—you'll be playing games, solving puzzles, pondering mysteries, and interacting with JavaScript as never before. And you'll write real code, lots of it, so you can start building your own applications.

What's so special about this book?

If you've read a Head First book, you know what to expect: a visually rich format designed for the way your brain works. If you haven't, you're in for a treat. With this book, you'll learn JavaScript through a multisensory experience that engages your mind—rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep.

headfirstagile.description_text:
Head First Agile is a complete guide to learning real-world agile ideas, practices, principles.

What will you learn from this book?

In Head First Agile, you'll learn all about the ideas behind agile and the straightforward practices that drive it. You'll take deep dives into Scrum, XP, Lean, and Kanban, the most common real-world agile approaches today. You'll learn how to use agile to help your teams plan better, work better together, write better code, and improve as a team‚Äîbecause agile not only leads to great results, but agile teams say they also have a much better time at work. Head First Agile will help you get agile into your brain... and onto your team!

Preparing for your PMI-ACP¬Æ certification?

This book also has everything you need to get certified, with 100% coverage of the PMI-ACP¬Æ exam. Luckily, the most effective way to prepare for the exam is to get agile into your brain‚Äîso instead of cramming, you're learning.

Why does this book look so different?

Based on the latest research in cognitive science and learning theory, Head First Agile uses a visually rich format to engage your mind, rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep. Why waste your time struggling with new concepts? This multi-sensory learning experience is designed for the way your brain really works.

headfirstjava3rdedition.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

Head First Java is a complete learning experience in Java and object-oriented programming. With this book, you'll learn the Java language with a unique method that goes beyond how-to manuals and helps you become a great programmer. Through puzzles, mysteries, and soul-searching interviews with famous Java objects, you'll quickly get up to speed on Java's fundamentals and advanced topics including lambdas, streams, generics, threading, networking, and the dreaded desktop GUI. If you have experience with another programming language, Head First Java will engage your brain with more modern approaches to coding--the sleeker, faster, and easier to read, write, and maintain Java of today.

What's so special about this book?

If you've read a Head First book, you know what to expect--a visually rich format designed for the way your brain works. If you haven't, you're in for a treat. With Head First Java, you'll learn Java through a multisensory experience that engages your mind, rather than by means of a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep.

developers.developer-name: Kathy Sierra, Bert Bates, Trisha Gee

headfirstpython3rdedition.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

Want to learn the Python language without slogging your way through how-to manuals? With Head First Python, you'll quickly grasp Python's fundamentals by working with built-in data structures and functions. You'll build your very own web app, which—once it's ready for prime time—runs in the cloud. You'll learn how to wrangle data with Python, scrape data from the web, feed data to pandas, and interact with databases. This third edition is a complete learning experience that will help you become a bona fide Python programmer in no time.

What's so special about this book?

If you've read a Head First book, you know what to expect: a visually rich format designed for the way your brain works. If you haven't, you're in for a treat. With this book, you'll learn Python through a multisensory experience that engages your mind—rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep.

headfirstandroiddevelopment3rdedition.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

If you have an idea for a killer Android app, this fully revised and updated edition will get you up and running in a jiffy. You'll go beyond syntax and how-to manuals and learn how to think like a great Android developer. This hands-on book teaches you everything from designing user interfaces to building multi-screen apps that persist data in a database. It covers the latest features of Android Jetpack, including Jetpack Compose. It's like having an experienced Android developer sitting right next to you! If you have some Kotlin know-how, you're ready to get started.

Why does this book look so different?

Based on the latest research in cognitive science and learning theory, Head First Android Development uses a visually rich format to engage your mind rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep. Why waste your time struggling with new concepts? This multisensory learning experience is designed for the way your brain really works.

headfirstgo.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

Go makes it easy to build software that‚Äôs simple, reliable, and efficient. Andthis book makes it easy for programmers like you to get started. Googledesigned Go for high-performance networking and multiprocessing, but‚Äîlike Python and JavaScript‚Äîthe language is easy to read and use. With thispractical hands-on guide, you‚Äôll learn how to write Go code using clearexamples that demonstrate the language in action. Best of all, you‚Äôll understandthe conventions and techniques that employers want entry-level Godevelopers to know.

Why does this book look so different?

Based on the latest research in cognitive science and learning theory, HeadFirst Go uses a visually rich format to engage your mind rather than a textheavyapproach that puts you to sleep. Why waste your time struggling withnew concepts? This multisensory learning experience is designed for theway your brain really works.

headfirstlearntocode.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

It√É¬¢??s no secret the world around you is becoming more connected, more configurable, more programmable, more computational. You can remain a passive participant, or you can learn to code. With Head First Learn to Code you√É¬¢??ll learn how to think computationally and how to write code to make your computer, mobile device, or anything with a CPU do things for you. Using the Python programming language, you√É¬¢??ll learn step by step the core concepts of programming as well as many fundamental topics from computer science, such as data structures, storage, abstraction, recursion, and modularity.

Why does this book look so different?

Based on the latest research in cognitive science and learning theory, Head First Learn to Code uses a visually rich format to engage your mind, rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep. Why waste your time struggling with new concepts? This multi-sensory learning experience is designed for the way your brain really works.

headfirstpmp4thedition.description_text:
Now updated for the 2021 PMP Exam

What will you learn from this book?

Head First PMP teaches you the latest principles and certification objectives in The PMBOK¬Æ Guide in a unique and inspiring way. This updated fourth edition takes you beyond specific questions and answers with a unique visual format that helps you grasp the big picture of project management. By putting PMP concepts into context, you'll be able to understand, remember, and apply them--not just on the exam, but on the job. No wonder so many people have used Head First PMP as their sole source for passing the PMP exam.

This book will help you:

  • Learn PMP's underlying concepts to help you understand the PMBOK principles and pass the certification exam with flying colors
  • Get 100% coverage of the latest principles and certification objectives in The PMBOK¬Æ Guide, Sixth Edition
  • Make use of a thorough and effective preparation guide with hundreds of practice questions and exam strategies
  • Explore the material through puzzles, games, problems, and exercises that make learning easy and entertaining

Why does this book look so different?

Based on the latest research in cognitive science and learning theory, Head First PMP uses a visually rich format to engage your mind, rather than a text-heavy approach that puts you to sleep. Why waste your time struggling with new concepts? This multi-sensory learning experience is designed for the way your brain really works.

codeforamerica.description_text:
Donations to support Code for America are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Code for America is a national nonprofit that believes government can work for the people, by the people, in the 21st century. We organize a network of people who build technology to further local governments' priorities of creating healthy, prosperous, and safe communities. Our goal: government services that are simple, effective, and easy to use, for everyone.

headfirstdesignpatterns2ndedition.description_text:
What will you learn from this book?

You know you don't want to reinvent the wheel, so you look to Design Patterns: the lessons learned by those who've faced the same software design problems. With Design Patterns, you get to take advantage of the best practices and experience of others so you can spend your time on something more challenging. Something more fun. This book shows you the patterns that matter, when to use them and why, how to apply them to your own designs, and the object-oriented design principles on which they're based. Join hundreds of thousands of developers who've improved their object-oriented design skills through Head First Design Patterns.

What's so special about this book?

If you've read a Head First book, you know what to expect: a visually rich format designed for the way your brain works. With Head First Design Patterns, 2E you'll learn design principles and patterns in a way that won't put you to sleep, so you can get out there to solve software design problems and speak the language of patterns with others on your team.

If this reality has seemed a little boring lately, why not step into a new one? Our latest VR bundle from Creature invites you to don your headsets and enter new worlds full of fascinating stories and exciting challenges! This curated selection includes Maestro, a VR conductor simulator game where your hands control the music of an entire orchestra! Try out The Light Brigade, a roguelike VR shooter set in a ruined world whose soldiers fight to free themselves from corruption and darkness! Stick it to the man with Crime Shop Simulator: A Prison Boss Game and craft and sell all the not-quite-legal merch the mayor of your city keeps banning—without getting sent back to the slammer! There are even more fun challenges to take on in this bundle of VR games, so get it now at the price of your choice, and support Stop AAPI Hate with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027
